name: Veg Bullets
description: It slices carrots, cucumbers, cabbage and squash into uniform slices. It shreds all these veggies into equally perfect shreds for slaw, carrot salad, beet salad, etc. The spiralizer portion of this machine turns carrots, green/red peppers, and zucchini into perfect spiral ropes for an amazing pasta feel dish.

name: Mix Veg Pakora
description: Mixed Vegetable pakora are veggie fritters made in South Indian style. They are addictive, aromatic, crunchy and a delicious snack. Serve them with cup of tea or coriander chutney or mint chutney.

name: Cheese Pakora
description: Paneer is the most common type of cheese used in traditional cuisines from the Indian subcontinent. It is sometimes wrapped in dough and deep-fried or served with either spinach (palak paneer) or peas (mattar paneer)

name: Chana Chat
description: Chana Chaat is a popular Indian snack where cooked chickpeas are tossed with fresh cut onions, tomatoes, tamarind chutney, ground aromatic spices and herbs.

name: Dal Makhni
description: a rich and creamy North Indian lentil dish, typically made with black lentils (urad dal), kidney beans (rajma), and slow-cooked in butter and cream

name: Dal Fry
description: a rich and creamy North Indian lentil dish, typically made with black lentils (urad dal), kidney beans (rajma), and slow-cooked in butter and cream

name: Yellow Dal Makhni
description: A simple, healthy split yellow lentil (daal) recipe prepared with aromatics, seasoned with tomatoes and garlic, and flavored with spiced oil known as Tadka.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Experience the tantalizing flavors of our Kadhai Paneer, where succulent paneer is wok-tossed with a medley of colorful bell peppers and onions, then bathed in a fragrant tomato-based sauce. Infused with authentic kadhai spices, this dish delivers a satisfying warmth and a captivating aroma that will leave you wanting more.

name: Kadahi Paneer
description: A vibrant and aromatic North Indian delight. Tender cubes of paneer (Indian cheese) simmered in a rich, intensely flavorful gravy of tomatoes, onions, bell peppers, and a special blend of kadhai spices. Served sizzling hot in a traditional kadhai (wok), this dish is a true taste of India.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Shahi Paneer is a vegetarian Mughlai curry where paneer is cooked in a creamy sauce made with onions, yogurt, nut and seeds.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala is a luxurious North Indian curry featuring tender paneer cubes cooked in a velvety, tomato-cashew based gravy enriched with butter, cream, and fragrant spices.

name: Paneer Lababdar
description: Paneer Lababdar gravy is made from a spiced tomato and cashew paste that is then sautéed with onions, more spices and herbs, has a lovely tang to it and is full of flavor. The addition of sugar and cream give the dish a creamy and faintly sweet taste.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Paneer Bhurji is basically a scrambled and spiced paneer preparation made with onions, tomatoes, herbs and spices. This recipe is a Punjabi style of making this popular and delicious North Indian dish.

name: Paneer Do Pyaza
description: Paneer Do Pyaza is a rich, creamy curry made with soft paneer cubes and a generous amount of onions cooked in two ways – finely chopped and caramelized for depth, and chunky blanched onion petals for crunch and sweetness – made in a medley of spices, herbs, cream and tomatoes.

name: Paneer Tikka Butter Masala
description: Paneer Tikka Masala is a popular Indian curry where cubes of paneer (Indian cottage cheese), onions and peppers are marinated with yogurt and spices, grilled and then tossed in a creamy tomato based curry. This dish goes extremely well with butter naan or paratha or basmati rice.

name: Mix Veg
description: Mixed Veg is something that I often make when hosting dinner at home because it is one sabzi which everyone likes. Made with lots of veggies like cauliflower, beans, carrots this restaurant style mixed recipe is wonderfully spiced and pairs beautifully.

name: Mushroom Mattar
description: made with perfection

name: Mushroom Do Pyaza
description: Mushroom do pyaza recipe is a flavorsome, delightful dish featuring button mushrooms cooked with lightly caramelized onions, tomatoes and ground spices.

name: Mushroom Masala
description: This Mushroom Masala recipe is an easy, delicious Punjabi style one-pot mushroom Curry made with white button mushrooms in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.

name: Malai Kofta(Daana Paani SPL.)
description: Malai Kofta is a delicious dish of fried balls of potato and paneer in a rich and creamy mild gravy made with sweet onions and tomatoes. This melt-in-your-mouth recipe is a labor of love, but one that is well worth it.

name: Paneer Methi Malai
description: Methi Malai Paneer recipe is a restaurant style delicious recipe made with fresh fenugreek leaves (a.k.a methi), onions, tomatoes, cashews, cream and spices. The curry is creamy, mildly sweet with hints of bitterness from fenugreek leaves.

name: Chana Masala
description: Chana masala, also known as chole masala, is a popular chickpea curry from the Indian subcontinent, particularly North India and Pakistan. It's a hearty and flavorful dish, often served with bread like roti, naan, or bhatura.

name: Mattar Paneer
description: Matar Paneer is a classic Punjabi dish consisting of soft paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cubes and green peas (matar) simmered in a rich, spiced tomato-onion-cashew gravy, flavored with fragrant spices and herbs, creating a flavorful and hearty curry best enjoyed with naan, roti, paratha or rice.

name: Jira Aloo
description: Jeera Aloo is a vibrantly spiced North Indian sautéed side dish of boiled potatoes tempered with cumin, ground spices and herbs.

name: Cheese Tomato
description: Cheese and tomato pairings create a delicious contrast between the creamy richness of cheese and the tangy sweetness of tomatoes. This combination is a popular choice for appetizers, sandwiches, and main courses.

name: Veg Gravy
description: A simple yet delicious curry recipe with the goodness of lots of vegetables in it.  This is a Punjabi or North Indian-style Vegetable Curry made with fried mixed vegetables in a luscious creamy spiced onion-tomato gravy.

name: Paneer Pasanda
description: Paneer Pasanda recipe is made with a sweet and spicy filling, stuffed between two pieces of the popular Indian cottage cheese a.k.a paneer, then dipped, fried and served in a lusciously smooth onion-tomato gravy. This delicious dish for your next celebration and witness the power of its excellence.

name: Chana Pindi Masala
description: Pindi Chole also known as Pindi Chana is one of the easiest and tasty chickpea dish that you can make. The recipe comes from the Rawalpindi region in Punjab, Pakistan and hence the name Pindi Chana. A unique recipe that does not have any gravy or sauce and is dry – made with soft, tender white chickpeas, fragrant ginger-garlic, spicy chana masala powder and tangy dry mango powder.

name: Chaap Gravy
description: Soya chaap gravy is a popular Indian vegetarian dish where tender soya chaap chunks are simmered in a rich, flavorful gravy, typically made with onions, tomatoes, ginger-garlic paste, and various spices.

name: Ghar Ka Saag ( Seasonable)
description: Peppery, pungent and deeply nutritious, Punjabi Sarson ka Saag (or Sarson da Saag) is a favorite during the cold North Indian winters, especially when paired with Makki Ki Roti. Once you taste how vibrantly creamy and delicious it is, you won’t mind the work!

name: Plain Roti
description: Plain roti, also known as chapati or phulka, is a traditional Indian unleavened flatbread. It's a simple, essential part of many South Asian meals, made primarily with whole wheat flour, water, and sometimes salt.

name: Butter Roti
description: This simply delicious North Indian Tandoori Roti With crisp edges, a soft interior, and a chewy texture, this whole wheat roti recipe is perfect for serving with any kind of Punjabi food, especially rich curry dishes.

name: Missi Roti
description: Missi Roti are savory and nutty flavored flatbreads made with a mix of whole wheat flour, gram flour and spices. Missi Roti is a North Indian specialty and is often made in various homes in the North Indian belt.

name: Punjabi Missi
description: Punjabi missi  roti. A mix of flours which always features atta and besan but could include an addition of other flours like bajra, jowar or ragi. Though when you use the phrase “ਮਿਸੀ ਰੋਟੀ”, Punjabi for Missi  Roti, it is instantly understood to be made of a dough of two flours: atta + besan seasoned with spices, herbs and aromatics like ginger and garlic.

name: Plain Naan
description: Naan is a soft, leavened flatbread popular in India and Middle Eastern countries. It is made using all-purpose flour as its key ingredient and is leavened using baking powder, baking soda, and yogurt. Naan is traditionally made in a tandoor (clay oven).

name: Butter Naan
description: One of the popular flat breads of Asian origin, is the Naan that is made with a leavened dough. In India, the Butter Naan is another quintessential variant of this particular flatbread, which is primarily cooked in a tandoor.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Garlic Naan bread is Indian leavened flatbread made with all-purpose flour and spiced with garlic. At restaurants, plain naan bread is usually brushed with garlic butter and served. Garlic is a great addition to the naan dough. It gives so much flavor and taste to the otherwise plain yeasted dough.

name: Kashmiri Naan
description: Step into the exotic world of Maharaja The Royal Dining, your go-to Indian restaurant in Bali, Indonesia, where flavors dance and aromas enchant. Our signature dish, the delectable Kashmiri Naan, is a marvel of taste and tradition. Picture this: a warm, fluffy naan bread, lovingly stuffed with a tantalizing blend of glazed cherries, crunchy almonds, and creamy cashews. Each bite is a symphony of sweet and nutty goodness, transporting you straight to the picturesque valleys of Kashmir.

name: Lachha Parantha
description: Lachha paratha or Laccha Paratha is a popular variant of paratha from North Indian cuisine. These are whole wheat flatbreads made with a simple unleavened dough consisting of basic ingredients like whole wheat flour, salt and ghee or oil. The specialty and uniqueness of this paratha are the various visible flaky and crispy layers that are also soft and tender. Making these traditional Indian layered flatbreads is easy and great to mop up with any curry or gravy dish.

name: Pudina Parantha
description: Pudina paratha are crispy, flaky, layered, mint flavored whole wheat flatbreads. ‘Pudina’ is the Hindi word for mint leaves and paratha is an unleavened flatbread made from whole wheat flour. Basically pudina paratha is a Paratha variant with some herby minty flavors together with some fragrant spices.

name: Mirchi Lachha Parantha
description: Ajwain Mirch Paratha is a popular Indian flatbread infused with the robust flavors of carom seeds (ajwain) and green chilies (mirch). The dough is typically made with whole wheat flour, water, salt, and a generous amount of ajwain seeds and finely chopped green chilies. The mixture is kneaded into a smooth dough, divided into portions, rolled out into discs, and then cooked on a hot griddle with a drizzle of oil or ghee until golden brown and crisp. The result is a fragrant, spicy, and utterly delicious flatbread that pairs perfectly with a variety of Indian dishes or can be enjoyed on its own with a dollop of yogurt or pickle.

name: Cheese Naan With Gravy
description: Paneer naan bread is a type of bread made with flour and stuffed with paneer (cottage cheese). It is a flatbread that is baked in the oven. Naan bread often looks like a tear drop but can have different shapes also. It is often covered in herbs and spices to change the taste.Paneer naan bread, sometimes also known as cheese naan, is made from basic bread ingredients like all purpose flour (maida), yeast, salt, and butter or ghee. It also is made with yogurt and milk. The yogurt is what makes naan bread taste so much different than other kinds of bread.

name: Stuffed Naan
description: A delightful Indian Naan that is stuffed with a classic and delectable mixture of Indian paneer, onions and some spices. It can be served as breakfast and also as a main meal.

name: Stuffed Kulcha
description: Stuffed Vegetable Kulcha is a soft and fluffy Indian leavened bread which is made stuffed with seasonal vegetables. It's also a delicious way to feed more vegetables to kids or use up leftover vegetables form the previous meal. They work well with any North indian menu, served with Channa and Raita, or even plain with melted butter for breakfast.

name: Onion Kulcha
description: Onion Kulcha is a delicious Indian flatbread, stuffed with a savory mixture of finely chopped onions, spices, and herbs. The dough is rolled out, filled, and then cooked until golden brown and slightly crispy on the outside. Each bite offers a delightful combination of soft, fluffy bread and flavorful, aromatic filling. Perfect for enjoying with curries, chutneys, or as a standalone snack.

name: Bread Basket
description: a container for bread or a geographical region known for its agricultural productivity, particularly for grains.

name: Peas Pulao
description: Peas pulao, also known as matar pulao, is a popular Indian rice dish that features green peas, aromatic spices, and basmati rice. It's a flavorful, vegetarian dish that can be enjoyed as a main course or side dish.

name: Veg Pulao
description: Veg Pulav is also called as Vegetable Pulao, Pilaf is an assortment of veggies in fluffy rice & garnished with nuts & herbs. Vegetable Pulav can be tried with lot of variations by adding different vegetables, whole spices and can be made spicy or mild.

name: Zira Rice
description: Jeera rice, also known as cumin rice, is a flavorful and aromatic Indian rice dish. It's a simple dish made by cooking rice with cumin seeds, often along with other spices like bay leaf, cardamom, and cloves.

name: Steamed Rice
description: Steamed rice, or parboiled rice, is a type of rice that is cooked before milling, resulting in a rice grain with higher nutrient retention and a slightly firmer texture compared to raw rice.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Vegetable biryani is a fragrant rice dish made with basmati rice, vegetables, herbs, and biryani spices. If made by layering and cooking on dum, veg biryani is good. The vegetables and spices combine to create a medley of flavours and aromas that will tantalise your taste buds just as much as a biryani

name: Triple Fried Rice
description: Triple Fried Rice is a popular Indo-Chinese dish that combines fried rice, noodles (often Hakka noodles), and a spicy, flavorful gravy (often Schezwan or Manchurian) into a single, complete meal.

name: Gobi Parantha

name: Veg Sandwich
description: A vegetarian sandwich consisting of a filling of vegetables between two slices of bread, often toasted.

description: Good in taste

name: Cheese Grilled Sandwich (4Pc)
description: A Veg Cheese Grilled Sandwich is a savory, hot sandwich made with bread, vegetables, cheese, and often chutney or other condiments, all grilled to perfection.

description: 2 Bhature+channa Masala+Mix-Veg+Pickle+curd+Salad

name: Green Salad
description: A green salad, or green leaf salad, another name for garden salad, is most often composed of leafy vegetables such as lettuce varieties, spinach, or rocket (arugula). If non-greens make up a large portion of the salad it may instead be called a vegetable salad. Common raw vegetables (in the culinary sense) used in a salad include

name: Onion Salad
description: An Onion Salad or the beloved ‘Laccha Pyaaz’ is the mother of all salads for us Indians! Be it any restaurant, dhaba (a roadside eatery), a quaint little food stall on the streets or even at home, whenever there’s a robust Indian meal of rich curries, breads and/or rice, the Pyaaz ke Lachche or Onion Salad.  Make it with red, white or sweet onions, the choice is yours.

name: Russian Salad
description: Russian salad, also known as Olivier salad, is a popular dish consisting of diced vegetables, typically including potatoes, carrots, and peas, mixed with mayonnaise. It's a versatile salad that can be enjoyed as a side dish or a light meal.

name: Cream Kachumber
description:
Kachumber is a super easy, simple, zesty, fresh and colorful Indian salad containing a mix of onions, tomatoes, cucumber, cilantro or mint, green chillies and a few spices brought together with a tangy lemon juice.

One of the great joys of kachumber is that it is made without any dressing and there is no oil or fat included in this salad. The seasonings, herbs and spices are simply mixed with the veggies.

name: Bar Salad
description: A salad bar is a buffet-style table or bar where customers can create their own salad plates from individual salad ingredients or completed dishes.[1] Salad bars are commonly found in restaurants, food markets, and school or college cafeterias. Salad bars are a popular dining option in many countries around the world, but they are applied in different ways depending on the local culture and cuisine.

name: Plain Curd
description: Plain curd, also known as dahi in Indian English, is a fermented dairy product, typically made from milk and a natural culture (usually a small amount of previously set curd). It's characterized by a thick, creamy texture and a tangy, slightly sour taste.

name: Mix Raita
description:
Vegetable Raita is simply raita made with various mix vegetables. The vegetables can be raw or cooked. I make it with vegetables that can be eaten raw like carrots, bell pepper, cucumber and tomatoes.

Some of the commonly used seasonings and spices in a raita are roasted cumin powder, black pepper powder, red chili powder/cayenne pepper, chaat masala, green chilies, mint, ginger, garlic, etc.

name: Boondi Raita
description: Boondi Raita is a popular Indian side dish made with yogurt, spices and boondi (fried balls made from besan aka gram flour). This raita is commonly served as an accompaniment to Indian meals along with rice, curries, roti. It’s also great with biryani or pulao.

name: Pineapple Raita
description: Pineapple Raita is a refreshing and flavorful Indian yogurt side dish that is made with fresh pineapple, yogurt, cucumber, and spices. The dish is simple to make and can be enjoyed on its own or as part of a meal. The pineapple in the raita gives it a sweet and tart flavor that is balanced out by the yogurt and cucumber. The spices add a touch of heat and depth of flavor. Pineapple Raita is a popular dish in India and is often served as an accompaniment to curries, grilled meats, or as a snack.

name: Potato Raita
description: Aloo Raita (Potato Raita, Aloo Ka Raita) is a refreshing Indian accompaniment made using plain yogurt, cooked potatoes, and mild Indian herbs and spices. Boiled potatoes pair very well with yogurt and spices, making this dish very delicious.

name: Aloo Boondi Mix Raita
description:
Aloo Boondi Raita is mixture of steamed potatos and 
boondi. it made with fresh curd as well as some speices steamed aloo nd boondi also its taste is amazing.

name: Hot & Sour
description: Hot and sour soup is a popular example of Chinese cuisine. Although it is often said to have originated in Sichuan, this is actually a variant of hulatang or "pepper hot soup with added vinegar to enhance the sourness. This variation is found Henan cuisine Also popular in Southeast Asia, India.

name: Manchow Soup
description: Manchow soup is a popular Indo-Chinese soup characterized by its hot, spicy, and savory flavor profile. It's a dark brown soup, typically vegetarian, made with a variety of vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, chili peppers, and a thickening agent like cornstarch. The soup is often served with crispy fried noodles for a satisfying and flavorful experience

name: Cream Of Veg Soup
description: "Cream of veg soup," or a vegetable cream soup, is a type of soup that typically involves pureeing vegetables and then adding cream or milk to create a smooth, rich texture. The basic ingredients usually include a base like onion, celery, and butter, along with flour, spices, and a liquid like vegetable stock.

name: Veg Clear Soup
description:
This simple, soul-satisfying soup is a flavorful appetizer or side that is usually served with American, French or Italian cuisine.

There are many variations to a Clear Soup Recipe. This is a gluten-free soup, which has cabbage, carrot, capsicum and French beans.

name: Tomato Soup
description: Tomato soup is a flavorful and comforting soup primarily made from tomatoes, often with added ingredients like onions, garlic, and broth. It can be served hot or cold and is a popular choice for its sweet and tangy taste.

name: Veg Sweet Corn
description:
Sweet Corn Soup consists of veggies and spices stewed together to create a heavenly delicacy. The soup is thick in consistency, but it is not smooth and creamy as the other soups.

It has a distinctive chunky texture that comes from soft veggies. Carrots, cabbage, and scallions are majorly used to make this classic recipe, but you may also add other veggies.

name: Cream Of Mushroom
description: Cream of mushroom soup is a simple type of soup where a basic roux is thinned with cream or milk and then mushrooms or mushroom broth are added.Cream of mushroom soup is often used as a base ingredient in casseroles and comfort foods. This use is similar to that of a mushroom-flavored gravy.

name: Lemon Coriander Soup
description: Lemon coriander soup is a clear, tangy, and herbal soup often described as a warming and healthy dish, particularly during the winter months. It's known for its combination of lemon, coriander (cilantro), and various vegetables. The soup is a popular home remedy for coughs and is believed to boost the immune system due to its vitamin C content.

name: Soup Half
description: Soup is a liquid or semi-liquid food, generally served warm or hot, made by cooking ingredients like vegetables. It can be clear (like broth or bouillon) or thick (like cream soups or pureed soups). Soups are a versatile dish, suitable for various cuisines and can be enjoyed as a main course, appetizer, or side dish.

name: Chicken Tikka
description: Chicken tikka is a popular Indian and Pakistani dish consisting of boneless chicken pieces marinated in yogurt and spices, then grilled or baked until tender and flavorful. The word "tikka" translates to "bits" or "pieces" and refers to the small, cut-up chicken pieces. It's often served with a side of chutney or used as a base for dishes like Chicken Tikka Masala

name: Chicken Cheese Malai Tikka
description: Malai chicken cheese tikka is a variation of chicken tikka where the chicken is marinated in a cream-yogurt-spice mix, and then grilled or baked, with the added flavor of cheese. It's essentially a flavorful, tender, boneless version of tandoori chicken with a creamy, cheesy twist.

name: Chicken Irani Tikka ( Boneless)
description: Chicken Tikka, or Irani Tikka, is a popular Indian dish consisting of boneless chicken pieces marinated in a blend of spices and yogurt, then cooked on skewers, typically in a tandoor oven. It's essentially a boneless version of tandoori chicken. The term "tikka" refers to small, bite-sized pieces of meat.

name: Chicken Malai Tikka
description: Chicken Malai Tikka is a popular Indian dish featuring boneless chicken pieces marinated in a creamy, yogurt-based marinade, then cooked in a tandoor or oven. It's similar to Chicken Tikka, but with a creamier, milder flavor profile, often incorporating cheese and spices like ginger, garlic, and green chilies.

name: Pahadi Chicken
description: Chicken Pahadi Tikka, also known as Hariyali Chicken Tikka, is a popular North Indian appetizer featuring boneless chicken marinated in a green herb paste and yogurt, then cooked on skewers over a grill or in a tandoor.

name: Chicken Achari Tikka
description: Achari chicken tikka is a flavorful Indian dish featuring boneless chicken pieces marinated in a tangy, spicy achari (pickled) spice blend, then roasted or grilled until tender. This combination of flavors results in a dish that is both spicy and savory, offering a unique take on traditional chicken tikka.

name: Chicken Seekh Kabab
description: Chicken Seekh Kebab is a popular dish in the Indian subcontinent, particularly in cities like Delhi, Kolkata, and Hyderabad. It's made by grilling spiced, minced chicken on skewers, often cooked in a mangal (barbecue), or a tandoor.

name: Chicken Reshmi Kabab
description: Chicken reshmi kebab is a popular Indian and Pakistani dish, often considered a Mughlai delicacy. It's characterized by its tender, silky texture, and creamy, flavorful marinade. The chicken is marinated in a mixture of yogurt, cream, cashew paste, and spices, then grilled or baked until cooked through.

name: Tangri Kabab 4 Pc
description: Tangdi kebab, a popular snack from the Indian subcontinent, features chicken drumsticks marinated in yogurt and spices and then cooked in a tandoor. The marinade typically includes freshly ground spices, and the chicken is marinated for at least 12 hours. The dish is often enjoyed as a snack and is a staple in tandoori cuisine.

name: Non Veg Platter
description: A non-vegetarian platter is a collection of meat-based dishes served on a single platter. It can include various types of meat, such as poultry, seafood, or red meat, and is a common offering in Indian restaurants and dining settings where meat is consumed.

name: Channa Samosa
description: Channa samosa is a popular Indian snack where crispy, golden samosas are filled with a flavorful mixture of spiced chickpeas (chana).

name: Channa Kachori
description: It's a deep-fried pastry filled with a spiced chickpea curry, often served with chutneys and yogurt

name: Aloo Piyaz Kachori

It's typically served with a tomato sauce, melted mozzarella cheese, and other vegetables like capsicum. The Peri Peri seasoning adds a spicy, chili-forward flavor profile to the pizza, while the paneer provides a mild, fresh cheese taste. The pizza is often made on an Italian sourdough base.

The peri-peri sauce, made from African bird's eye chili, adds a distinct spicy flavor.

These patties can be made from various ingredients like beans (soybeans and tofu), nuts, grains, seeds, or fungi, and are typically grilled or fried. The burger is usually served on a bun with lettuce, tomato, onions, and various condiments like ketchup and mustard.

The patty would be placed inside a bun with various toppings and condiments, similar to a standard burger but without meat.

The paneer patty can be flavored with various spices and herbs before being grilled or fried. It's typically served on a bun with toppings like lettuce, tomato, onion, and a sauce.

Chicken tikka is essentially boneless chicken marinated in yogurt and spices and cooked on a skewer, creating a smoky, tender flavor. The burger is a fusion dish, combining the classic burger format with the bold flavors of Indian cuisine.

It typically consists of boneless, spiced chicken pieces, often baked or grilled, wrapped in a tortilla or pita bread, along with fresh vegetables like lettuce, tomato, and cucumber, and potentially sauces like yogurt or chutney.

It's essentially a vegetarian version of a sandwich or wrap, offering a healthy and convenient meal option.

description: A Peri Peri wrap is a type of sandwich or wrap that uses peri-peri sauce, a spicy sauce originating from Portuguese-African culinary traditions, especially in Mozambique and Angola. The sauce is typically made with African bird's eye chili peppers, along with other ingredients like lemon, garlic, and paprika. The wrap itself usually features a filling of marinated chicken, and sometimes other ingredients like vegetables, cheese, and various sauces.

name: Paneer Tikka Wrap
description: A Paneer Tikka Wrap is a dish where Paneer Tikka, which is Indian cheese marinated in spices and grilled, is wrapped in a flatbread or paratha. It's a popular vegetarian option that offers a flavorful and satisfying meal, similar to a kati roll or a burrito.

name: Tooti Fruity
description: It is a popular ice cream flavour in many Western countries. Fruits used for tutti frutti ice cream include cherries, watermelon, raisins, and pineapple, often augmented with nuts.[1]

name: Butter Scotch
description: Indian Butterscotch Ice CreamButterscotch ice cream is a frozen dessert with a creamy texture and a sweet, buttery flavor derived from butterscotch candy. It is made by combining brown sugar, butter, and cream, and can include additional ingredients like corn syrup, vanilla, and salt. Butterscotch ice cream can also incorporate bits of butterscotch candy for added texture and flavor.

name: Chocolate
description: Chocolate ice cream is a popular frozen dessert characterized by its rich chocolate flavor and brown color. It's typically made by blending cocoa powder, cream, milk, sugar, and other ingredients used in vanilla ice cream. Some recipes may also incorporate chocolate liquor or chocolate syrup.

name: Venilla
description: Vanilla ice cream is a frozen dessert, typically made with cream, sugar, and vanilla flavoring. It's a popular flavor worldwide, often considered a "plain" or "default" option for many. The flavor can be made with different types of vanilla, with North American and European preferences leaning towards a more prominent, smoky taste, while Ireland tends to favor an anise-like flavor,

name: Strawberry
description: Strawberry ice cream is a popular frozen dessert flavor made by incorporating strawberries or strawberry flavoring into a cream-based ice cream mixture. It's typically a pink or light red color and is one of the three flavors in Neapolitan ice cream, along with vanilla and chocolate. Strawberry ice cream has been enjoyed since at least 1813, and variations include strawberry cheesecake and strawberry ripple ice cream.

name: Stick Kulfi
description: Stick kulfi, also known as kulfi bar, is a traditional Indian frozen dessert that is similar to ice cream but with a thicker, creamier texture. It's made from milk, sugar, and flavorings, and is typically sold on a stick. Unlike modern ice cream, kulfi is not whipped, resulting in a dense, un-churned texture.

name: Gulab Jamun (2PC)
description: Gulab jamun is a popular milk-based sweet from the Indian subcontinent, typically described as fried dough balls soaked in a sweet, rose-flavored syrup. The name "gulab" refers to rose water, and "jamun" refers to a similar-looking Indian fruit, Syzygium jambolanum. These balls are made from milk solids, flour, and sometimes other ingredients like baking soda and cardamom, and then fried until golden brown.

name: Banana Shake
description: A banana shake, also known as a banana milkshake or banana smoothie, is a sweet, cold beverage made by blending ripe bananas with milk, and sometimes ice cream, flavorings, or sweeteners. It's a popular drink enjoyed as a breakfast or snack, offering a creamy and nutritious option.

name: Mango Smoothie
description: A mango shake, also known as a mango milkshake, is a refreshing drink made by blending ripe mangoes with milk and sugar. It's a popular summer beverage enjoyed in many parts of the world. The basic recipe involves combining chopped mango pieces, milk, and sugar in a blender until smooth and creamy. Variations can include adding ice cream, nuts, or flavorings like cardamom or saffron.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla milkshake is a sweet, cold, blended beverage made with milk, vanilla ice cream, and sometimes a vanilla flavoring or sweetener, creating a creamy, vanilla-flavored shake. It is a popular treat, often served in tall glasses and enjoyed with a straw.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry milkshake is a sweet, cold, blended beverage made with strawberries, milk, and often ice cream, sometimes with additional flavorings or sweeteners. It's a popular dessert or refreshing treat, known for its creamy texture and fruity taste.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: A butterscotch shake is a sweet, creamy beverage with a rich, caramel-like flavor, typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and butterscotch syrup or pieces. The key flavor comes from the deep, sweet taste of butterscotch, which is achieved through the use of brown sugar and butter (and sometimes corn syrup). The name "butterscotch" is thought to have origins in the 19th century in England, where it was first used to describe a hard candy made from brown sugar, butter, and cream

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate milkshake is a cold, sweet drink made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate flavoring, usually chocolate syrup or cocoa powder. It's a popular dessert drink that can be enjoyed for its rich chocolate flavor and creamy texture.

name: Oreo Milk Shake
description: An Oreo milkshake is a popular dessert beverage that combines the classic flavors of Oreos with milk and ice cream, often resulting in a creamy, chocolatey, and satisfying treat. It is a variation of a traditional milkshake, where the primary flavor and texture come from crushed Oreo cookies mixed into the beverage.

name: Kitkat Shake
description: A Kit Kat shake is a milkshake featuring the crushed Kit Kat chocolate bar for added flavor and texture. It combines the creamy smoothness of milk and ice cream with the crispy, chocolate-coated wafers of the Kit Kat, creating a drink that is both indulgent and satisfying.

name: Mattar Pulao
description: Peas Pulao also known as Matar Pulao is a classic Indian rice pilaf made with basmati rice, whole spices, herbs and of course green peas as they are the star of this dish. “Matar” is the Hindi word for “green peas” and Pulao is a word for pilaf

name: Mushroom Fried Rice
description: Mushroom fried rice is a flavorful dish featuring cooked rice stir-fried with various types of mushrooms, often including shiitake, button, and oyster mushrooms.

name: Cheese Fried Rice
description: Cheese fried rice is a savory and satisfying dish that combines the familiar flavors of fried rice with the cheesy goodness of melted cheese.

name: Garlic Fried Rice
description: Garlic fried rice, also known as "Sinangag" in the Philippines, is a flavorful and simple dish made by stir-frying pre-cooked rice with garlic.

name: Mix Fried Rice
description: Mixed fried rice is a dish where cooked rice is stir-fried with a variety of ingredients, including vegetables.

name: Manchurian Fried Rice
description: Fried rice is a dish of cooked rice that has been stir-fried in a wok or a frying pan and is usually mixed with other ingredients such vegetables and mushrooms.

name: Mango Crush
description: Mango crush is a popular beverage made from mango pulp, often used as a base for making milkshakes, desserts, or as a topping for ice cream and other treats.

name: Banana Shake
description: A banana shake is a popular beverage made by blending bananas with milk and sometimes other ingredients like ice cream, flavorings, or sweeteners, creating a smooth, creamy, and refreshing drink.

name: Strawberry Crush
description: Strawberries are bright red, heart-shaped fruits that are both sweet and juicy, making them a popular food and a botanical curiosity. They are often eaten fresh, used in desserts, or made into jams

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee is a refreshing beverage typically made by brewing coffee, chilling it, and serving it over ice or with cold milk.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: Chocolate Milkshake is made by blending milk, frozen milk, sugar, vanilla essence and chocolate syrup then garnished with chocolate syrup / shavings / sprinkles.

name: Butterscotch Crush
description: Butterscotch Milkshake is a flavourful, wonderful drink made by blending milk, butterscotch flavours & ice cream (optional) and served chilled.

name: Black Current Crush
description: Blackcurrant crush is a sweet and tangy beverage concentrate made from black currants, often used to create refreshing drinks like milkshakes, smoothies, and mocktails.

name: Milk Badam [Seasonal]
description: Badam milk, also known as almond milk, is a popular plant-based milk made from almonds. It's a creamy, nutty-flavored beverage that's often consumed by those who are lactose intolerant or vegan.

name: Spl. Hot Gulab Jamun
description: Gulab jamun is an Indian dessert of fried dough balls that are soaked in a sweet, sticky sugar syrup.

name: Hot Gulab Jamun
description: Gulab jamun are small, golden brown, fried dough balls made from milk solids (khoya) or a combination of milk, flour, and sometimes semolina, then soaked in a sweet, rose-flavored sugar syrup.

name: Spongy Rasgulla
description: To make rasgulla always use fresh full fat milk or whole milk. Avoid using milk in tetra packs, skimmed milk or low fat milk as it affects the spongy texture of the rasgullas.

name: Lachha Kulfi+Rabri [Seasonal]
description: Lachha Rabdi (Rabri) is a popular North Indian dessert made by reducing milk and flavoring it with saffron, and cardamom

name: Ras Malai
description: Ras malai is a popular Indian dessert consisting of soft, spongy cottage cheese balls (rasgullas) soaked in a rich, creamy, and sweet milk syrup flavored with cardamom and saffron.

name: Rasgulla [Per Plate]
description: Rasgulla, often called "syrup-filled ball" in English, is a popular Indian dessert consisting of small, spongy, syrupy balls made from chhena (cottage cheese) and semolina.

name: Gulab Jamun [Per Plate]
description: Gulab jamun is a popular Indian dessert consisting of small, fried dough balls soaked in a sweet, flavored sugar syrup.

name: Cham Cham [Per Plate]
description: Cham cham, Chomchom or chum chum (Bengali: চমচম) is a traditional Bengali sweet, popular throughout the Indian subcontinent.

name: Burfi [Per Plate]
description: Barfi or burfi is a milk-based sweet from the Indian subcontinent with a fudge-like consistency.

name: Gajar Pak [Per Plate]
description: Gajar ka halwa, also known as gajorer halwa, gajarno halwo, gajrela, gajar pak, and carrot pudding, is a sweet Indian dessert made by placing grated carrots in a pot containing a specific amount of water, milk, sugar, and cardamom and then cooking with ghee while stirring regularly.

name: Paneer Pakora [Per Plate]
description: Paneer Pakora are a delicious Indian snack made with paneer, spices & gram flour. Pakora are much loved by most Indian especially during the monsoons and winters.

name: Mix Pakora [Per Plate]
description: Mixed Vegetable pakora are veggie fritters made in South Indian style.

name: Bread Pakora
description: In English, "bread pakora" can be called bread fritters. It's a fried snack made with bread slices, gram flour, and spices, similar to other types of pakoras (fritters).

name: Crispy Veg Burger
description: A veggie burger or meatless burger is a hamburger made with a patty that does not contain meat, or the patty of such a hamburger

name: Noodles Combo
description: Veg Noodles Recipe (Vegetable Noodles) - Swasthi's RecipesA noodles combo typically offers a variety of noodles, often in different flavors or types, in a single package for convenience.

name: Manchurian Combo
description: Manchurian Gravy+Cheese Chilli+Fried Rice

name: Deluxe Thali
description:
A Deluxe Thali is a larger, more substantial version of the traditional Indian Thali, featuring a wider variety of dishes and often including a more elaborate presentation.[Dal Makhni+Kadai Paneer+Mix Veg+Salad+Pickle+Rice+Curd+2 Butter naan/3Roti/2Punjabi Missi+Gulab 
Jamun

name: Simple Thali
description: A simple Indian thali is a complete, balanced meal served on a single plate. It typically includes a main dish (like dal or curry), a vegetable dish (sabzi), rice or roti, and various accompaniments like yogurt, pickles, and possibly a dessert.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a widely enjoyed beverage made by brewing roasted and ground coffee beans with hot water. It's a popular choice for its invigorating aroma and taste, often enjoyed black or with additions like milk, sugar, or cream.

name: Veg.Gravy
description: Veg gravy, or vegetarian gravy, is a savory sauce made from vegetables, often with a combination of spices and herbs.

name: Aloo Jeera
description: Jeera Aloo is a typical vegetarian Indian dish which is often served as a side dish and normally goes well with hot puris, chapatti, roti or dal.

name: Dal Fry Yellow
description: In English, "yellow daal" is most commonly referred to as yellow lentils or split yellow lentils.

name: Dum Aloo
description: The word dum translates to as steam-cooked or slow-cooked, while aloo means potato.

name: Dal Tadka Black
description: Black Gram, also known as "Urad Dal," are pulses that, although commonly called lentils, are actually related to cowpeas and mung beans.

name: Dal Tadka Yellow
description: It's comfort food for most people. You pressure cook you lentils and flavour it with curry leaves, green chili, spices like red chili powder, tumeric and coriander powder.

name: Dal Handi
description: Dal Handi refers to a dish in North Indian cuisine where lentils (dal) are cooked slowly in a special clay pot called a Handi.

name: Dal Makhni
description: Dal makhani is a rich and creamy North Indian lentil dish, typically made with black lentils (whole urad dal) and kidney beans, slow-cooked in a butter-based gravy.

name: Veg.Kohlapuri
description: The veg kolhapuri masala is very uniquie in the region of Kolhapur. It's main have red chillies, coriander powder, black pepper, cardamom, cumin, star anise, fennel seeds, bay leaf.

name: Kashmiri Aloo
description: Kashmiri dum aloo is one of the most widely preferred north Indian curries. Baby potatoes are deep fried and then cooked in delicious gravy of curd and lots of spices like kashmiri red chillies, fennel powder, cardamom powder, cumin-coriander powder, ginger, garlic etc.

name: Mix.Veg
description: ixed vegetables refer to ready to use combination of cut vegetables. The vegetables may be chopped, sliced, cubed or in juliennes. The typical vegetables included in mixed vegetable are cauliflower, carrots, cabbage, French beans and peas.

name: Channa Masala
description: Chana masala, a popular Indian curry, is a dish made with chickpeas, tomatoes, onions, and a blend of spices. The name "chana masala" translates to "spiced chickpeas". It's a flavorful and protein-rich dish, often enjoyed with flatbreads like bhatura or roti.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Palak paneer is a classic curried dish from North Indian cuisine made with fresh spinach, onions, spices, paneer and herbs.

name: Palak Kofta
description: Koftas are Indian spiced meatballs often made with lamb. This is our delicious vegetarian version made with spinach, paneer, herbs and spices.

name: Mattar Paneer
description: Matar paneer translates to peas and Indian cheese in English. It's a popular North Indian dish made with peas and paneer (a type of Indian cottage cheese) cooked in a flavorful tomato-based sauce.

name: Spl.Vicky Dal
description: In Indian cuisine, dal (also spelled daal or dhal pronunciation: [d̪aːl]), parippu, pappu, or paruppu are dried, split pulses (e.g., lentils, peas, and beans) that do not require soaking before cooking.

name: Kadai Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer (or known as Kadhai Paneer) is an Indian dish made by cooking paneer and bell peppers in a fragrant, freshly ground spice powder.

name: Palak corn masala
description: Palak Corn Masala is a popular Indian side dish featuring a blend of spinach (palak) and corn kernels cooked in a flavorful gravy with spices and herbs.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Paneer Bhurji is spiced scrambled paneer, cooked in North Indian Style. It is a dish where a spicy onion tomato masala is made first and then soft crumbled paneer is added to it.

name: Mushroom Mattar
description: Matar Mushroom is a one pot curried side dish made with mushrooms, green peas, onions, tomatoes, spices and herbs.

name: Navrattan Korma
description: Navratan Korma, which translates to “nine gems curry,” is a dish that truly embodies the richness and diversity of Indian cuisine. The blend of vegetables, nuts, and paneer in a creamy, fragrant gravy makes it a royal treat.

name: Paneer Kohlapuri
description: Paneer Kolhapuri is a spicy and flavorful paneer (Indian cheese) curry dish from the Kolhapur region of Maharashtra, India.

name: Paneer Methi Malai
description: Methi Paneer is an Indian dish where paneer is cooked in a flavorful curry consisting of fenugreek leaves. Methi is an Indian word for “fenugreek” and paneer is “Indian cottage cheese”.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala is a rich, creamy, and flavorful curry made with paneer (Indian cheese), a creamy tomato-based sauce, and butter.

name: Paneer Do Pyaza
description: No, Paneer Do Pyaza is not typically considered a sweet dish. While the dish does feature caramelized onions, which can develop a subtle sweetness, the overall flavor is primarily savory, with a balance of sweet, spicy, and tangy notes.

name: Tawa Paneer
description: Tawa Paneer is a spicy semi-dry paneer dish which is made on a flat griddle (tawa), hence the name tawa paneer.It has small cubes of paneer cooked with onions, tomatoes and lots of spices. Makes a great accompaniment to naan and paratha.

name: Mushroom Do Pyaza
description: Mushroom Do Pyaza is a flavorful, delicious semi-gravy made by cooking mushrooms in onion tomato based curry. Mushroom Do Pyaza is nothing but mushrooms with double the amount of onions.

name: Mushroom Masala
description: Mushroom Matar Masala | Mutter MushroomMushroom masala is a flavorful Indian curry dish featuring button mushrooms cooked in a rich, aromatic gravy.

name: Kali Mirch Paneer
description: This Paneer Kalimirch Recipe is a delicious, creamy paneer dish flavoured with black pepper and lots of garlic.

name: Mattar Methi Malai
description: Methi Matar Malai is fenugreek leaves and peas, cooked in a fragrant and creamy gravy.

name: Paneer Makhani
description: Paneer makhani, also known as paneer butter masala, primarily requires paneer (Indian cottage cheese), tomatoes, butter, cream, and various spices. Other key ingredients include onion, ginger, garlic, cashew nuts, and spices like red chili powder, garam masala, and fenugreek leaves.

name: Cheese Tomato
description: Cheesy Tomato GratinCheese and tomato is a classic food pairing, often described as a simple yet satisfying combination of creamy, salty cheese and juicy, tart tomatoes

name: Hyderabadi paneer
description: Paneer Hyderabadi is a delicious Indian dish that combines the rich flavours of Hyderabadi cuisine with the creamy goodness of paneer & aromatic spices.

name: Paneer Tikka Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala is a rich and creamy curry featuring soft paneer cubes in a velvety tomato-butter gravy

name: Paneer Pasanda
description: It is a Mughlai curry which is loved by everyone and called the king because of the stuffing inside the paneer.

name: Paneer Begam Bahar
description: Paneer Begum Bahar is a popular Punjabi dish featuring paneer (Indian cottage cheese), vegetables, nuts, and spices, often cooked in a rich gravy.

name: Paneer Labadar
description: Paneer Lababdar is a luscious North Indian curry in which paneer cubes and grated paneer are simmered in a rich and creamy onion-tomato gravy.

name: Shahi Paneer [Sweet]
description: As the name says, Shahi Paneer literally means “Paneer for the Royalty”. So it is cooked with ingredients that impart a richness to the dish like ghee, yogurt, cream, nuts and seeds. This is one of the few vegetarian dishes you'll find only in the restaurants serving traditional Mughlai foods.

name: Shahi Paneer [Spicy]
description: As the name says, Shahi Paneer literally means “Paneer for the Royalty”. So it is cooked with ingredients that impart a richness to the dish like ghee, yogurt, cream, nuts and seeds. This is one of the few vegetarian dishes you'll find only in the restaurants serving traditional Mughlai foods.

name: Malai Kofta [Sweet]
description: Fried balls of potato, cheese, and mixed veggies covered in a creamy sauce of blended nuts, chopped onions, tomatoes, and fragrant spices.

name: Malai Kofta [Spicy]
description: Fried balls of potato, cheese, and mixed veggies covered in a creamy sauce of blended nuts, chopped onions, tomatoes, and fragrant spices.

name: Water Bottle
description: Basic Need Of Body

name: Tea
description: Tea is a widely enjoyed beverage made by steeping the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant in hot water.

name: Lime Soda
description: Lime soda is a refreshing, fizzy beverage made with lime juice, soda water, and sometimes sugar or sweeteners.

name: Lassi Sweet/Salted
description: Lassi is a popular yogurt-based drink from the Indian subcontinent, traditionally made with yogurt, water, and sometimes spices or fruits.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee is a refreshing beverage made by combining coffee, milk, sugar, and ice.

name: Cold Coffee [With Ice Cream]
description: Cold Coffee Recipe – 2 Ways - Cold Coffee With Ice CreamA cold coffee with ice cream is a chilled beverage made with coffee, sugar, milk (or water), and ice cream, often blended or stirred to create a creamy, refreshing drink.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: Chocolate Milkshake is made by blending milk, frozen milk, sugar, vanilla essence and chocolate syrup then garnished with chocolate syrup / shavings / sprinkles.

name: Butterscotch Shake
description: Butterscotch Milkshake is a flavourful, wonderful drink made by blending milk, butterscotch flavours & ice cream (optional) and served chilled.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: The taste of a strawberry milkshake is sweet and satisfying. They're perfect for a delightful treat, or any time you're craving something sweet and creamy. The strawberry milkshake combines the sweet flavour of strawberries with milk and ice cream for a deliciously decadent beverage that packs a sweet pick-me-up.

name: Oreo Shake
description: softened vanilla ice cream, milk, and chopped Oreo cookies.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: vanilla ice cream, milk, and vanilla extract or vanilla bean paste.

name: Banana Shake
description: A banana shake is a popular beverage made by blending bananas with milk and sometimes other ingredients like ice cream, flavorings, or sweeteners, creating a smooth, creamy, and refreshing drink.

name: Mango Shake [Seasonal]
description: A mango shake, also known as a mango milkshake, is a refreshing and popular beverage made by blending ripe mangoes with milk, often including sugar or honey for sweetness.

name: Veg.Pizza
description: It's fresh and full of flavor, featuring cherry tomatoes, artichoke, bell pepper, olives, red onion and some hidden (and optional) baby spinach.

name: Cheese Pizza
description: A cheese pizza is a popular type of pizza typically featuring a crust topped with tomato sauce and various cheeses.

name: Corn Pizza
description: Corn pizza is a pizza topping that uses corn kernels, often sweet corn, as a main ingredient.

name: Paneer Corn Pizza
description: The marinated paneer cubes with diced onions and capsicum is placed on pizza. once the paneer cubes are added, pizza base is topped with generous amount of mozzarella cheese and paneer pizza is ready.

name: Fish Tikka
description: Fish tikka is a popular Indian dish where boneless fish pieces are marinated in a spiced yogurt mixture and then grilled, traditionally in a tandoor oven. The dish is known for its smoky flavor and tender fish.

name: Fish Tikka Achaari
description: Achari Fish Tikka is a Hyderabadi non-vegetarian dish, meaning "pickle fish tikka" in Hindi. It's essentially boneless fish pieces marinated in a spicy achari (pickle) masala and yogurt, then grilled in a tandoor or oven. This dish combines the flavors of a traditional tikka with the tangy and spicy notes of Indian pickles.

name: Fish Tikka Haryali
description: Hariyali Fish Tikka is a modified version of the classic Fish Tikka, characterized by its vibrant green color and fresh, herb-infused flavor. It involves marinating fish pieces in a blend of green spices, herbs, and yogurt, then grilling them until golden brown and tender. The "hariyali" (green) part refers to the use of green ingredients like mint, cilantro, and green chilies in the marinade, which give it a distinct flavor and color.

name: Dry Manchurian
description: Dry Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese appetizer featuring crispy fried vegetable balls tossed in a relatively dry, sweet, and spicy sauce, often served as a snack or starter.

name: Fish Tikka Afghani
description: Afghani Fish Tikka is a flavorful dish where firm fish is marinated in a yogurt-based spice mixture, then grilled or baked. The resulting dish is tender, succulent, and boasts a blend of aromatic and savory flavors.

name: Fish Amritsari
description: Amritsari fish is a popular Indian street food and restaurant appetizer, originating from Amritsar, Punjab. It's a deep-fried fish dish marinated in a mix of spices and gram flour, known for its crispy texture and flavorful taste. The fish is often served with green chutney and lemon wedges

name: Gravy Manchurian
description: Manchurian gravy is a thick, flavorful sauce typically served with deep-fried vegetable balls,

name: Fish Fried
description: Fried fish, a global culinary staple, refers to any fish or shellfish cooked by frying, often after being battered or breaded. The fish is typically fried in oil until golden brown and crispy.

name: Fish Curry
description: Fish curry refers to a variety of curries with fish as a main ingredient, and there are many regional variations. Some examples include Malabar fish curry (Kerala), Fish head curry (Singapore), and Machher Jhol (Bengali/Oriya). These curries often feature a mix of spices, vegetables, and sometimes coconut milk, and are typically served with rice.

name: Veg Noodles
description: Noodles are a type of food made from unleavened dough, typically rolled, cut, or extruded into long strips or strings.

name: Fish Finger
description: Fish fingers, also known as fish sticks in American English, are a processed food made from battered or breaded whitefish or pinkfish, such as cod, hake, or salmon, formed into a rectangular shape. They are commonly found frozen in supermarkets and can be baked, grilled, shallow fried, or deep-fried.

name: Cheese Noodles
description: Cheese noodles refer to dishes that incorporate noodles with cheese in some form, whether as a sauce, topping, or ingredient.

name: Veg Hakka Noodles
description: Vegetables: Cabbage, French beans, bell peppers, carrots, scallions/ spring onions, regular onions are most commonly used for this recipe.

name: Grill Fish ( Chef spl )
description: Grilled fish refers to fish cooked over direct heat, such as on a grill or barbecue. This method is common for various fish species, including sea bass, sea bream, and fish fillets. Grilling can be done on its own or with other foods, and the resulting dish can be part of a larger meal.

name: Cheese Chilly Gravy
description: Chilli Cheese Gravy is a popular dish where Indian cottage cheese (paneer) is cooked in a spicy, savory, and slightly sweet sauce.

name: Cheese Chilly Dry
description: Cheese chilli dry is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) and chili, often described as a semi-dry version that can be served as an appetizer or a main course.

name: Potato Chilly
description: Chilli Potato is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring crispy fried potato cubes tossed in a sweet, spicy, and slightly sour sauce.

name: Spring Roll
description: In Chinese cuisine, spring rolls are savoury rolls with cabbage and other vegetable fillings inside a thinly wrapped cylindrical pastry.

name: French Fries
description: French fries are a popular, deep-fried potato snack or side dish.

name: Tikki [Single]
description: In the context of Indian cuisine, "tikki" refers to a small, round, and fried patty, often made from mashed potatoes and spices.

name: Tikki [2pc]
description: In the context of Indian cuisine, "tikki" refers to a small, round, and fried patty, often made from mashed potatoes and spices.

name: Tikki Channa [2pc]
description: Aloo means potato in Hindi-Urdu, and tikki is a small cutlet or croquette.

name: Dahi Bhalla
description: A kind of food cooked with ground pulses, esp. mash, and taken with curd and spices.

name: Dahi Vadda
description: Dahi Vada is a delightful dish with a burst of flavours. The soft and spongy lentil dumplings soak in the tangy and creamy curd, creating a harmonious blend. The sweet and spicy chutneys add an extra layer of taste, making each bite a perfect balance of textures and savours.

name: Gol Gappa [6pc]
description: Golgappa, also known as pani puri, is a popular Indian street food that consists of a hollow, crispy-fried bread shell filled with a mixture of spiced water, potatoes, chickpeas, and onions.

name: Gol Gappa Dahi[6pcs]
description: Dahi puri is an Indian snack food which is especially popular in the state of Maharashtra. The dish is a type of chaat and originates from the city of Mumbai. It is served with mini-puri shells (golgappa), which are also used for the dish pani puri.

name: Bread Pakora
description: Bread pakora is an Indian fried snack (pakora or fritter). It is also known as bread bhaji (or bajji). A common street food, it is made from bread slices, gram flour, and spices among other ingredients.

name: Samosa [with Channa 2pc]
description: A samosa is a triangular, fried or baked pastry, typically filled with spiced vegetables, such as potatoes and peas.

name: Samosa [with sauce 2 pc]
description: A samosa is a triangular, fried or baked pastry, typically filled with spiced vegetables, such as potatoes and peas,

name: Cholle Bhature
description: How Chole Bhature Travelled Through History & Made India Fall ...Chole Bhature is a popular North Indian dish featuring spicy chickpea curry (chole) served with deep-fried, leavened bread (bhatura).

name: Paneer Pakora [250gm]
description: Paneer Pakora are a delicious Indian snack made with paneer, spices & gram flour. Pakora are much loved by most Indian especially during the monsoons and winters.

name: Mix Pakora [250gm]
description: Mixed Vegetable pakora are veggie fritters made in South Indian style. They are addictive, aromatic, crunchy and a delicious snack. Serve them with cup of tea or coriander chutney or mint chutney.

name: Butter Chicken Boneless
description: Butter chicken is a classic Indian curry dish where marinated and cooked chicken (traditionally tandoori) is simmered in a rich, creamy tomato and butter sauce. While traditionally made with bone-in chicken, it can also be made with boneless chicken, typically chicken thighs or breast. The sauce is known for its smooth, velvety texture and is made with ingredients like tomatoes, garlic, ginger, and various spices.

name: Rass Malai [2pc]
description: Ras malai is a popular Indian dessert featuring soft, spongy cottage cheese balls (rasgullas) immersed in a creamy, sweetened milk syrup.

name: Gulab Jamun [2pc]
description: Gulab jamun is a popular milk-solid-based sweet from the Indian subcontinent, often called "rose berries".

name: Spongy Rasgulla (2 PCS)
description: Spongy rasgullas are soft, pillowy, and white milk-based Indian sweets that have a delicate, porous structure.

name: Ice Cream Vanilla
description: Vanilla ice cream is a popular frozen dessert known for its sweet, creamy texture and classic vanilla flavor.

name: Ice Cream Butterscotch
description: Butterscotch ice cream is a frozen dessert that combines a creamy ice cream base with a distinctive butterscotch flavor, often derived from a sauce made with brown sugar, butter, and sometimes cream.

name: Stick Kulfi
description: Stick kulfi is a popular Indian dessert, an ice cream variation served on a stick, often made with milk, sugar, and flavoring ingredients like cardamoms or saffron

name: Veg.Burger
description: A burger is a patty of ground beef grilled and placed between two halves of a bun. Slices of raw onion, lettuce, bacon, mayonnaise, and other ingredients add flavor. Burgers are considered an American food but are popular around the world.

name: Egg Bhurji
description: Egg bhurji, also known as Anda Bhurji or Ande ka Khagina, is a popular Indian dish of scrambled eggs. It's a street food staple and a breakfast, lunch, or dinner option, featuring beaten eggs scrambled with onions, tomatoes, and spices. The dish is known for its quick preparation and satisfying flavor.

name: Egg Curry
description: Egg curry, also known as Anda Curry in Hindi, is a popular Indian dish featuring boiled eggs cooked in a spicy tomato-onion-based gravy. It's a flavorful and comforting dish often served with roti, naan, paratha, or rice. The dish can be made in various styles with different spice combinations.

name: Chicken Gravy
description: Chicken gravy is a sauce typically made from the juices of cooked chicken, often thickened and seasoned. It's a common accompaniment to chicken dishes, especially in the United States, and is often served with fried chicken or roasted chicken.

name: Rara Chicken Boneless
description: Chicken Rara is a rich and creamy Punjabi dish made with chicken, ground chicken, and a spicy gravy. It's a popular dish in North India, particularly in Punjab. It's known for its unique texture, where the chicken is first fried and then cooked in a gravy, resulting in a combination of soft and slightly crispy pieces.

name: Veg.Cream Burger
description: A burger is a patty of ground beef grilled and placed between two halves of a bun. Slices of raw onion, lettuce, bacon, mayonnaise, and other ingredients add flavor. Burgers are considered an American food but are popular around the world.

name: Cheese Noodle Burger
description: A cheese noodle burger is a variation of the traditional burger where the bun is replaced with a patty made from cheese and noodles, often using instant noodles or other noodle varieties.

name: Crispy Burger
description: They're made from a flavorful custom blend of ground sirloin, brisket and chuck. Pressing the patties flat before searing on a super-hot griddle creates crisp, lacy edges. Top them with American cheese and all the fixings.

name: Murg Mussallam (Chef Spl )
description: Murgh Musallam, meaning "whole chicken" in Hindi, is a Mughlai (Indian) dish where a whole chicken is marinated, stuffed with a mixture of ground meat and boiled eggs, and then cooked in a rich, flavorful gravy. The dish is known for its decadent flavors and is often decorated with almonds and silver leaves.

name: Mutton Roganjosh
description: Rogan Josh is a traditional Kashmiri curry dish featuring braised lamb or mutton in a richly spiced, red-colored gravy. The name "Rogan Josh" translates to "oil heat" in Persian, referring to the dish's preparation in oil or ghee and its intense flavor and color. It's characterized by a deep red hue, often achieved through the use of Kashmiri red chili powder or dried flowers like Alkanna tinctoria (ratan jot).

name: Plain Maggie
description: Plain Maggi refers to the basic, uncooked Maggi noodles, often used as a base for various dishes

name: Cheese Maggie
description: Cheese Maggi is a popular, quick, and cheesy variation of the classic Maggi instant noodles.

name: Mutton Handi
description: Mutton Handi is a North Indian dish, typically made in a clay pot (handi), where mutton is slow-cooked to achieve a tender, flavorful result. The dish's name comes from the traditional cooking vessel, which is a deep, wide-mouthed pot. The slow cooking process, often on low heat, imbues the dish with a distinct smoky flavor.

name: Vegetable Maggie
description: Vegetable Maggi is a simple 15-minute meal that is packed with loads of vegetables.

name: Onion Tadka Maggie
description: Made with a blend of finely ground and whole spices, and herbs, the all new MAGGI instant noodles have an extra special and flavourful tastemaker sachet inside. These spices have been roasted to perfection, providing a distinct aroma and colour to your MAGGI noodles.

name: Veg.Sandwich
description: A sandwich is a food item typically consisting of two or more slices of bread with a filling, such as meat, cheese, vegetables, or spreads, between them.

name: Cheese Sandwich
description: A cheese sandwich is a simple sandwich consisting of cheese, typically between two slices of bread.

name: Grilled Veg Sandwich
description: Vegetable sandwich is a type of vegetarian sandwich consisting of a vegetable filling between bread. There are no set requirements other than the use of vegetables, and sandwiches may be toasted or untoasted. Vegetable sandwiches are served throughout the world and are a popular street food in India.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: A grilled cheese sandwich is a hot sandwich featuring melted cheese between two slices of bread, typically toasted or pan-fried on a stovetop until the bread is golden brown and the cheese is gooey.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Chicken biryani is a popular South Asian dish where marinated chicken is cooked with fragrant basmati rice, spices, and a variety of aromatics, often layered with fried onions and ghee, according to Wikipedia. The rice is cooked separately and then combined with the cooked chicken and masala, resulting in a flavorful and aromatic dish,

name: Hyderabadi Biryani
description: Hyderabadi biryani, also known as Hyderabadi dum biryani, is a popular and flavorful rice dish originating from Hyderabad, India. It's characterized by the use of basmati rice, various spices, and meat, most commonly goat meat, but chicken is also popular. The dish is known for its rich, aromatic flavors, which are developed through slow cooking, often involving a "dum" or baking process where the rice and meat are cooked together in a sealed vessel.

name: Dum Biryani
description: Dum biryani, or Hyderabadi biryani, is a slow-cooked, fragrant rice dish originating from Hyderabad, India. It is made with basmati rice and meat, typically goat or chicken, that are layered with spices and cooked in a sealed vessel over a slow fire (dum). The term "dum" refers to the slow cooking process where the food is matured in its own juices, resulting in a tender and aromatic dish.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
description: Chicken fried rice is a dish where cooked rice is stir-fried with chicken and other ingredients like eggs and vegetables. It's a popular variation of fried rice, often prepared with leftover rice to maximize freshness and flavor. The chicken is typically diced or shredded and mixed with the other ingredients during the stir-frying process

name: Egg Fried Rice
description: Egg fried rice is a popular dish, especially in Chinese cuisine, consisting of cooked rice that has been stir-fried with eggs and often other ingredients like vegetables, meat, or seafood. It's a versatile dish that can be enjoyed as a main course or a side dish.

name: Schewan Fried Rice
description: Schezwan fried rice is a popular Indo-Chinese dish, a variation of fried rice that incorporates the fiery and aromatic flavors of Sichuan cuisine. It's known for its bold, spicy, and tangy taste, often achieved with a homemade or store-bought Schezwan sauce.

name: Chicken 65 [chef spl.]
description: Chicken 65 is a popular South Indian dish consisting of boneless chicken pieces that are deep-fried after being marinated in a flavorful blend of spices.

name: Chicken Noodles
description: Chicken noodles are a dish featuring noodles (often egg noodles) cooked and combined with chicken, typically in a savory sauce or stir-fry.

name: Chicken Manchurian
description: Chicken Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese dish where chicken is deep-fried and then stir-fried with a sweet, spicy, and tangy sauce.

name: Chicken Nuggets
description: Chicken nuggets are bite-sized pieces of breaded and fried or baked chicken meat, typically shaped like small ovals or rectangles.

name: Chicken Bullets
description: Tamarind chicken is an excellent side dish for southindian meals. I tasted this dish at a roadside shack the lady who prepares this dish had named it as bullet chicken because of the spicy guntur chilies.

name: Chilly Chicken [Boneless]
description: Chili chicken, typically made with boneless chicken, is a popular Indo-Chinese dish characterized by its bold, spicy, and tangy flavor profile.

name: Garlic Chicken
description: Garlic chicken, featuring boneless chicken, is a dish where tender chicken pieces are cooked and coated in a flavorful, garlic-infused sauce.

name: Boiled Egg [2pc]
description: A boiled egg is an egg cooked in its shell in boiling water. It can be either hard-boiled or soft-boiled, depending on how long it's cooked for.

name: Fried Egg [2pc]
description: A fried egg is an egg cooked in oil or fat, typically in a frying pan, and can be cooked on one side or both sides.

name: Omelette
description: An omelet is a dish you might order for breakfast or brunch — it's kind of like a folded pancake made of beaten eggs, sometimes with the addition of vegetables, cheese, or meat.

name: Masala Omelette
description: A masala omelette is a spicy Indian-style omelette, typically made with eggs, onions, tomatoes, and a blend of Indian spices.

name: Mineral Water
description: Great Taste

name: Soda
description: Soda, as a soft drink, is generally a non-alcoholic, sweetened, and carbonated beverage. It typically contains carbonated water, a sweetener (like sugar or artificial sweeteners), and flavoring agents. The carbonation, or "fizzy" nature, is achieved by dissolving carbon dioxide gas in the liquid.

name: Hot Tea
description: Tea is an aromatic beverage prepared by pouring hot or boiling water over cured or fresh leaves of Camellia sinensis, an evergreen shrub native to East Asia which probably originated in the borderlands of south-western China and northern Myanmar.

name: Hot Milk
description: Milk is a white liquid food produced by the mammary glands of mammals. It is the primary source of nutrition for young mammals (including breastfed human infants) before they are able to digest solid food.[1] Milk contains many nutrients, including calcium and protein, as well as lactose and saturated fat.[2] Immune factors and immune-modulating components in milk contribute to milk immunity.

name: Hot Milk With Chocolate
description: Chocolate milk is a flavored milk drink made by mixing cocoa solids with milk. It's a cold, sweetened beverage that can be made at home or purchased pre-made. Ready-to-drink chocolate milk is often homogenized. The drink can be made with dairy or plant-based milk and is often sweetened with sugar or a sugar substitute.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Coffee is a beverage brewed from roasted, ground coffee beans. Darkly colored, bitter, and slightly acidic, coffee has a stimulating effect on humans, primarily due to its caffeine content, but decaffeinated coffee is also commercially available. There are also various coffee substitutes. Typically served hot, coffee has the highest sales in the world market for hot drinks.[4]

name: Cold Coffee
description: "Cold coffee" is a general term that can refer to a few different types of iced coffee drinks. It commonly refers to iced coffee (hot coffee poured over ice), cold brew coffee (coffee brewed using cold water), or even a standard hot coffee that has been allowed to cool. Additionally, the term can also refer to a specific drink like the Greek frappé or the Japanese Mazagran.

name: Cold Coffee With Ice Cream
description: A cold coffee with ice cream, often called Eiskaffee in German, is a cold beverage typically made with chilled coffee, vanilla ice cream, and sometimes whipped cream or other toppings. It's similar to an iced coffee but with the addition of ice cream, making it a more indulgent treat.

name: Red Bull
description: Red Bull is a brand of energy drinks created and owned by the Austrian company Red Bull GmbH. With a market share of 43%, it is the most popular energy drink brand as of 2020,[8] and the third most valuable soft drink brand, behind Coca-Cola and Pepsi.

name: Sweet Lassi
description: Sweet Lassi is a popular yogurt-based drink, particularly in Northern India, that's known for its creamy texture and sweet taste. It's made by blending yogurt with water, sugar, and often flavored with ingredients like cardamom, rosewater, or fruit.

name: Salted LASSI
description: Lassi (pronounced [ləsːi]) is a yogurt–based beverage with a smoothie-like consistency.[1][2] It has been called "the most popular and traditional yogurt-based drink" in India.[3] It has also been described as the form in which yogurt "is most cherished and unbeatably popular in [...] Punjab", its "best-loved summer drink", and "the air conditioner of the Punjab"

name: Double Chesse Burger
description: A double cheeseburger is a hamburger containing two patties of ground beef and two slices of cheese. It is typically topped with ketchup, mustard, pickles, and onions, and served on a toasted bun.

name: Mexican Burger
description: A Mexican burger, or "hamburguesa mexicana" in Spanish, is a burger with Mexican-inspired ingredients and flavors. It typically features a meat patty, often beef, along with traditional Mexican toppings like avocado, jalapeño slices, shredded lettuce, onion, and tomato. The bun may be slathered with mayonnaise, ketchup, and mustard, and sometimes features additional toppings like cheese or bacon. Variations exist, such as "Tortas Hamburguesas" which are filled with bacon, onions, garlic, and other flavors, then topped with a homemade sauce, lettuce, tomato, and avocado.

name: Paneer Block Buster
description: A "Paneer R Burger" or Paneer Tikki Burger is a vegetarian burger patty made from paneer (Indian cheese). The paneer is often spiced and fried, creating a crispy and flavorful patty that's then placed in a burger bun with various toppings.

name: King Burger
description: a Big Mac-style burger, which is only available in India. It features two corn and cheese patties, topped with jalapenos, onions, crunchy lettuce, and cheese,

name: Grilled Chicken Burger
description: A grilled chicken burger, also known as a grilled chicken sandwich, is a type of burger featuring a grilled chicken patty served on a hamburger bun. It typically includes toppings and condiments similar to those found on a regular hamburger. The chicken patty can be made from a whole chicken breast, or from ground chicken.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala Burger
description: A Chicken Tikka Masala burger combines the flavors of the popular Indian dish with a burger format. It typically features a patty made of ground chicken, often seasoned with tikka masala spices, served on a bun with toppings like mango chutney, yogurt, or onion, and sometimes a side of tikka masala sauce.

name: Bbq Chicken Burger
description: A BBQ chicken burger is a sandwich featuring a chicken patty, typically marinated and grilled or fried, and coated in a barbecue sauce. It's served on a bun, similar to a regular burger, and may include additional toppings like lettuce, tomato, and onion

name: Chicken Paradise Burger
description: A crispy chicken burger typically features a breaded and fried chicken patty, often seasoned with various herbs and spices, served on a bun, often with a sauce or condiment like mayo or sriracha mayo. The breading is crucial for the crispy texture, and the sauce provides a flavorful complement to the chicken.

name: Cold Sandwich
description: A cold club sandwich is typically a triple-decker sandwich, meaning it's made with three slices of bread, often toasted. It's layered with cold cooked poultry (like turkey or chicken), bacon or ham, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise. The sandwich is frequently cut diagonally and held together with cocktail sticks.

name: Veggie Sandwich
description: a vegetarian sandwich primarily characterized by its filling of vegetables between bread. There are no strict guidelines regarding the types of vegetables used, and sandwiches may be either toasted or untoasted. These sandwiches are a popular and versatile food option, enjoyed globally and even considered a common street food in some regions like India.

name: Mushroom Corn Sandwich
description: A mushroom sandwich, in its simplest form, is a sandwich featuring sauteed or roasted mushrooms as a primary filling. It can be a simple open-face sandwich with mushrooms and cheese on toasted bread, or more elaborate versions with additional fillings like meat or cheese.

name: Cheese Corn Sandwich
description: A corn cheese sandwich is a sandwich filled with a mixture of sweet corn, cheese, and often other ingredients like vegetables, spices, and spreads. It can be grilled or toasted for a warm, savory snack or meal,

name: Paneer Tikka Sandwich
description: A paneer tikka sandwich is a popular Indian-inspired sandwich featuring paneer (Indian cheese) marinated in a spicy tandoori-style marinade and grilled, then layered between slices of bread with various fillings and condiments. It's a flavorful and satisfying dish often served as a snack or light meal.

name: Bella Ciao Special
description: Great Taste

name: Egg Sandwich
description: An egg sandwich is a sandwich featuring cooked eggs as its primary filling. Common fillings include fried eggs, scrambled eggs, omelets, sliced boiled eggs, or egg salad. Some variations also include breakfast meats, cheese, and condiments

name: Chicken Sandwich
description: A chicken sandwich is a sandwich that typically consists of boneless, skinless chicken breast or thigh, served between slices of bread. Variations on the "chicken sandwich" include chicken on a bun, chicken on a Kaiser, hot chicken, or chicken salad sandwich.

name: Bbq Chicken Sandwich
description: A barbecue chicken sandwich typically features barbecued chicken, usually a chicken breast or thigh, seasoned and coated with barbecue sauce, served on a bun or bread, often with other toppings like lettuce, tomato, or onion. The chicken can be grilled, smoked, or even fried, and the sauce may vary in flavor depending on regional preferences.

name: Bella Ciao Special
description: Great Taste

name: Veggie Wrap
description: Veggie WrapA veggie wrap is a type of wrap sandwich that features a filling of various vegetables wrapped in a soft flatbread, such as a tortilla or pita bread. It's a popular option for a quick and healthy meal or snack, offering a customizable and flavorful alternative to traditional sandwiches.

name: Crispy Paneer Wrap
description: Easy 30-minute Paneer Kathi Roll Recipe - Ministry of CurryA Crispy Paneer Wrap, also known as a Paneer Kathi Roll or Paneer Frankie, is a popular Indian street food wrap featuring marinated paneer (Indian cheese) that's pan-fried to create a crispy texture. The paneer is typically mixed with vegetables like bell peppers and onions, and then wrapped in a paratha (Indian flatbread) along with chutneys and sauces.

name: Mexican Peri Peri Wrap
description: A "Mexican Peri Peri Wrap" would likely be a wrap, similar to a burrito or quesadilla, using a Mexican-style flatbread (like a tortilla) and filling it with ingredients that incorporate the flavors of Peri Peri chili.
