Peri Peri chili is a type of spicy chili pepper, also known as the African bird's eye chili, commonly used in South African and Portuguese cuisine.

name: Egg Wrap
description: An "egg wrap" generally refers to a meal prepared by wrapping various ingredients, often including scrambled or fried eggs, within a soft flatbread like a tortilla or chapati. The term is also sometimes used for other similar dishes, like a "Ugandan Rolex" which is an egg omelette wrapped in a chapati.

name: Crispy Chicken Wrap
description: A crispy chicken wrap is a type of wrap sandwich typically featuring crispy or fried chicken, often with lettuce, cheese, and a sauce, all wrapped in a soft tortilla. McDonald's, for example, offers a Snack Wrap that includes a Chicken Selects Premium Breast Strip, cheddar/jack cheese, lettuce, and a choice of ranch, honey mustard, or chipotle barbecue sauce, all wrapped in a white flour tortilla. Other variations may include different cheeses, sauces, and vegetables.

name: Egg Chicken Wrap
description: An "egg chicken wrap" is a dish that typically involves a soft flatbread (like a tortilla or wrap) filled with cooked chicken and a scrambled or fried egg. It's a popular and versatile food item, often used as a convenient lunch or snack.

name: Salted Fries
description: deep-fried potato strips that are frequently salted. They are a popular side dish or snack, often served with condiments like ketchup, mayonnaise, or vinegar. The fries themselves are typically made from potatoes cut into even strips and then deep-fried, sometimes also baked in an oven or air fryer.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri peri fries are French fries seasoned with peri peri sauce or seasoning, a popular dish in many African countries. The sauce is made from African bird's eye chili peppers, garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, and spices. It's a flavorful and spicy twist on regular French fries.

name: Cheesy Jalpeno Fries
description: Cheesy jalapeño fries are a dish featuring French fries topped with melted cheese and sliced or diced jalapeño peppers. They often include other toppings like bacon or chives, and are sometimes served with ranch dressing. The combination of the crispy fries, cheesy sauce, and spicy jalapeños creates a flavorful and popular snack or appetizer.

name: Pasta Salad
description: Pasta salad, also known as in salata di pasta or pasta fredda, is a chilled or room-temperature salad featuring cooked pasta tossed with a variety of ingredients. These ingredients can include vegetables, legumes, cheeses, nuts, herbs, spices, meats, poultry, or seafood, and it's most often dressed with a vinegar, oil, or mayonnaise-based dressing.

name: Greek Salad
description: Greek salad, also known as horiatiki salad, is a simple and refreshing dish in Greek cuisine. It typically consists of tomatoes, cucumbers, onion, feta cheese, and olives, dressed with salt, Greek oregano, lemon juice, and olive oil. Green bell peppers and caper berries are common additions, especially on the Cyclades islands.

name: Russian Salad
description: Russian Salad, also known as Olivier Salad, is a mayonnaise-based potato salad. It's a popular dish in Russia and other post-Soviet states, and is often served on New Year's Eve. The salad typically includes diced potatoes, carrots, and pickles, along with optional ingredients like eggs, peas, and meat. It's characterized by its diced texture and contrasting flavors, and is a staple on festive buffets.

name: Assorted Vegetable Salad
description: An assorted vegetable salad is a dish composed of various fresh or cooked vegetables, often including leafy greens, and a dressing. It can be a light appetizer, side dish, or even a main course salad when protein sources like cheese or nuts are added,

name: Chatpata Chat Salad
description: Chatpata chat" refers to a type of Indian street food snack, specifically a "chaat" dish, that is characterized by its tangy, spicy, and savory flavor profile. The term "chatpata" itself denotes this distinct flavor sensation. Chaat dishes are diverse, but often feature fried dough or puffed rice as a base, combined with various ingredients like potatoes, chickpeas, and spices, and topped with chutneys and sauces.

name: Masala Peanuts Salad
description: A "peanut salad" is a general term for a salad that features peanuts as a key ingredient, often within a peanut-based sauce or dressing. Examples include Indonesian salads like Gado-gado and Karedok, which use a peanut sauce to coat vegetables, or Indian salads with boiled peanuts and spices. These salads can vary in ingredients and preparation methods, but the central theme is the use of peanuts as a flavor componen

name: Corn Chaat
description: Corn salad, also known as lamb's lettuce or mâche, is a salad green with small, rounded leaves that are used in salads and other dishes. It's a hardy plant that thrives in cool or mild weather and is often used in French cuisine. The plant is named "corn salad" because it was commonly found growing among grain fields.

name: Assorted Vegetable With Chicken
description: A salad featuring assorted vegetables and chicken typically includes a mix of fresh or cooked vegetables like lettuce, cabbage, carrots, cucumbers, and chicken, along with a dressing for flavor

name: Chicken Coleslaw Salad
description: Chicken coleslaw salad is a dish that typically combines cooked chicken, shredded cabbage, and a creamy dressing, often mayonnaise or buttermilk-based. It's a popular side dish, especially in American cuisine, often served with barbecue, fried chicken, or other picnic-style meals. Variations may include other vegetables like carrots, peppers, or onions, or different types of dressing.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
description: A grilled chicken salad is a dish featuring cooked chicken, often grilled or roasted, combined with various salad ingredients like lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and other vegetables, and a flavorful dressing.

name: High Protein chicken Salad
description: A high-protein salad is a salad dish that incorporates a significant amount of protein-rich ingredients, making it a more substantial and nutritious meal option than a typical green salad. These salads typically feature lean protein sources like chicken, fish, beans, or tofu, alongside a variety of vegetables, fruits, and sometimes grains.

name: Bread Omelet
description: A bread omelet salad, or more commonly known as a bread salad, is a dish where bread is a key ingredient, often mixed with other ingredients like tomatoes, onions, and herbs, and dressed with olive oil and vinegar. In some variations, bread is also incorporated into an omelet,

name: Boiled Egg (6 PCS )
description: Egg salad is a popular dish made from hard-boiled eggs, mayonnaise, and often other ingredients like celery, onion, mustard, and seasonings. It's commonly used as a sandwich spread, but can also be enjoyed on its own or as a topping on other salads.

name: Butter Omelet
description: The term likely refers to a salad that features a butter-infused omelet as a key component. Salads, in general, are dishes with mixed ingredients, often including vegetables, and are typically served with a dressing,

name: Tandoori Leg Piece (1 PCS )
description: Tandoori chicken leg, a popular Indian dish, is prepared by roasting chicken legs marinated in yogurt and spices within a tandoor, a cylindrical clay oven. The chicken is often skin-on and includes bone. The marinade, known as tandoori masala, includes a blend of spices like garam masala, garlic, ginger, cumin, and cayenne pepper, as well as yogurt, lemon juice, and other spices. The high heat and smoky flavor imparted by the tandoor give the chicken its characteristic taste and appearance.

name: Afghan Chicken(Half)
description: Afghani chicken leg pieces, a popular dish, are chicken drumsticks marinated in a yogurt-based mixture and cooked until tender. The leg pieces, also known as drumsticks, are marinated in a blend of yogurt, spices, and herbs, and then cooked either in a tandoor oven, on a grill, or in a conventional oven. The resulting dish is flavorful and juicy, with a creamy and slightly spiced taste.

name: Chicken Tikka [boneless 10 pc]
description: Chicken tikka is a popular Indian dish featuring boneless chicken marinated in yogurt and spices, then roasted on skewers in a tandoor oven or over charcoal. It's essentially a boneless version of tandoori chicken and is often served dry, as a hors d'oeuvre or as an ingredient in dishes like chicken tikka masala.

name: Chicken Malai Tikka
description: Chicken Malai Tikka is a North Indian dish consisting of boneless chicken pieces marinated in a creamy, spiced yogurt marinade and then grilled. The dish is characterized by its mild, creamy flavor and tender texture. It is a popular appetizer or main course, often served with green chutney and onion salad.

name: Peri Peri Chicken Tikka
description: Peri peri chicken tikka is a dish where boneless chicken pieces, marinated in a blend of spices and piri-piri sauce, are roasted or grilled and then often served in a creamy, tomato-based sauce. It combines elements of Indian and South African cuisine, offering a flavorful and spicy experience.

name: Chicken Kali Mirch
description: Black pepper chicken is a dish where chicken is cooked, often stir-fried, with a sauce that includes black pepper, according to The Woks of Life. The black pepper provides a complex flavor, adding a spicy kick to the dish, says McCormick For Chefs. It's a popular dish in various cuisines, including Chinese, Indian, and American,

name: Special Tandoori Fish
description: Tandoori fish is a popular Indian dish featuring fish marinated in yogurt and spices, then cooked in a tandoor oven, giving it a smoky and flavorful taste. The marinade typically includes yogurt, garam masala, cumin, coriander, turmeric, red chili powder, and other spices like ginger and garlic. The fish is then grilled until charred, adding to its distinct flavor.

name: Fish Malai Tikka
description: Fish Malai Tikka is a flavorful Indian dish where boneless fish cubes are marinated in a creamy, spicy mixture and then grilled. The marinade typically includes ingredients like yogurt, spices (turmeric, red chili powder, etc.), garlic, ginger, and sometimes even cheese. The marinated fish is then cooked on skewers or in a tandoor oven, resulting in a tender, flavorful dish.

name: Multani Fish Tikka
description: Multani Fish Tikka, a Punjabi specialty, describes fish marinated in a blend of Indian spices, including Multani earth, and cooked in a tandoor or oven. The "Multani" part refers to the type of earth used in the marinade, which is known for its cooling and binding properties. The fish is typically boneless and cooked until it's tender and flavorful, often served with a side of chutney.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla milkshake is a sweet, cold, blended beverage made with milk, vanilla ice cream, and sometimes a little extra vanilla extract. It's a classic and popular dessert or refreshing treat, known for its smooth, creamy texture and mild, pleasant vanilla flavor.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry milkshake is a sweet, cold drink made by blending strawberries, milk, and often ice cream. It's a popular beverage, known for its fruity flavor and creamy texture. The strawberry flavor can come from fresh, frozen, or even a strawberry syrup.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: A butterscotch shake is a cold, blended beverage typically made with milk, butterscotch flavoring (like syrup or extract), and ice cream (optional). It's a popular treat, especially for its sweet and slightly buttery, caramel-like flavor, which comes primarily from brown sugar in the butterscotch. The shake is often served chilled and can be customized with additions like brown sugar for extra sweetness.

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo shake is a milkshake made with Oreo cookies, milk, and typically vanilla ice cream. It's known for its rich, chocolatey flavor and smooth, thick texture. The shake is often considered a fun and indulgent treat for Oreo lovers.

name: Kitkat Shake
description: A Kit Kat milkshake is a decadent, chocolatey milkshake that combines the flavors of creamy milk and ice cream with the crunchy, chocolatey goodness of Kit Kat bars. It's a popular dessert drink, often garnished with whipped cream and extra Kit Kat pieces. The milkshake offers a refreshing, sweet, and indulgent experience, perfect for satisfying a chocolate craving.

name: Dark Chocolate Shake
description: A dark chocolate shake is a beverage featuring a strong, rich chocolate flavor, typically made with dark chocolate, milk (or other dairy alternative), and sometimes additional ingredients like ice or sweeteners. Unlike milk chocolate, dark chocolate has a higher cocoa content, resulting in a bolder, more intense flavor profile with less sweetness.

name: Crispy Chilli Potato
description: Crispy Chilli Potato is a popular Indo-Chinese dish where fried potatoes are tossed in a sweet, spicy, and tangy chili sauce. It's a common appetizer or snack, often served in Indian restaurants and street food stalls. The dish features crispy, bite-sized potatoes coated in a flavorful sauce made with ingredients like garlic, ginger, chili peppers, soy sauce, vinegar, and sugar.

name: Honey Chilly Potato
description: Honey chilli potato is a popular Indo-Chinese fusion dish, a crispy snack or starter with a sweet, spicy, and slightly sour flavor. It features fried potatoes coated in a sauce made with honey, chili, and other ingredients like soy sauce, tomato ketchup, and sesame seeds. The dish is known for its unique combination of sweet and spicy flavors, as well as its crispy texture.

name: Chilli Paneer
description: Chilli Paneer is a popular Indo-Chinese dish that features paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cubes cooked in a spicy, slightly sweet, and tangy sauce. It's a vegetarian adaptation of the popular Chinese dish Chilli Chicken. The dish typically includes ingredients like onions, bell peppers, garlic, green chilies, and various sauces like soy sauce, vinegar, and ketchup. It can be prepared in dry, semi-dry, or gravy versions, making it versatile for appetizers or main courses.

name: Chilli Mushroom
description: Chili mushroom is a popular Indo-Chinese dish that combines fried mushrooms with a spicy, savory sauce. It's known for its crispy, flavorful mushrooms and a vibrant mix of bell peppers and onions in the sauce. The dish is a vegetarian option and a unique combination of flavors.

name: Spring Roll
description: Spring rolls are a common appetizer or dim sum dish, particularly in Chinese, Vietnamese, and Southeast Asian cuisines. They are typically rolled, savory dishes, often featuring a thin, pastry wrapper around fillings of vegetables, and sometimes meat and seafood. Some variations, like Chinese spring rolls, are fried, while others, like Vietnamese summer rolls, are served fresh.

name: Veg Salt & Pepper
description: Veg salt and pepper refers to a vegetarian dish, typically a stir-fry, where various vegetables are seasoned with salt and pepper. It's often enhanced with garlic and other spices, creating a flavorful and savory experience. The dish is popular in various cuisines, particularly those of Asian origin.

name: Veg.Fried Rice
description: Veg fried rice, also known as vegetable fried rice, is a stir-fried rice dish that typically includes a variety of vegetables, cooked rice, and is often seasoned with soy sauce and other spices. It's a popular and versatile dish found in various cuisines, particularly in Asia.

name: Paneer Fried Rice
description: Paneer fried rice is savory, spiced and delicious stir fried rice variant made with soft paneer cubes (Indian cottage cheese), long grained rice, healthy veggies, fragrant herbs and spices.

name: Chille Garlic Fried Rice
description: Chilli garlic fried rice is a popular variation of fried rice that incorporates chili peppers and garlic as key flavor components. It's a stir-fried dish typically made with pre-cooked rice, vegetables, eggs, and meat (optional), seasoned with chili, garlic, soy sauce, and other seasonings. The dish is known for its bold, spicy, and savory flavor profile.

name: Veg. Hakka Noodles
description: Hakka noodles, a popular dish in Indian-Chinese cuisine, are stir-fried noodles with vegetables and various protein options, often including chicken, beef, or vegetarian alternatives. They are commonly referred to as "desi chow mein," a variation of the Chinese chow mein, and are known for their use of Indian spices and flavors.

name: Chilli Garlic Noodles
description: Veg Garlic Noodles, also known as Chilli Garlic Noodles, are a popular noodle dish with a strong garlic flavor, often featuring a mix of vegetables and a spicy sauce. The dish is typically made with noodles, garlic, chili, and various vegetables like onions, carrots, and capsicums, all stir-fried in a sauce that may include soy sauce, chili sauce, and vinegar. It's a staple in many Asian restaurants and is also enjoyed in home kitchens

name: Singaporean Noodles
description: Singapore-style noodles, also known as Singapore rice vermicelli or 星洲炒米, are a stir-fried noodle dish with a vibrant yellow color due to curry powder. It's made with rice vermicelli noodles, stir-fried with curry powder, vegetables, scrambled eggs, and often includes meat like char siu pork, prawn, or chicken. This dish is not traditionally found in Singapore itself, but rather in Hong Kong Cantonese-style restaurants and some American Chinese restaurants.

name: Veg Manchurian
description: Manchurian is a class of Indian Chinese dishes made by roughly chopping and deep-frying ingredients such as chicken, cauliflower (gobi), prawns, fish, mutton, and paneer, and then sautéeing them in a sauce flavored with soy sauce.

name: Crispy Corn
description: Crispy corn, a popular snack, can refer to a few different types of fried corn-based snacks, including corn chips, corn nuts, and sometimes even popcorn. These snacks are characterized by their crisp texture and often strong corn flavor, often enhanced by seasonings like salt, spices, or herbs.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: Vanilla shake is drink made using milk and vanilla ice cream scoop with added sugar

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A milkshake is a cold drink made by mixing milk with a flavouring or fruit, and sometimes ice cream.a strawberry milkshake.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: To recreate this classic treat, a butterscotch milkshake recipe is simple: blend chilled milk, creamy vanilla ice cream, and butterscotch syrup until smooth.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: Chocolate Milkshake is made by blending milk, frozen milk, sugar, vanilla essence and chocolate syrup then garnished with chocolate syrup / shavings / sprinkles.

name: Oreo Shake
description: softened vanilla ice cream, milk, and chopped Oreo cookies. You can definitely up the Oreo factor and start with cookies-and-cream ice cream

name: Banana Shake
description: A banana shake is a popular beverage made by blending bananas with milk and sometimes other ingredients like ice cream, flavorings, or sweeteners, creating a smooth, creamy, and refreshing drink.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee is a chilled beverage typically made with coffee, milk, sugar, and ice.

name: Pop Corn Shake
description: A popcorn shake is a milkshake that features popcorn as a key ingredient, adding a crunchy and textural contrast to the creamy and sweet milkshake base.

name: Mint Mojito
description: A Mint Mojito is a refreshing, classic Cuban cocktail known for its vibrant mint flavor and crisp, bubbly texture. It's typically made with, fresh mint leaves, lime juice, sugar, and club soda.

name: Blue Curacao
description: A Blue Curacao Mojito is a vibrant blue-colored variation of the classic Mojito cocktail, incorporating the distinctive flavor and color of Blue Curaçao. It's made by mashing mint leaves and lemon or lime, then adding Blue Curaçao, lime juice, simple syrup, ice, and topping with soda water.

name: French Fries
description: French fries are a popular dish made from long, thin strips of potato that are deep-fried until golden brown and crispy.

name: Lemon Crusher
description: A "lemon crusher shake" is a drink that typically involves crushing lemons to extract their juice, which is then blended with other ingredients to create a shake or smoothie. The process can be done using a lemon squeezer or even a manual hand crusher to get the juice. The crushed lemon juice can then be mixed with various ingredients like milk, ice, sweetener, and other fruits for a refreshing drink.

name: Black Crurent
description: A black currant shake is a refreshing beverage made by blending black currants with milk, often including ice and sweetener, resulting in a creamy, dark purple drink. The blackcurrant provides a tart and fruity flavor, while the milk adds a creamy texture and richness

name: Pineapple Crusher
description: is a milkshake or similar drink that features pineapple as a primary flavor, often incorporating other ingredients like milk, ice cream, or sugar. While the term "Crusher" can also refer to the "Crush" brand of soft drinks, it's more commonly used in the context of a homemade or restaurant-made milkshake with crushed pineapple.

name: Guava Crusher
description: Guava crusher juice, also known as squash, is a fruit-based beverage where guava fruit is crushed to extract juice, and it is then processed into a concentrated form. It's not a ready-to-drink juice but requires dilution before consumption. Guava squash is a commercial product that can be prepared from various fruits like mango, orange, and pineapple, or from other fruits with different preservatives.

name: Strawberry Crusher
description: Strawberry Crusher juice is not a commonly recognized juice name. However, based on the search results, it is possible that it refers to a flavor of the juice drink "Crusha". Crusha is available in multiple flavors, including strawberry.

name: Mango Crusher
description: A "mango crusher juice" refers to a drink made by crushing ripe mangoes, often followed by pressing or extracting the pulp to obtain a concentrated juice. This process is similar to how many fruit juices, like squash, are made, involving washing, peeling, and crushing the mangoes before extraction. The resulting juice is typically sweetened with sugar and may be enhanced with natural flavors and colors.

name: Simple Garlic
description: Garlic bread, also known as garlic toast, is a type of bread, often baguette, sourdough, or ciabatta, that is topped with garlic and sometimes olive oil or butter. Additional herbs like oregano or chives may also be included.

name: Cheese Garlic Bread
description: Cheese garlic bread is a type of toasted bread, typically a baguette, flavored with garlic and a fat source like butter or olive oil, and topped with cheese. It's a common side dish or appetizer, often enjoyed with soups, pasta, or as a standalone snack.

name: Veg+Cheese Garlic
description: Veg + cheese garlic bread is a variation of garlic bread that incorporates cheese and other vegetarian toppings, typically served warm and crispy. It's a popular dish enjoyed as a side, appetizer, or even a light meal. The recipe involves taking bread (often baguette, sourdough, or ciabatta), spreading it with a garlic butter mixture, and topping it with cheese, potentially along with other herbs and vegetables. The bread is then toasted or baked until golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.

name: Corn Wrap
description: A "corn wrap," also known as a corn tortilla, is a thin, flatbread made from ground corn (maize) that is often used to wrap fillings in various dishes, particularly in Mexican cuisine. It's a staple food, especially in Mexico and Central America, and is a key ingredient in dishes like tacos, burritos, and enchiladas.

name: Allo Tikki Wrap
description: An Aloo Tikki Wrap is a delicious and filling Indian street food dish made by wrapping spicy, crispy aloo tikki (potato patties) inside a soft tortilla or flatbread, along with fresh vegetables and flavorful chutneys. The aloo tikki is made with boiled and mashed potatoes seasoned with spices like cumin, coriander, and chili powder, then pan-fried to golden perfection. The wrap typically includes crunchy veggies like onions, lettuce, and tomatoes, and is drizzled with chutneys like mint chutney or tamarind chutney for a tangy and spicy kick. It’s a perfect on-the-go snack or meal that’s both flavorful and satisfying.

name: Veg Wrap
description: A veggie wrap is a culinary dish where a soft flatbread, often a tortilla, is filled with various vegetables and other ingredients, then rolled up and eaten. It's a popular and versatile option for a quick and healthy meal, snack, or lunch.

name: Paneer Wrap
description: A "paneer wrap" or "paneer kathi roll" is a popular Indian street food and meal option, often made with marinated and pan-fried paneer (Indian cottage cheese), vegetables, and sauces, all wrapped in a flatbread or tortilla. It's essentially a flavorful and customizable sandwich-like dish.

name: Tandoori Wrap
description: A Tandoori wrap is a popular Indian-inspired wrap featuring Tandoori-style chicken or paneer, often served with various toppings and a creamy yogurt-based sauce, all wrapped inside a flatbread. The dish is a fusion of Indian flavors and the wrap format, making it a convenient and flavorful meal option.

name: Tandoori Paneer Wrap
description: Paneer Kathi Roll | Paneer Frankie | Paneer Wrap - Caramel ...A Tandoori Paneer Wrap is a popular Indian street food and quick meal, consisting of paneer marinated in tandoori spices, wrapped in a flatbread like a tortilla. It's often referred to as a "Paneer Frankie" or a "Kathi Roll" in different regions. The paneer is typically grilled or baked, and the wrap can be customized with various toppings like lettuce, onions, and sauces.

name: Achari Wrap
description: An Achari Wrap is a type of food wrap, typically made with a flour tortilla or flatbread, that's filled with a flavorful and spicy mixture inspired by the Indian pickle dish "Achar". The filling often includes ingredients like paneer (Indian cheese), vegetables, and a blend of spices that mimic the taste of mango pickle or other Indian pickles.

name: Achari Paneer Wrap
description: An Achari Paneer Wrap is a delicious vegetarian Indian street food wrap featuring paneer (Indian cheese) cooked in a spicy, tangy pickle-flavored masala, wrapped in a tortilla. The filling, inspired by Achari Kebab, includes paneer, bell peppers, and onions, seasoned with Indian spices and mango pickle. It's often served with mint mayonnaise and can be enjoyed as a quick and flavorful meal.

name: Veg Delight
description: A Veg Delight salad typically refers to a vegetable salad, often a simple side salad with various fresh vegetables, or a more elaborate salad with a variety of raw and cooked vegetables.

name: Allo Tikki salad
description: Aloo tikki chaat is a popular Indian street food dish, also known as Aloo Tikki or potato patties. It typically consists of boiled and mashed potatoes mixed with spices and herbs, then formed into small patties and fried.

name: Corn Salad
description: Corn salad, also known as lamb's lettuce or mache, is a leafy green vegetable with a mild, slightly nutty flavor. It's a hardy plant that grows in a low rosette, with spatulate leaves, and is often used in salads or as a potherb. The plant is native to southern Europe but is now found in both Europe and North America.

name: Crispy Salad
description: A "crispy salad" typically refers to a salad that incorporates ingredients like croutons, crispy fried vegetables, or other elements that provide a satisfying crunch in addition to the base leafy greens and other fresh ingredients. These crispy components add a textural contrast to the softer elements of the salad, enhancing the overall eating experience.

name: Veg Tikki
description: A "veg tikki salad" likely refers to a salad incorporating aloo tikki, a popular Indian vegetarian snack made from mashed potatoes and spices. This salad would combine aloo tikki with other salad ingredients like leafy greens, vegetables, and a dressing. The aloo tikki provides a savory and slightly crispy element to the salad.

name: Paneer Salad
description: Paneer salad is a dish featuring Indian paneer cheese, often in a salad setting, alongside other ingredients. It can be a main course salad or a side dish, and variations include pan-fried paneer on a salad of grains and vegetables.

name: Sweet Corn
description: Sweet corn is a variety of maize (corn) that is high in sugar and low in starch, making it a popular vegetable. It's typically harvested while still immature (the "milk stage") and enjoyed fresh, canned, or frozen. Sweet corn is a genetic variant of maize that accumulates more sugar and less starch in the kernels compared to field corn

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri peri fries are essentially French fries seasoned or dipped in peri peri sauce, a spicy chili-based condiment. The sauce is made with African bird's eye chili peppers and other ingredients like garlic, lemon juice, and vinegar, according to a blog post on Peri Peri Fries. The fries are typically fried until crispy and golden brown before being coated or dipped in the sauce, often with additional herbs or spices added for extra flavor.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Loaded fries are noted for being a cheap but filling dish. They are served with various toppings.[1][2] Common ingredients include cheese, chopped bacon, and garnishes like sliced green onions or jalapeños.[

name: Veg Pops
description: Vegetable chips, also referred to as "veg chips", are a food product made from sliced vegetables that are fried, baked, or dehydrated.

name: Mushroom Pops
description: These are easy snack made with mushrooms. Mushrooms are filled with cream cheese and mozzarella cheese which are seasoned with garlic, salt and pepper. This stuffed mushrooms are then coated in a batter and breadcrumbs. Mushrooms are fried till crispy in oil.

name: Cheese Pops
description: A "cheese ball" can refer to several different things, including a soft cheese spread shaped into a ball and a variety of cheese-flavored snacks. The most common interpretation refers to a mixture of hard cheese, softened cream cheese, and sometimes a binder, shaped into a ball and often decorated.

name: Freggi
description: Great Taste

name: Noodles Spring Roll
description: Spicy Noodle Spring Rolls (Vietnamese-Style)Noodles, particularly rice noodles, are often a key ingredient in both spring rolls and rice noodle rolls, which are both popular dishes in Southeast Asia and beyond. Spring rolls, especially the fried kind, feature a crisp, thin wrapper often made from rice paper or flour, while rice noodle rolls typically use a thinner, more delicate rice noodle sheet. Both dishes offer a variety of fillings, from savory meats and vegetables to fresh herbs, and can be enjoyed as appetizers or main courses.

name: Veg Spring Roll
description: Veg spring rolls are a savory, cylindrical snack filled with various chopped vegetables encased in a thin pastry wrapper. The fillings typically include items like carrots, cabbage, green beans, and sometimes mushrooms or other vegetables, all sauteed and seasoned before being wrapped and fried.

name: Veg Strips
description: long, thin strips of vegetables, often prepared for culinary purposes like salads, stir-fries, or as part of a crudité platter. These strips can be made by cutting vegetables into thin, uniform pieces using various knife techniques, such as julienning or chiffonade. They can also refer to the strips of plant-based protein, like textured vegetable protein, which is extruded into various shapes, including strips.

name: Fried Momos
description: Fried momos are a variation of the popular Himalayan dumpling, where steamed momos are also pan-fried or deep-fried after they are steamed. They are typically made with a simple dough filled with a savory mixture of ground meat, vegetables, and spices. The frying process creates a crispy exterior while keeping the filling juicy.

name: Peanut Masala
description: Peanut masala, also known as masala peanuts, are a popular Indian snack made by coating roasted peanuts with a flavorful blend of spices, herbs, and flour. They are typically deep-fried but can also be baked or air-fried, offering a crunchy and savory snack.

name: Ice Tea
description: Iced tea, also known as ice tea, is a cold tea beverage, typically served over ice. It can be made with various types of tea and may be sweetened or unsweetened. Iced tea is also a popular packaged drink, often flavored with fruit syrups like lemon, peach, or raspberry.

name: Lemon Tea
description: Lemon tea is a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in hot water and then adding lemon juice and sometimes other ingredients like honey or sugar. It's a popular drink known for its refreshing taste and potential health benefits.

name: Peach Tea
description: Peach tea is a flavored tea, typically black, green, or herbal, infused with peach essence, offering a sweet and fruity flavor and aroma. It can be enjoyed hot or cold and is a popular beverage option. Some brands, like Peace Tea, offer peach-flavored iced tea, and peach blossoms are also used to make tea in some cultures.

name: Watermelon
description: A watermelon mocktail is a refreshing, alcohol-free beverage made primarily with watermelon juice, often combined with other ingredients like lime juice, mint, and sugar syrup to enhance the flavor and create a unique taste experience. It's a popular summer drink, appreciated for its sweetness and refreshing qualitie

name: Veg.Manchow Soup
description: Manchow soup is typically made with a variety of vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and cornstarch for thickening, along with a broth or stock.

name: Aloo Parantha
description: Aloo paratha is a South Asian paratha, a type of flatbread, filled with a spiced potato mixture. It's a popular breakfast dish, especially in India and Pakistan. The filling usually includes boiled, mashed potatoes, and spices like amchur and garam masala. It's cooked on a hot griddle with butter or ghee. Aloo paratha is often served with butter, chutney, yogurt, or pickles.

name: Onion Parantha
description: Onion Paratha, also known as "Pyaz ke Parathe," is a popular flatbread from the Indian subcontinent, particularly loved in Punjab. It's a type of paratha that is stuffed with a mixture of finely chopped onions, along with other ingredients like spices and herbs

name: Tomato Soup
description: Tomato soup is a flavorful and comforting soup made primarily from tomatoes.

name: Gobhi Parantha
description: is a type of paratha or flatbread, originating from the Indian subcontinent, that is stuffed with seasoned cauliflower and other vegetables. It is usually eaten either at breakfast or as an appetizer in later meals.

name: Dahi+Paneer Parantha
description: Paneer paratha is a popular North Indian flatbread stuffed with a mixture of Indian cottage cheese (paneer), spices, and herbs. It is made with whole wheat dough, similar to other paratha variations. The paratha is typically cooked on a tava (griddle) and brushed with ghee or butter for a crispy exterior and soft, cheesy interior.

name: Veg Clear Soup
description: Veg clear soup is a simple, clear, and flavorful soup made with a variety of vegetables, typically simmered in a liquid like broth or water.

name: Mix Parantha
description: A mix paratha, also known as a vegetable paratha, is a stuffed flatbread popular in the Indian subcontinent. It's made with whole wheat flour, and the filling typically includes a mixture of chopped vegetables and spices

name: Veg Talmail Soup
description: Vegetable soup is a simple, nourishing soup made primarily from various vegetables, leafy greens, herbs, and spices.

name: Veg Soup
description: Vegetable soup is a simple, nourishing soup made primarily from various vegetables, leafy greens, herbs, and spices.

name: Cream Of Mushroom Soup
description: Cream of mushroom soup is a creamy and rich soup featuring mushrooms as its main ingredient.

name: Amritsari Kulcha
description: Amritsari kulcha is a popular stuffed flatbread dish originating from Amritsar, Punjab, India. It's a type of naan and is typically stuffed with a mixture of mashed potatoes, onions, and spices. It's known for its crunchiness and is often enjoyed with butter, and various pickles and curds.

name: Sweet Corn Soup
description: Sweet corn soup is a popular soup dish known for its creamy texture and delicate sweetness, often featuring fresh or canned sweet corn kernels, broth, and seasonings.

name: Tandoori Soya Chaap
description: Tandoori Soya Chaap is a popular vegetarian dish that's a delicious and protein-rich alternative to meat, especially when considering the meat-free options available. It's made by marinating soya chaap, a kind of mock meat made from soybean chunks and flour, in a flavorful blend of tandoori spices, yogurt, and herbs.

name: Green Tea
description: Green tea, also known as unoxidized tea, is a beverage made from the leaves of the Camellia sinensis plant. It is characterized by minimal oxidation during processing, resulting in a fresh, grassy, and often slightly bitter flavor,

name: Malai Chaap
description: Malai chaap is a vegetarian dish popular in India, especially North India, where it is known for its rich, creamy gravy and soft, marinated soybean chaap (or "slice").

name: Tandoori Chaap
description: Tandoori Chaap Recipe | Make Delicious Tandoori Chaap. In a bowl, mix 200 grams of hung curd, 2 tablespoons of ginger-garlic paste, 1 tablespoon of red chili powder, 1 tablespoon of garam masala, 1 tablespoon of kasuri methi, 1 tablespoon of lemon juice, and salt to taste.

name: Afghani Chaap
description: Afghani Soya Chaap is a vegetarian dish where soya chaap pieces are marinated in a creamy and aromatic Afghani-style gravy and then cooked in a tandoor or on a skewer.

name: Lemon Chaap
description: Lemon Chaap is a vegetarian and protein diet as it is primarily made of soyabean.

name: Stuff Chaap
description: Stuffed Chaap is made from soyabean flour with stuffing of paneer and masalas with an outer coating of maid and cornflour.

name: Mushroom Chaap
description: Veg Chaap, or Soya Chaap, is primarily made from a combination of soya flour and all-purpose flour (maida), along with spices and water.

name: Pudina Chaap
description: Pudina Chaap is a dish that combines soya chaap (chunks) with a flavorful mint (pudina) sauce, often served as an appetizer.

name: Ajwain Chaap
description: Ajwain Chaap is a flavorful dish where a type of flatbread (chaap) is seasoned with ajwain (carom seeds) and then either fried, baked, or grilled. The chaap, often made from flour, is then either stuffed with various fillings or can be served plain with ajwain seasoning.

name: Green Salad
description: A green salad, or green leaf salad, another name for garden salad, is most often composed of leafy vegetables such as lettuce varieties, spinach, or rocket (arugula).

name: Russian Salad
description: Russian salad is a creamy vegetable salad. It's made with boiled vegetables in a creamy mayonnaise dressing. Normally, it's made with boiled potatoes, carrots, peas before being tossed with cornichons and coated in a mayonnaise sauce.

name: Cheese Corn Salad
description: A cheese corn salad is a refreshing summer salad with sweet corn kernels, often combined with different types of cheese like Cotija, Parmesan, or feta, and other ingredients like red onion, bell peppers, and a creamy or tangy dressing.

name: Mix Raita
description: Raita is a side dish and condiment in Indian cuisine made of dahi (yogurt, often referred to as curd) together with raw or cooked vegetables, fruit, or, in the case of boondi raita, with fried droplets of batter made from besan (chickpea flour, generally labeled as gram flour). Raita. Cucumber and mint raita.

name: Aloo Raita
description: Potato raita is a variation of the traditional Indian raita, which typically features yogurt mixed with various ingredients like vegetables, herbs, and spices.

name: Boondi Raita
description: Boondi raita is a yogurt based dish made using spice powders and crisp fried boondi.

name: Plain Curd
description: Plain curd, also known as plain yogurt, is a thick, creamy, and slightly tangy dairy product made by fermenting milk with beneficial bacteria.

name: Pineapple Raita
description: Fusion of yogurt and fresh pineapple chunks. This vibrant raita balances the creamy richness of yogurt with the juicy sweetness of pineapple, creating a refreshing side that pairs perfectly with spicy dishes or simply as a cooling accompaniment to any meal

name: Fruit Raita
description: Grate the cucumber and squeeze out excess water. In a mixing bowl, combine the yogurt, grated cucumber, roasted cumin powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until all the ingredients are well incorporated.

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: A grilled sandwich, also known as a panini, toastie, or grilled cheese, is a type of sandwich where the bread is cooked, usually on a grill, until it's golden brown and the fillings, such as cheese and other ingredients, are melted. This cooking method gives the sandwich a warm, crispy texture and a melty, gooey interior.

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: A grilled sandwich, also known as a panini, toastie, or grilled cheese, is a type of sandwich where the bread is cooked, usually on a grill, until it's golden brown and the fillings, such as cheese and other ingredients, are melted. This cooking method gives the sandwich a warm, crispy texture and a melty, gooey interior.

name: Corn Sandwich
description: Corn Sandwich Recipe (With Cheddar Cheese)A corn sandwich is a type of sandwich that features corn as a main ingredient. It can be made with various fillings, such as cheese, vegetables, and spices, and can be prepared in different ways, including grilled, toasted, or pan-fried. A common variation is the corn mayo sandwich, which utilizes a filling of boiled sweet corn, onions, bell peppers, and seasonings, often with a touch of mayonnaise

name: Corn Sandwich
description: Corn Sandwich Recipe (With Cheddar Cheese)A corn sandwich is a type of sandwich that features corn as a main ingredient. It can be made with various fillings, such as cheese, vegetables, and spices, and can be prepared in different ways, including grilled, toasted, or pan-fried. A common variation is the corn mayo sandwich, which utilizes a filling of boiled sweet corn, onions, bell peppers, and seasonings, often with a touch of mayonnaise

name: Corn Cheese
description: A corn cheese sandwich is a simple and flavorful sandwich that combines sweet corn kernels with cheese, often with other vegetables and spices, and typically served on bread. The filling is usually spread between two slices of bread and may be toasted or grilled to melt the cheese and enhance the flavor.

name: Corn Cheese
description: A corn cheese sandwich is a simple and flavorful sandwich that combines sweet corn kernels with cheese, often with other vegetables and spices, and typically served on bread. The filling is usually spread between two slices of bread and may be toasted or grilled to melt the cheese and enhance the flavor.

name: Cheese Onion
description: A cheese and onion sandwich, also known as a cheese toastie or grilled cheese in some regions, is a sandwich made with cheese and onions, typically between two slices of bread. The cheese is often melted and can be Cheddar or other varieties, while the onions may be raw or grilled with the cheese.

name: Cheese Onion
description: A cheese and onion sandwich, also known as a cheese toastie or grilled cheese in some regions, is a sandwich made with cheese and onions, typically between two slices of bread. The cheese is often melted and can be Cheddar or other varieties, while the onions may be raw or grilled with the cheese.

name: Tandoori Sandwich
description: A tandoori sandwich is a grilled sandwich inspired by the flavors of tandoori cuisine. It typically involves a combination of tandoori-marinated ingredients, such as paneer (Indian cheese) or chicken, along with other components like onions, peppers, and a tandoori-flavored sauce or mayonnaise, all grilled between slices of bread.

name: Tandoori Sandwich
description: A tandoori sandwich is a grilled sandwich inspired by the flavors of tandoori cuisine. It typically involves a combination of tandoori-marinated ingredients, such as paneer (Indian cheese) or chicken, along with other components like onions, peppers, and a tandoori-flavored sauce or mayonnaise, all grilled between slices of bread.

name: Tandoori Cheese Sandwich
description: A tandoori cheese sandwich combines elements of Indian tandoori cuisine with a classic cheese sandwich. It typically involves a tandoori-seasoned paneer (Indian cottage cheese) filling, along with other vegetables like onions and capsicums, and mozzarella or other cheese, all baked or grilled between two slices of bread.

name: Tandoori Cheese Sandwich
description: A tandoori cheese sandwich combines elements of Indian tandoori cuisine with a classic cheese sandwich. It typically involves a tandoori-seasoned paneer (Indian cottage cheese) filling, along with other vegetables like onions and capsicums, and mozzarella or other cheese, all baked or grilled between two slices of bread.

name: Achaari Sandwich(Meal)
description: An achaari sandwich is a type of sandwich that typically features a filling of South Asian style pickles, often including mango, and other pickled vegetables, or a combination of both, between slices of bread. The "achaari" part refers to the use of pickles in the filling, a common ingredient in South Asian cuisine.

name: Mexican Sandwich (Meal)
description: Mexican sandwiches, often called "tortas" or "cemitas", are a popular dish featuring various fillings within a bread roll or bread slice. description: This Tandoori Paneer Sandwich has a spicy paneer filling with cilantro chutney, sriracha mayonnaise & cheese! It’s spicy, cheesy and has a infused smoky flavor through charcoal. It makes the perfect brunch for the weekend.

name: Mint Lover Sandwich
description: A mint sandwich, also sometimes referred to as a mint chutney sandwich or a mint-based sandwich, is a type of sandwich that incorporates the refreshing flavor of mint. It can be made with various ingredients, often featuring a base of bread with a mint-based filling or topping.

name: Mint Lover Sandwich
description: A mint sandwich, also sometimes referred to as a mint chutney sandwich or a mint-based sandwich, is a type of sandwich that incorporates the refreshing flavor of mint. It can be made with various ingredients, often featuring a base of bread with a mint-based filling or topping.

name: Mozz. Classic Corn
description: A Mozz Classic Corn Sandwich, often referred to as a Corn Cheese Sandwich or simply Corn Sandwich, is a popular dish featuring sweet corn kernels, cheese (usually mozzarella), and sometimes other ingredients like mayonnaise, sugar, and vegetables, served in a sandwich or toasted format. The classic version typically involves sautéing sweet corn with butter, adding mayonnaise and sugar, and then topping with shredded mozzarella cheese before baking or grilling until the cheese is melted and browned.

name: Mozz. Classic Corn
description: A Mozz Classic Corn Sandwich, often referred to as a Corn Cheese Sandwich or simply Corn Sandwich, is a popular dish featuring sweet corn kernels, cheese (usually mozzarella), and sometimes other ingredients like mayonnaise, sugar, and vegetables, served in a sandwich or toasted format. The classic version typically involves sautéing sweet corn with butter, adding mayonnaise and sugar, and then topping with shredded mozzarella cheese before baking or grilling until the cheese is melted and browned.

name: Mozz. Cheese Onion Olive
description: A sandwich containing mozzarella cheese, onion, and olives could be a variation of a cheese sandwich, a submarine sandwich, or even a custom-made creation. It would typically feature mozzarella cheese, sliced onions, and either black or green olives, all sandwiched between slices of bread.

name: Mozz. Cheese Onion Olive
description: A sandwich containing mozzarella cheese, onion, and olives could be a variation of a cheese sandwich, a submarine sandwich, or even a custom-made creation. It would typically feature mozzarella cheese, sliced onions, and either black or green olives, all sandwiched between slices of bread.

name: Club Sandwich
description: A club sandwich or clubhouse sandwich, is a three-layer sandwich consisting of three slices of bread (traditionally toasted), sliced cooked poultry, fried bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise.[1][2] It is often cut diagonally into quarters or halves and held together by cocktail sticks.

name: Club Sandwich
description: A club sandwich or clubhouse sandwich, is a three-layer sandwich consisting of three slices of bread (traditionally toasted), sliced cooked poultry, fried bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise.[1][2] It is often cut diagonally into quarters or halves and held together by cocktail sticks.

name: Dum Aloo
description: Dum aloo, meaning "steam-cooked or slow-cooked potatoes" in Hindi, is a popular Indian dish, particularly in North India . It's a curried dish featuring baby potatoes simmered in a rich, spiced gravy. The dish is also known as Aloor dum in Bengali.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Shahi Paneer is a North Indian vegetarian dish where paneer (Indian cottage cheese) is cooked in a creamy, rich gravy, typically made with tomatoes, onions, ground cashews, and cream. It is often served with traditional flatbreads like tawa roti or tandoori roti, or with rice. The dish is known for its subtle sweetness and is considered a royal delicacy, hence the name "Shahi" (royal).

name: Kadahi Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer is a popular vegetarian Indian dish where paneer (Indian cheese) and bell peppers are cooked in a flavorful, freshly ground spice powder. It's known for its spicy, warming, and uniquely seasoned flavor profile, differentiating it from other paneer dishes like Paneer Butter Masala or Shahi Paneer.

name: Paneer Pasanda
description: Paneer Pasanda (Restaurant Style Recipe)Paneer pasanda is a popular North Indian vegetarian dish, a creamy and flavorful curry featuring paneer (Indian cottage cheese) slices stuffed with a rich filling and served in a creamy, onion-tomato-based gravy. The dish's name, "Pasanda," translates to "favorite" in Urdu, reflecting its widespread popularity.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Paneer bhurji, a popular North Indian dish, is essentially a scrambled Indian cottage cheese (paneer) cooked with onions, tomatoes, and spices. It's similar in style to egg bhurji, but made with crumbled paneer instead of eggs. The dish is often served with roti, naan, or other Indian breads.

name: Paneer Makhani
description: Paneer makhani, also known as paneer butter masala, is a rich and creamy Indian dish consisting of paneer (Indian cottage cheese) in a tomato-based butter gravy. It's a popular North Indian dish, often served with naan bread or rice. The gravy is made with butter, tomatoes, cashews, and spices like red chili powder and garam masala, creating a flavorful and indulgent sauce.

name: Paneer Dilruba
description: Paneer Dilruba is a popular Indian dish made with paneer (Indian cottage cheese), typically served as a starter or main course. It's known for its rich, creamy gravy and mild, flavorful taste, making it a favorite in many regions. The name "Dilruba" translates to "heart-stealer" in Hindi, reflecting its appealing nature.

name: Mattar Paneer
description: Matar paneer, a popular North Indian dish, is a vegetarian dish consisting of peas (matar) and paneer (Indian cottage cheese) in a tomato-based sauce, often spiced with garam masala. It is commonly served with rice or Indian bread. Variations of the dish may include additional ingredients like potatoes, corn, yogurt, or cream.

name: Palak Paneer
description: Palak paneer is a popular North Indian dish that features cubes of paneer (Indian cheese) simmered in a creamy, green spinach gravy. The spinach is typically boiled and pureed to create a smooth base for the curry, and then spices like ginger, garlic, and garam masala are added.

name: Paneer Do Pyaza
description: Paneer Do Pyaza is a vegetarian dish from Indian cuisine, featuring paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cooked with a generous amount of onions. The name "Do Pyaza" translates to "two onions" in Persian, indicating that the dish is prepared with a substantial quantity of onions, both in the gravy and as a garnish.

name: Paneer Takka Tak
description: Chunks of paneer, a type of fresh cheese, are marinated in spices and then arranged on a stick with capsicums (bell peppers), onions and tomatoes. These sticks are grilled in a tandoor, and the dish is served hot, seasoned with lemon juice and chaat masala.

name: Paneer Tikka Butter Masala
description: Paneer Tikka Butter Masala (also known as Paneer Makhani) is a North Indian dish where grilled paneer (Indian cheese) is served in a rich and creamy tomato-butter gravy.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala, also known as Paneer Makhani, is a popular North Indian dish featuring soft paneer cubes in a rich, creamy, and flavorful tomato-butter gravy. It's known for its indulgent flavors and is often served with naan or rice. The dish is prepared by combining paneer with a tomato-based gravy that typically includes butter, onions, tomatoes, cashews, and various spices.

name: Handi Paneer
description: Handi Paneer is a vegetarian Indian dish made with paneer (Indian cheese) and a flavorful gravy. The name "Handi" refers to the traditional earthen pot it's often cooked in, though it can also be prepared in a heavy-bottomed pan. The dish is known for its rich, creamy, and aromatic gravy, often seasoned with spices like cumin, coriander, turmeric, garam masala, and kasuri methi.

name: Mushroom Paneer
description: Mushroom paneer is a popular Indian dish, a vegetarian curry made with paneer (Indian cheese) and mushrooms, typically in a creamy tomato-based gravy. It's a flavorful dish that combines the mildness of paneer with the earthy taste of mushrooms, often spiced with garam masala and other aromatic ingredients.

name: Mushroom Masala
description: Mushroom masala is a flavorful Indian dish featuring mushrooms cooked in a rich, aromatic gravy. It's typically made with a base of onions, tomatoes, garlic, and ginger, along with a blend of Indian spices like cumin, coriander, turmeric, and garam masala. The dish is known for its hearty texture and robust flavors, making it a popular vegetarian choice. It's commonly served with steamed rice, naan, or roti.

name: Paneer Mumtaj
description: Paneer Mumtaz is a rich, creamy, and indulgent Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in a flavorful gravy. It is often described as a royal and luxurious dish, suitable for special occasions or when you want to treat yourself to something special. The gravy is typically made with a blend of aromatic spices, tomatoes, and cream, creating a decadent experience.

name: Paneer Korma
description: Paneer Korma is a rich, creamy Indian curry featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in a flavorful gravy, often described as Mughlai-style. The gravy is typically made with fried onions, cashews, and a blend of aromatic spices. It's known for its delicate, yet richly flavored sauce, often incorporating yogurt or cream, and a careful balance of spices like cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Paneer Korma is a popular dish, especially enjoyed with Indian breads like naan or rice.

name: Pahadi Puranchi
description: "Pahadi ranchi" refers to the local cuisine and food culture of the Mal Paharia people, an indigenous group in the Jharkhand region, not a specific vegetable. The Mal Paharia people have their own unique culinary traditions, including dishes made with wild edible greens, mushrooms, and bamboo shoots.

name: Paneer Curry
description: Paneer curry refers to a variety of North Indian dishes featuring paneer (Indian cheese) as the main ingredient, often in a spiced gravy. Popular examples include Paneer Butter Masala (or Makhani), Shahi Paneer, Kadai Paneer, and Palak Paneer. These dishes vary in their specific ingredients, spice levels, and preparation methods, but they generally involve cooking paneer in a flavorful sauce made with various combinations of tomatoes, onions, cream, nuts, and spices.

name: Pahadi Band Paneer Curry
description: Pahadi Paneer, also known as Pahadi Paneer Masala, is a flavorful and spicy Indian dish made with paneer (Indian cheese) and a blend of aromatic spices. The dish is known for its quick and easy preparation, using readily available ingredients, and is typically served with roti, naan, poori, or paratha.

name: Pahadi Paneer Curry
description: Pahadi paneer curry is a flavorful Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in a spiced gravy, often with a distinctive "pahadi" (mountain-style) twist. This twist usually involves the use of freshly ground spices and sometimes includes ingredients like bell peppers and onions. It's a popular dish that can be enjoyed with various Indian breads or rice.

name: Paneer Rara
description: Paneer Rara, also known as Paneer Rahra, is a North Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in two forms: cubed and minced, simmered in a rich, flavorful onion-tomato based gravy. The dish is characterized by the combination of tender paneer cubes and the texture of crumbled or grated paneer, creating a unique culinary experience. It's often served with roti or paratha.

name: Mushroom Do Payaza
description: Mushroom do pyaza recipe is a flavorsome, delightful dish featuring button mushrooms cooked with lightly caramelized onions, tomatoes and ground spices.

name: Diwani Handi
description: Diwan Handi, also known as Veg Diwani Handi, is a traditional Indian dish featuring a medley of vegetables cooked in a rich, creamy gravy, often associated with royal cuisine. The name "Diwani" suggests a regal origin, and the dish is known for its aromatic spices like cumin, coriander, and garam masala. It's a popular choice for festive occasions and celebrations, adding a touch of opulence to the dining experience.

name: Ajwain Chaap
description: Ajwain is a spice, commonly known as carom seeds, derived from the plant Trachyspermum ammi. It has a pungent, slightly bitter flavor reminiscent of thyme and anise. The seeds are small, oval, and grayish-brown, and are often used in Indian cuisine to season various dishes like breads, curries, and pickles. Ajwain is also known for its digestive benefits and aromatic properties.

name: kachumber salad
description: Kachumber, or cachumber, is a salad dish in Indian cuisine and Pakistani cuisine consisting of fresh chopped tomatoes, cucumbers, onions, unripe mangoes, lemon juice, and sometimes, chili peppers.

name: Onino salad
description: Onion Salad also known as Laccha Pyaaz or Masala Pyaz is a quick Indian salad made with fresh cut raw onion rings, ground spices, lemon and fresh herbs.

name: Steam rice
description: Steamed rice is cooked rice, typically white rice, prepared by boiling and then steaming the rice until it is tender and the water is absorbed.

name: Zeera Rice
description: Steamed rice is cooked rice, typically white rice, prepared by boiling and then steaming the rice until it is tender and the water is absorbed.

name: Masala rice
description: Masala rice, also known as spiced rice, is a flavorful Indian dish made by cooking rice with a mixture of aromatic spices and often vegetables.

name: Veg Triple Rice
description: triple rice is complete meal with combination of rice, hakka noodles and fried noodles which is served with spicy schezwan manchurian gravy.

name: Veg Pulao
description: Pulao is a one-pot dish where rice and other ingredients are cooked together, blending flavors uniformly.

name: Matar pulao
description: Pulao is a one-pot dish where rice and other ingredients are cooked together, blending flavors uniformly.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Biryani, Biriani, Beryani or Beriani is an South Asian dish that comes in set of rice-based foods made with spices, rice (usually basmati) and vegetables.

name: Veg Dum Biryani
description: A popular spice and vegetables mixed favored rice one pot meal recipe.

name: Hyderabadi Biryani
description: Hyderabadi biryani is a renowned Indian dish, particularly famous for its aromatic rice and flavorfulness

name: Chicken Fingers [8pc]
description: Chicken fingers, also known as chicken tenders or chicken goujons, are a type of fried chicken dish made from the pectoralis minor muscle of the chicken. This muscle is a smaller cut of the chicken breast, located under the main breast meat. The meat is typically breaded and deep-fried, although it can also be grilled or baked. They are a popular item in many fast-food chains and restaurants.

name: Dry Papad
description: Dry papad is a thin, crispy, flatbread made from dried lentils, rice, or other flours, often seasoned with spices and dried in the sun.

name: Chicken Nuggets [8pc]
description: A chicken nugget is a food product consisting of a small piece of deboned chicken meat that is breaded or battered, then deep-fried or baked.

name: Fry papad
description: Dry papad is a thin, crispy, flatbread made from dried lentils, rice, or other flours, often seasoned with spices and dried in the sun.

name: American Crispy Chicken [6pc]
description: American crispy chicken, often referred to as fried chicken or Southern fried chicken, is a dish consisting of chicken pieces that are coated in seasoned flour or batter and then fried. The breading creates a crispy exterior while keeping the chicken moist inside. It's a popular dish across the United States, with various regional variations and preparation methods.

name: Masala Papad
description: Masala Papad RecipeMasala Papad is a popular Indian appetizer or snack made by topping a crispy papadum (thin, flatbread) with a mixture of chopped onions, tomatoes, coriander, and spices.

name: Grilled Chicken
description: Grilled chicken is a dish where chicken pieces are cooked over direct heat, typically on a grill, imparting a smoky, charred flavor and a crispy exterior. It's a popular way to prepare chicken, offering a relatively quick and flavorful meal. The cooking method involves radiant heat, often from below, above, or from the side, and is commonly used for meat and vegetables.

name: Peanut Masala
description: Peanut masala, also known as masala peanuts, is a popular Indian snack made by coating roasted or fried peanuts with a blend of aromatic spices and herbs.

name: Fish Finger
description: Fish fingers, also known as fish sticks, are a processed food consisting of a whitefish or pinkfish (like cod, hake, haddock, or pollock) that has been battered or breaded and formed into a rectangular shape. They are commonly found in the frozen food section of supermarkets and can be cooked in various ways, including baking, grilling, shallow frying, or deep-frying.

name: Cream peanut masala
description: Peanut masala, also known as masala peanuts, is a popular Indian snack made by coating roasted or fried peanuts with a blend of aromatic spices and herbs.

name: Grilled Fish
description: Grilled fish is a cooking method where fish is cooked over a fire or hot coals, resulting in a smoky flavor and slightly charred exterior. It's a versatile dish, enjoyed on its own or with various sides and sauces. Various cultures have their own unique grilled fish dishes, such as the Indonesian "ikan bakar" and the Bavarian "steckerlfisch".

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: A grilled cheese sandwich is made by placing a cheese filling, often cheddar or American cheese, between two slices of bread, which is then put on a pan to heat until the bread browns and the cheese melts.

name: Chilly Chicken [Boneless]
description: Chilli chicken is a popular Indo-Chinese dish known for its spicy and flavorful taste, featuring chicken stir-fried with chilies and other spices. It exists in both dry and gravy (or saucy) versions, offering flexibility in preparation. The dish is believed to have originated in Calcutta (now Kolkata), India, created by Chinese chefs to cater to the local Indian palate.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a warm beverage made by brewing ground coffee beans with hot water. It's a widely consumed drink, often enjoyed for its stimulating effects from caffeine and its rich, varied flavors. Different brewing methods, such as drip, French press, or espresso, can produce distinct characteristics in the final cup.

name: Cold sandwich
description: Cold Turkey SandwichA cold sandwich is a sandwich that is served without being heated, using cold ingredients like deli meats, cheeses, vegetables, and condiments, typically between two slices of bread or a roll

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee encompasses various forms, including iced coffee and cold brew, distinguished by their preparation methods. Iced coffee is made by brewing hot coffee and chilling it, often with ice and milk, while cold brew involves steeping coffee grounds in cold water for an extended period, resulting in a concentrated, less acidic brew. Both are served cold and can be customized with sweeteners and flavorings.

name: Paneer Sandwich
description: A paneer sandwich is a delicious and versatile Indian-style sandwich featuring a spiced paneer (Indian cheese) filling.

name: Mushroom and corn sandwich
description: Spread the mushrooms over the inner side of the bread (buttered side out). Top the bread with mushrooms & grated cheese. Sprinkle herbs and chili flakes. Place another slice of bread (buttered side out). Toast this in a sandwich toaster or on a pan until the cheese melts.

name: Aloo tikki wrap
description: The aloo tikki wrap is where street food magic meets meal-on-the-go realness.

name: Paneer Wrap
description: Paneer Kathi Roll is a Indian wrap with a filling of marinated and pan-fried paneer (Indian cheese), plenty of veggies and green chutney (mint chutney/ cilantro chutney).

name: Hangover Wrap
description: A "Hangover Wrap" is typically a breakfast wrap designed to alleviate hangover symptoms, often incorporating ingredients known to help with nausea, headaches, and fatigue.

name: Red Sauce Pasta
description: Red sauce pasta is a pasta dish featuring a sauce made primarily from tomatoes, often enhanced with ingredients like garlic, onions, herbs, and spices.

name: White Sauce Pasta
description: White sauce pasta, also known as béchamel sauce pasta, is a creamy and indulgent dish featuring pasta tossed in a rich, smooth white sauce.

name: Pepsi Glass
description: A soft drink is a non-alcoholic beverage, usually carbonated, and typically containing a sweetener. They often include flavorings, colorings, preservatives, and sometimes caffeine. Common examples include colas, lemon-lime drinks, and orange sodas.

name: Tandoori Pasta
description: Tandoori pasta is a fusion dish that combines the flavors of Indian tandoori cuisine with Italian pasta.

name: Fresh Lime Soda
description: Fresh lime soda is a refreshing, fizzy drink made with freshly squeezed lime juice, soda water, and a touch of sweetness. It's known for its tangy, zesty flavor and is often enjoyed as a thirst-quencher on a hot day. The drink typically includes lime juice, soda or sparkling water, sugar or a sweetener, and sometimes a garnish of lime or mint.

name: Mix Sauce Pasta
description: Mix sauce pasta, also known as pink sauce pasta, is a dish that combines the rich creaminess of white sauce with the tangy flavor of red sauce.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: A mojito without alcohol is called a "virgin mojito" or "nojito". The Cojito adds coconut flavor, often through the use of coconut-flavored rum. A dirty mojito calls for gold rum instead of white rum, and raw sugar or demerara sugar.

name: Watermelon Mojito
description: A Watermelon Mojito is a refreshing variation of the classic Mojito cocktail, originating from Cuba, that combines the traditional elements of rum, lime, and mint with the sweetness and flavor of watermelon. It typically includes muddled watermelon, mint leaves, lime juice, a sweetener (like simple syrup), and is topped with soda water. The result is a sweet, citrusy, and minty drink with a distinct watermelon taste, perfect for warm weather.

name: Blue Moon Mojito
description: A Blue Moon Mojito is a colorful variation of the classic Mojito cocktail, distinguished by the addition of Blue Curaçao liqueur. This gives the drink a vibrant blue hue, reminiscent of crystal-clear waters. Like a traditional Mojito, it also features rum, lime juice, sugar (or simple syrup), mint, and is topped with soda water. The blue curaçao adds a citrusy, slightly sweet flavor, complementing the mint and lime.

name: Green Apple Mojito
description: A Green Apple Mojito is a variation of the classic mojito cocktail, substituting or supplementing the traditional lime with green apple flavors. It typically includes white rum, green apple syrup or juice, lime juice, mint, and soda water. The green apple adds a sweet and tart complexity, making it a refreshing choice, especially for those who enjoy a twist on the original.

name: Banana Shake
description: Banana Milkshake, a healthy and creamy shake prepared with ripe banana and milk is rich in potassium, dietary fiber and energy. In this shake recipe, banana provides the primary base for smoothness but ice cream gives richer creaminess to its texture.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: This refreshing blend, made with fresh strawberries, milk, ice cubes, and Nestlé MILKMAID, offers a burst of fruity flavour paired with a smooth, velvety texture that's sure to please your taste buds. Ready in just minutes, it's the perfect treat to cool down on a hot day or enjoy as a quick, delicious snack anytime.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: a drink made of milk and ice cream and a flavour such as fruit or chocolate, mixed together until it is smooth

name: Oreo Shake
description: For an Oreo milkshake, the ingredient list is simple: softened vanilla ice cream, milk, and chopped Oreo cookies.

name: Black Current Shake
description: A Black Currant Shake is a refreshing and tangy beverage made by blending black currants, milk, and often ice cream or black currant crush.

name: Stuffed Garlic Bread
description: Stuffed garlic bread is a variation of the classic garlic bread, where the bread is filled with various ingredients before baking. Typically, a baguette or similar loaf is partially sliced, and the cuts are filled with a mixture of garlic, butter or oil, and other toppings like cheese, herbs, or spices. The bread is then baked, resulting in a flavorful and savory dish.

name: Cold Coffee Shake
description: Combine instant coffee, milk, vanilla, sugar, ice cubes, and chocolate syrup in a blender; blend until smooth.

name: Potato Karket
description: Thin, fried pancakes made from grated potatoes, sometimes with added flour or matzo meal, and seasonings.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: butterscotch, usually hard candy made by boiling brown sugar and butter and sometimes corn syrup together in water.

name: Chessy Nachos
description: Cheesy nachos, a Tex-Mex dish, typically consist of tortilla chips topped with melted cheese or cheese sauce, and often include additional toppings like meat, vegetables, and condiments. The most basic form features just tortilla chips and melted cheese.

name: Mushroom Karket
description: A finely chopped mixture of mushrooms, onions, and herbs, sauteed and reduced to a paste.

name: Cheese Finger
description: Cheese fingers, also known as mozzarella sticks, are a popular appetizer or snack consisting of mozzarella cheese coated in breadcrumbs or batter and then deep-fried or baked. They are often served with tomato sauce or other dipping sauces like marinara, ranch, or honey mustard. The cheese, typically mozzarella, is cut into finger-sized pieces, breaded, and cooked until golden brown and crispy.

name: Corn Cheese Roll
description: A corn cheese roll is a snack, often a spring roll or similar shape, filled with a mixture of corn and cheese, and sometimes other ingredients like chili flakes or herbs. The filling is typically wrapped in a thin dough and fried until golden brown. It's a popular dish in some regions, often enjoyed as a snack or appetizer.

name: Golden fries
description: Golden fries, also known as French fries, are a popular side dish or snack consisting of fried potatoes cut into strips.

name: Fried Momos
description: Fried momos are a variation of the steamed dumpling dish, momo, where the dumplings are cooked by deep-frying or pan-frying instead of steaming. They are essentially the same as steamed momos in terms of dough and filling, but the cooking method results in a crispy outer layer.

name: Kurkure Momos
description: Kurkure momos are a popular street food in India, known for their crunchy, crispy exterior and juicy filling. They are a fusion dish that combines the traditional momo (a type of dumpling) with a coating of crushed cornflakes or breadcrumbs, giving them a unique "kurkure" (crunchy) texture when deep-fried.

name: Loaded Cheese Fries
description: Loaded cheese fries are a popular dish featuring french fries topped with various ingredients, most notably cheese and often including other items like bacon, sauces, and vegetables.

name: Afghani Momos
description: Afghani momos are a variation of the popular steamed dumpling dish, momo, that is popular in Afghanistan and other parts of South Asia. They are characterized by a flavorful, savory filling, often consisting of spiced ground meat or vegetables, encased in a soft, doughy exterior. The unique aspect of Afghani momos is their preparation method, which often involves marinating the steamed dumplings in a rich, aromatic marinade before grilling or pan-frying them to achieve a slightly charred, smoky flavor.

name: Masala Fries
description: Crispy oven roasted/air fried French fries tossed in a spicy and tangy sauce and topped with the most fun garnishes,

name: Veg Noodles
description: Noodles is a stir-fried dish of cooked noodles tossed in a flavorful mix of vegetables with herbs like garlic, ginger and seasonings like soy sauce and black pepper.

name: Ice Cream
description: Ice cream is a sweet, frozen dessert typically made from dairy products like milk and cream, combined with sweeteners (like sugar) and flavorings (like vanilla or chocolate). It's often whipped while freezing to incorporate air and prevent large ice crystals, resulting in a smooth, creamy texture.

name: Singapori Noodles
description: The dish typically features thin rice vermicelli noodles, a vibrant yellow color from curry powder, and a mix of meats (like char siu pork and shrimp), vegetables, and scrambled egg. It's known for its slightly spicy and savory flavor profile.

name: Kulfi
description: Kulfi is a traditional frozen dairy dessert originating from the Indian subcontinent, often referred to as "traditional Indian ice cream". It's denser and creamier than regular ice cream due to its unique preparation method, which doesn't involve churning. Kulfi is popular in India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Myanmar, and the Middle East, and can be found in various flavors like cream (malai), rose, mango, cardamom, saffron, and pistachio.

name: Hakka Noodles
description: Hakka noodles are a popular Indo-Chinese dish, featuring stir-fried noodles tossed with vegetables and sauces.

name: Chilly Garlic Noodles
description: Chilli Garlic Noodles are a flavorful, spicy, and quick-to-make dish, known for their aromatic and savory taste.

name: Cheese Noodles
description: Cheese noodles are a dish featuring noodles coated in a creamy cheese sauce or mixed with melted cheese.

name: Pan Fried Noodles
description: Pan-fried noodles are a dish of noodles that are cooked in a pan, typically with oil, until they achieve a desired level of crispiness.

description: Best deal great taste
