The pizza often includes a base of pizza dough, tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and other toppings like basil, tomatoes, or other vegetables. Some recipes incorporate a pesto base or other flavorful sauces. The sweet corn adds a unique sweetness and textural element to the overall pizza experience.

name: Cheese Chilly Pizza
description: A cheese chili pizza is a variation of pizza that includes chili peppers and cheese as key toppings. It typically consists of a flat, round dough base topped with tomato sauce, a generous layer of cheese (often mozzarella, but sometimes a blend), and sliced or diced chili peppers for a spicy kick.

name: Mushroom Chilly Pizza
description: Mushroom chilli pizza is a pizza topped with mushrooms and chilli peppers, often alongside other common pizza toppings like cheese and sauce. It can be made with various types of mushrooms and may include additional ingredients like onions, peppers, or other vegetables. The spiciness level can be adjusted by adding more or less chilli flakes or using different types of chillies.

name: Farm House Pizza
description: A Farmhouse Pizza typically features fresh, vegetarian toppings like capsicum, tomatoes, and mushrooms. It's known for its fresh, crisp, and juicy ingredients, often reflecting a rustic or farm-fresh style. The term "Farmhouse" in pizza often implies a focus on simple, flavorful toppings sourced from a farm or garden.

name: Manchow Soup
description: Manchow soup is a popular Indo-Chinese soup, known for its spicy, hot flavor and ease of preparation. It's a dark brown, thick soup, typically made with a variety of vegetables, scallions, and sometimes chicken, thickened with cornstarch and flavored with soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and chili peppers. It's often served with crispy fried noodles and chopped spring onions. While the name suggests a connection to Manchuria, the soup is actually of Indian origin, specifically from Meghalaya.

name: Hot & Sour Soup
description: Hot and sour soup is a flavorful Chinese soup known for its contrasting tastes of sourness and spiciness. Typically, it features a meat-based broth (often with pork), and ingredients like tofu, day lily buds, wood ear fungus, and bamboo shoots. The sourness primarily comes from vinegar, while the spiciness is derived from chili peppers or chili oil.

name: Sweet Corn Soup
description: Sweet corn soup is a popular soup typically made from sweet corn kernels, broth or milk/cream, and various seasonings. It's a versatile dish with many regional variations and is known for its creamy texture and sweet flavor.

name: Mushroom Soup
description: Mushroom soup is a soup prepared with mushrooms as a primary ingredient. It can range from a simple broth-based soup to a rich, creamy concoction, often incorporating cream or milk, and various flavorings. Common variations include cream of mushroom soup, a simple soup where a roux is thinned with milk or cream and mushrooms are added. Mushroom soup is also a base ingredient in many casserole and comfort food recipes.

name: Spl Desi Ghee Tikki
description: Aloo tikki, also known as aloo cutlet or potato cutlet, is a popular Indian snack or appetizer. It typically consists of mashed potatoes, spices, and sometimes peas, formed into patties and fried until crispy. When made with desi ghee, the tikkis are cooked in clarified butter, which gives them a rich, aromatic flavor and a distinct texture.

name: Spl. Dahi kabab
description: Dahi Kabab, also known as Dahi ke Kebab, are a popular North Indian vegetarian appetizer, featuring patties made from hung curd, paneer, and spices, with a crispy exterior and a creamy, melt-in-your-mouth center. They are often served as a snack or part of a main course, and are a staple in Awadhi cuisine, hailing from Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.

name: Cheese Corn Cutlet
description: A cheese corn cutlet is a snack made from sweet corn, mashed potatoes, and spices, shaped into patties, coated with breadcrumbs, and fried until golden and crispy. It can also be made with just corn and spices, creating a corn patty or corn tikki. These cutlets are often enjoyed as a monsoon treat in some regions of India when fresh corn is available.

name: Mint Mojito
description: Its combination of sweetness, citrus, and herbaceous mint flavors is intended to complement the rum, and has made the mojito a popular summer drink. Mix mint sprigs with sugar and lime juice. Add splash of soda water and fill the glass with ice.

name: Masala Soda
description: Masala soda is a refreshing Indian beverage, typically a mix of carbonated water, lemon juice, and a blend of spices, offering a tangy and slightly spicy taste. It's a popular summer drink, especially in North India, and is known for its potential to aid in detoxification and hydration.

name: Lemon Soda
description: Lemon soda is a refreshing, carbonated beverage, often featuring a lemon or lemon-lime flavor. It can be a clear, fizzy drink or a cloudy, homemade concoction, and is enjoyed worldwide, with various regional names and variations.

name: Shahi Milk Badam
description: Shahi Milk Badam, also known as Badam Milk, is a popular Indian beverage, particularly enjoyed during winters and as a refreshing cooler in summer. It's a creamy, slightly sweet drink made from almonds, often flavored with saffron and cardamom. The drink is known for its soothing and divinity-inducing qualities.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a brewed beverage made from roasted coffee beans, typically served hot. It is known for its dark color, slightly bitter and acidic taste, and stimulating effect due to caffeine. The drink is made by pouring hot water over ground coffee, extracting flavor and aroma from the beans.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee, as described on Wikipedia, encompasses a variety of chilled coffee beverages, including iced coffee and cold brew coffee. Iced coffee is made by brewing hot coffee and then cooling it, often with ice, milk, or sweeteners. Cold brew coffee, on the other hand, is made by steeping coffee grounds in cold water for an extended period, resulting in a concentrated coffee that is then diluted with water or milk.

name: Badam Milk Shake
description: Badam milk shake, also known as almond milk shake, is a popular Indian beverage. It's a creamy and sweet drink made with ground almonds, milk, and sugar, offering a refreshing and nutritious option, especially during warmer months. The drink is known for its nutty flavor and can be enjoyed as a breakfast drink, dessert, or after-meal beverage.

name: Vanilla Milk Shake
description: A vanilla milkshake is a sweet, cold beverage typically made by blending milk, vanilla ice cream, and vanilla extract. It's often thickened with the ice cream and can be further customized with additional sweeteners or flavorings.

name: Water Bottle 1 Litre
description: Great Taste

name: Soda
description: Soda, or soft drink, is a sweetened, carbonated beverage, typically flavored and containing added sweeteners like sugar or high-fructose corn syrup. It is called "soft" to distinguish it from alcoholic "hard" drinks. The fizziness comes from dissolved carbon dioxide.

name: Paneer Ptties
description: Paneer patties, also known as paneer tikkis, are a popular Indian vegetarian snack or appetizer made with crumbled paneer (Indian cottage cheese), potatoes, and spices. They are typically shallow-fried or baked until golden brown and crispy. Paneer patties can be enjoyed on their own, with chutney, or as a burger patty.

name: Allo Patties
description: Aloo tikki, also known as aloo patties, are a popular Indian snack consisting of spiced mashed potato patties, often served with chutneys and yogurt. The name "aloo tikki" literally translates to "potato patties" in Hindi-Urdu. These patties are a common street food in India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh, and are enjoyed by people of all ages.

name: Pineapple Pastry
description: A pineapple pastry is a sweet baked good, often a cake or tart, featuring pineapple as a primary ingredient, either as a filling or as part of the dough. Pineapple pastries include items like pineapple tarts, pineapple cakes, and pineapple upside-down cakes.

name: Strawberry  Pastry
description: Strawberry pastries can refer to a variety of baked goods featuring strawberries, such as pies, cakes, tarts, and shortcakes. These pastries often incorporate fresh or frozen strawberries, sometimes with added ingredients like sugar, whipped cream, or strawberry-flavored gelatin.

name: Mango Pastry
description: A mango pastry typically refers to a dessert item, often a cake or tart, featuring mango as a primary ingredient. It usually involves incorporating mango flavor or actual mango pieces into the pastry, often with a creamy or fruity component. Examples include mango cake, mango float (an icebox cake), and mango pudding.

name: Butterscotch Pastry
description: A butterscotch pastry typically features a butterscotch flavor or filling, often using a base of butter and brown sugar, and sometimes incorporating vanilla or other ingredients. The pastry itself could be a cake, pie, or another form of baked good.

name: Choco Chip Pastry
description: A choco chip pastry, often a type of drop cookie, is a baked good characterized by the inclusion of chocolate chips or morsels within a dough base. While the term "pastry" might evoke images of flaky, layered baked goods like croissants or puff pastry, the term is sometimes used more broadly to describe any baked item that is sweet and typically enjoyed as a dessert or snack. In the context of chocolate chip cookies, the dough is typically made from flour, butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla, with chocolate chips added.

name: Black Forest Pastry
description: A Black Forest pastry, also known as Black Forest cake or Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte, is a chocolate cake with layers of whipped cream and cherries, typically soaked in Kirsch (a cherry liqueur).

name: White Forest Pastry
description: White Forest pastries are a variation of the Black Forest cake, typically featuring layers of vanilla sponge cake, whipped cream, and cherries, but replacing the chocolate cake layers with vanilla and often incorporating white chocolate. They are known for their creamy, soft, and luscious taste, offering a delightful combination of flavors and textures.

name: Red Valvet Pastry
description: Red velvet cake is a popular American dessert known for its distinctive red color, often enhanced by red food coloring. It typically features a soft, moist, and slightly tangy flavor profile, achieved through the use of ingredients like cocoa powder, buttermilk, and vinegar. The cake is traditionally paired with cream cheese or ermine frosting.

name: Truffle Pastry
description: refers to a type of chocolate confectionery. It typically features a rich chocolate ganache center, which may be coated in a layer of chocolate or another coating, and often rolled in cocoa powder, nuts, or other toppings. These confections are named for their resemblance to the edible fungus, the truffle.

name: Spl Dal Makhni
description: Dal Makhani is a popular North Indian dish made with whole black lentils (urad), kidney beans (rajma), butter, and cream. It's known for its rich, creamy texture, achieved through slow cooking and the addition of butter and cream. The dish is believed to have originated in Moti Mahal restaurant in Delhi.

name: Shahi Gravy
description: Shahi gravy, often associated with shahi paneer, is a rich, creamy, and aromatic sauce from Mughlai cuisine, known for its royal and indulgent character. It's typically made with a base of onions, tomatoes, nuts (like cashews), and seeds, combined with yogurt and cream, and infused with fragrant spices. The term "shahi" (royal) signifies its association with dishes prepared for special occasions and royalty.

name: Gravy Chaap
description: Gravy chaap is a popular North Indian dish featuring marinated and grilled or fried soya chaap (a meat substitute made from soy) in a rich, flavorful gravy. It's a common street food and restaurant dish, often enjoyed with roti or naan. The gravy is typically made with a base of onions, tomatoes, and a blend of spices, and can vary in its spiciness and creaminess.

name: Kadahi Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer is a popular Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) and bell peppers cooked in a spicy and flavorful gravy. It is characterized by the use of freshly ground spices, often including coriander seeds, red chilies, and other aromatic whole spices, known as Kadai masala. The dish can be prepared in both gravy and dry forms and is typically served with naan, roti, or rice.

name: Butter Paneer Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala, also known as Butter Paneer, is a popular Indian dish consisting of paneer (Indian cheese) cooked in a rich, creamy tomato-based gravy, typically with butter, spices, and sometimes cashews. It's known for its mild sweetness and is a favorite in North Indian cuisine.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Shahi Paneer is a rich, creamy Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in a gravy made from tomatoes, onions, cashews, and cream, often flavored with aromatic spices. It's known for its royal, slightly sweet taste and is a popular choice in Indian restaurants and homes, typically served with naan, roti, or rice.

name: Gravy Paneer
description: "Grvy paneer" is not a recognized dish or term. The most likely interpretation is that you are asking about gravy-based paneer dishes, which are common in Indian cuisine. These dishes typically involve paneer (Indian cheese) cooked in a rich, flavorful gravy. Examples include Shahi Paneer, Palak Paneer, and Paneer Makhani.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Paneer Bhurji is a popular Indian dish featuring crumbled paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cooked with spices, onions, and tomatoes. It's a versatile dish, often enjoyed as a quick breakfast scramble, a side dish, or a filling for parathas and wraps. The dish gets its flavor from a base of sautéed onions, tomatoes, and green chilies, seasoned with aromatic spices like turmeric, cumin, coriander, and garam masala.

name: Kadahi Mushroom
description: Kadai Mushroom is a North Indian dish featuring sautéed mushrooms, onions, and bell peppers in a spiced, tomato-based gravy or dry preparation, cooked in a traditional Indian wok called a kadai. The dish is characterized by the use of a special spice blend called Kadai Masala, which enhances the aroma and flavor. It's a popular, flavorful, and relatively quick dish, often served with naan, roti, or rice.

name: Punjabi Tadka Kadahi Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer, also spelled Kadhai Paneer, is a popular Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) and bell peppers cooked in a flavorful, freshly ground spice blend. It's named for the kadai, a type of Indian wok, in which it's traditionally cooked, though it can be made in a regular pan as well. The dish is known for its rich, aromatic, and slightly spicy taste derived from the kadai masala, a special spice blend.

name: Tandoori Roti
description: Tandoori Roti is a popular Indian flatbread, typically made with whole wheat flour (atta) and cooked in a tandoor, a cylindrical clay oven. This cooking method gives it a distinctive texture and smoky flavor. The dough is kneaded with water or yogurt, then slapped onto the hot inner walls of the tandoor, where it cooks quickly and puffs up. It's often brushed with ghee or butter before serving, complementing a variety of dishes.

name: Butter Roti
description: Butter roti, also known as tandoori roti in some contexts, is a type of Indian flatbread typically made with whole wheat flour, water, and salt. It is cooked on a hot griddle or tawa, often with the addition of butter or ghee (clarified butter) for richness and flavor. The roti is known for its crisp exterior and soft interior, sometimes achieving a flaky texture from the butter or ghee and beating during cooking.

name: Garlic Roti
description: Garlic roti is a flavorful flatbread, often a type of paratha, made by incorporating minced garlic into the dough and sometimes topping it with garlic or garlic butter. It's a popular variation of regular roti, known for its aromatic and savory taste.

name: Onion Roti
description: Onion roti, also known as onion paratha or koki, is a type of Indian flatbread that incorporates finely chopped onions into the dough. It is a popular dish, especially in Sindhi cuisine, and is known for its slightly crispy exterior and soft, flavorful interior. The onions add a savory taste and a pleasant texture to the roti.

name: Missi Roti
description: Missi roti is a North Indian flatbread, especially popular in Punjab and Rajasthan, made from a dough of wheat flour (atta) and chickpea flour (besan). It's distinguished from regular roti by the addition of spices and sometimes other ingredients like chopped onions, spinach, or fenugreek (methi). Missi roti is often enjoyed with gravy or vegetables.

name: Lachha Parantha
description: Lachha paratha is a popular Indian flatbread, particularly from Punjabi cuisine, characterized by its layered or flaky texture. It is typically made with whole wheat flour and fried with ghee, resulting in a crispy and visually appealing exterior with soft layers inside.

name: Spl. Stuff Missi Roti
description: Missi roti is a North Indian flatbread, notably popular in Rajasthan and Punjab, made from a dough of mixed flours, often whole wheat flour (atta) and chickpea flour (besan), along with spices and sometimes vegetables. It's known for its unique flavor and texture, achieved by cooking it on a griddle or in a tandoor (clay oven).

name: Plain Naan
description: Naan (/nɑːn/) is a leavened, oven-baked or tawa-fried flatbread, that can also be baked in a tandoor. It is characterized by a light and fluffy texture and golden-brown spots from the baking process. Naan is found in the cuisines of Central Asia, South Asia, Southeast Asia, and the Caribbean.

name: Butter Naan
description: Butter naan is a type of leavened flatbread, typically cooked in a tandoor or oven, that is known for being brushed with butter after baking. It's a popular dish in Indian cuisine, and the added butter gives it a rich, glossy finish and enhanced flavor.

name: Onion Naan
description: Onion naan is a type of naan, a leavened flatbread, characterized by the addition of finely chopped onions to the dough. It's a popular variation of naan, often found in Indian and South Asian cuisines. The onions are either mixed into the dough or sprinkled on top before baking, adding a savory flavor and subtle sweetness to the bread.

name: Stuff Naan
description: Stuffed naan is a type of naan bread (a leavened, oven-baked flatbread) that is filled with a variety of savory ingredients. Common fillings include minced meat (like keema naan), paneer (Indian cheese), or mashed potatoes (aloo paratha). The dough is typically wrapped around the filling and then cooked in a tandoor oven or on a hot surface.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Garlic naan is a type of naan bread that is infused with the flavor of garlic. It's a leavened, oven-baked flatbread, traditionally cooked in a tandoor (a cylindrical clay oven), but can also be cooked on a tava (flat skillet). Garlic naan is popular in Indian, Pakistani, and Central Asian cuisines and is often served alongside curries, dals, and other dishes.

name: Paneer Naan
description: Paneer naan is a type of naan bread, a popular Indian flatbread, that is stuffed with paneer (Indian cheese). The dough, typically made with flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and yogurt, is filled with a mixture of grated paneer, coriander, masala spices, and cumin before being cooked, usually in a tandoor oven. This results in a soft, slightly chewy bread with a savory, spiced paneer filling.

name: Stuff Atta Naan
description: Stuffed atta naan, also known as "paratha" in some regions, is a flatbread made from whole wheat flour (atta) that is stuffed with various fillings like spiced potatoes, vegetables, or minced meat (keema). The stuffed dough is then cooked on a hot surface, often a tawa or griddle, sometimes finished in a tandoor oven.

name: Stuff Paneer Atta Naan
description: Stuffed paneer atta naan is a popular Indian flatbread made with whole wheat flour (atta) and a filling of spiced paneer (Indian cheese). It's typically cooked on a tava (griddle) until puffed and golden brown, then brushed with butter or ghee. The paneer filling often includes coriander, masala spices, and cumin.

name: Amritsari Naan With Chana
description: Amritsari naan, also known as Amritsari kulcha, is a popular North Indian flatbread, typically stuffed with a mixture of mashed potatoes and onions, originating from the city of Amritsar. It's often served with Chole, a spicy chickpea curry, creating a delicious and filling meal. The kulcha is leavened and cooked in a tandoor or on a griddle, resulting in a soft and slightly crispy bread.

name: Paneer Naan With Chana
description: Paneer naan with chana is a popular North Indian dish consisting of soft, leavened naan bread stuffed with paneer (Indian cheese) and served with a flavorful chickpea curry called chana masala. The naan is typically made with a dough of flour, yeast, and water, often cooked in a tandoor oven, giving it a slightly charred, smoky flavor. The paneer, a fresh cheese, is usually marinated and cooked in a spiced tomato-based gravy, which provides a rich, creamy texture. The chana masala, a spicy chickpea curry, offers a contrasting, tangy flavor that complements the mildness of the paneer.

name: Plain Roti
description: Plain roti, also known as chapati, is a type of unleavened flatbread common in the Indian subcontinent and other parts of the world. It is typically made from whole wheat flour (atta) and water, and sometimes salt. The dough is kneaded, rolled into thin circles, and then cooked on a hot griddle called a tawa. Plain roti is a staple food in many South Asian countries and is often eaten with curries, dals, or other dishes.

name: Butter Roti
description: Butter roti is a type of Indian flatbread, commonly known as roti, that is made with whole wheat flour and cooked on a hot griddle (tawa). It is often brushed or topped with butter, giving it a richer flavor and texture. In some cases, ghee (clarified butter) is used instead of butter.

name: Missi Roti
description: Missi roti is a popular North Indian flatbread, particularly in Punjab and Rajasthan, made from a mixture of whole wheat flour (atta) and gram flour (besan). It's known for its unique flavor, often enhanced with spices like cumin, coriander, red chili powder, and sometimes fenugreek leaves or carom seeds. Missi roti is a versatile dish, traditionally served with gravies or vegetables, and can be made in various styles, including crispier versions with rice flour or lentil additions.

name: Plain Naan
description: Naan (/nɑːn/) is a leavened, oven-baked or tawa-fried flatbread, that can also be baked in a tandoor. It is characterized by a light and fluffy texture and golden-brown spots from the baking process. Naan is found in the cuisines of Central Asia, South Asia, Southeast Asia, and the Caribbean.

name: Butter Naan
description: Butter naan is a type of leavened flatbread, traditionally baked in a tandoor oven, known for its soft, chewy texture and rich, buttery flavor. It's made with flour, yeast, and a leavening agent, and typically brushed with butter after baking. The addition of butter not only enhances the flavor but also gives the naan a glossy appearance.

name: Laccha Parantha
description: Lachha paratha is a popular Indian flatbread, specifically a multi-layered type of paratha, known for its flaky and crispy texture. It is a staple in Punjabi cuisine and is traditionally made with whole wheat flour. The term "lachha" refers to the layered structure of the bread, resembling rings or layers.

name: Ajwain Parantha
description: Ajwain paratha is a type of Indian flatbread, a paratha, flavored with ajwain (carom seeds). It's made with whole wheat flour, and the ajwain seeds are either mixed into the dough or sprinkled on top during rolling. The paratha is typically cooked on a tava (griddle) with oil or ghee. It's known for its flaky texture and the distinct, slightly bitter and pungent flavor of ajwain.

name: French Fries
description: French fries, also known as fries, are a dish of deep-fried potatoes that have been cut into even strips. They are typically served hot and salted, and can be enjoyed as a side dish or a snack. French fries are often accompanied by ketchup, vinegar, mayonnaise, or other sauces.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri Peri fries are French fries that are typically seasoned with a spicy Peri Peri seasoning or sauce. The seasoning is a blend of spices, often including chili peppers, paprika, garlic, and other herbs and spices, giving the fries a bold and spicy flavor.

name: Masala Chaap
description: Masala Chaap is a popular North Indian vegetarian dish, primarily found in street food and restaurants, featuring marinated and grilled or fried soybean chunks, often shaped to resemble meat. It's a versatile dish that can be served in various ways, including as a curry, in rolls, or as a tikka. The term "chaap" refers to the cut of meat or in this case, the soybean preparation, which is then seasoned and cooked.

name: Malai Chaap
description: Malai Chaap is a popular North Indian vegetarian dish, known for its creamy and rich flavor, made with soya chaap. It's a type of starter or side dish, featuring marinated and grilled or fried soya chaap pieces in a luscious, creamy sauce.

name: Haryali Chaap
description: Haryali Chaap is a vegetarian dish, a variation of Soya Chaap, that is known for its vibrant green color and flavorful marinade. It's made from soya bean chunks, often wrapped around sticks to resemble meat chops, and then marinated in a blend of green herbs and spices, giving it the "Haryali" (meaning "greenery") name and flavor.

name: Achaari chaap
description: Achari Chaap is a vegetarian dish made from soya chaap, marinated in a tangy, pickle-flavored sauce, and then typically cooked in a tandoor or pan. The "achari" flavor comes from a blend of spices and pickling agents, creating a sour and aromatic experience. It's a popular North Indian dish, often enjoyed as a starter or main course.

name: Mushroom Tikka
description: Mushroom tikka is a vegetarian Indian dish consisting of marinated and grilled mushroom pieces, typically cooked in a tandoor oven. The mushrooms are coated in a flavorful marinade made with yogurt and spices, often including ginger-garlic paste, turmeric, chili powder, kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves), and garam masala. The dish is usually served dry and can be enjoyed as an appetizer, snack, or even a main course.

name: Veg Seekh Kabab
description: Veg seekh kebab is a vegetarian version of the popular Middle Eastern seekh kebab, typically made with minced meat. It's a log-shaped kebab, often grilled or pan-fried, and usually features a mixture of vegetables like potatoes, peas, and soya granules, seasoned with spices and herbs. Vegetarian seekh kebabs are a popular starter or snack in Indian cuisine.

name: Paneer Haryali Tikka
description: Hariyali Paneer Tikka is a vegetarian Indian appetizer consisting of paneer (Indian cheese) marinated in a vibrant green paste made from fresh coriander, mint, and other spices, then grilled or baked until tender and slightly charred. The name "Hariyali" translates to "greenery" in Hindi, referring to the green color imparted by the herbs. It's a popular dish, often served with mint chutney and is a delicious alternative to chicken or meat-based tikkas.

name: Paneer Achari Tikka
description: Paneer Achari Tikka is a North Indian dish featuring marinated paneer (Indian cheese) cubes, grilled to perfection and infused with a distinctive pickling spice blend. This marinade typically includes ingredients like mustard seeds, fenugreek seeds, and red chilies, giving the tikka a tangy and spicy flavor profile. It's a popular appetizer or snack, often served with mint or coriander chutney, and can also be enjoyed as a main course with rice or roti.

name: Paneer Papdi Tikka
description: Paneer papdi tikka is a popular Indian appetizer featuring marinated paneer (Indian cheese) and vegetables like capsicum, onions, and tomatoes, skewered and grilled, often in a tandoor, and seasoned with lemon juice and chaat masala. It's a vegetarian alternative to chicken tikka and is typically served hot, sometimes with mint chutney or salad.

name: Mushroom Malai Tikka
description: Mushroom Malai Tikka is a vegetarian appetizer consisting of button mushrooms marinated in a creamy, spiced mixture and then grilled or baked. It's a popular variation of Malai Tikka, which is typically made with chicken. The "malai" refers to the rich, creamy marinade made with yogurt, cream, and spices, while "tikka" indicates the method of cooking on skewers.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Paneer tikka is an Indian dish featuring marinated and grilled paneer (Indian cheese). It's a popular vegetarian alternative to meat-based dishes like chicken tikka, and is typically served hot with lemon juice and chaat masala. The dish involves marinating paneer cubes in a mixture of spices and yogurt, then grilling them, often with vegetables like bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes, on skewers.

name: Cheese Seekh Kabab
description: Cheese seekh kebab, a variation of the traditional seekh kebab, replaces or supplements the meat with cheese. It typically involves minced paneer (Indian cheese) or a mixture of cheese and vegetables, seasoned with spices like ginger, garlic, green chilies, and garam masala, and then shaped onto skewers and grilled. These kebabs are often served with chutneys, raita, or naan bread.

name: Paneer Malai Tikka
description: Paneer Malai Tikka is a North Indian dish featuring cubes of paneer (Indian cheese) marinated in a creamy, spiced mixture and then grilled or baked. The marinade typically includes yogurt, cream, ginger-garlic paste, and various spices like garam masala, coriander powder, and sometimes kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves). The result is a soft, flavorful, and slightly sweet tikka with a creamy texture.

name: Veg Platter
description: A vegetarian platter, often called a thali, is a selection of various vegetarian dishes served together on a single plate or tray. It's a popular way to enjoy a diverse range of flavors and textures in South Asian cuisine. The platter typically includes rice or bread as the main dish, surrounded by smaller portions of vegetable curries, chutneys, pickles, and sometimes a sweet dish.

name: Veg Noodles
description: Veg noodles, also known as vegetable noodles, are a dish consisting of noodles stir-fried with various vegetables. They are a popular and versatile dish, often featuring ingredients like carrots, cabbage, bell peppers, green beans, and zucchini. Veg noodles can be prepared with different types of noodles, including wheat, rice, or mung bean starch noodles. They are commonly enjoyed in many cuisines, including Chinese, Indian, and Nepalese.

name: Singapori Noodles
description: Singapore noodles, despite their name, are not a traditional Singaporean dish. They are a popular stir-fried rice vermicelli dish, often featuring curry powder, vegetables, scrambled eggs, and meat (chicken, beef, or shrimp). The dish is commonly found in Hong Kong and other Southeast Asian restaurants, and is known for its yellow color from the curry powder.

name: Chilli Garlic Noodles
description: Chili garlic noodles are a flavorful noodle dish, typically featuring a spicy and aromatic sauce made with chili peppers and garlic. They are a popular dish in many cuisines, particularly Asian-inspired, and can be found in various forms, from simple stir-fries to more complex preparations. The key ingredients include noodles, chili peppers (fresh or flakes), garlic, and often other seasonings and vegetables.

name: Hakka Noodles
description: Hakka noodles, also known as Indian-Chinese Hakka noodles, are a popular stir-fried noodle dish that originated in Kolkata, India, and is a staple in Indian Chinese cuisine. These noodles are made from wheat flour and are characterized by a firmer texture compared to traditional Chinese noodles. They are typically stir-fried with vegetables like cabbage, carrots, and peppers, and can include proteins like chicken, shrimp, or scrambled eggs. The dish is known for its savory and aromatic flavors, often featuring a combination of spices and sauces like soy sauce.

name: Cheese Noodles
description: Cheese and noodles, a simple yet satisfying dish, involves combining cooked noodles with cheese, often creating a rich and creamy sauce. This pairing is versatile, with various noodle types (like fettuccine, macaroni, or ramen) and cheese options (like Parmesan, cheddar, or cream cheese) leading to diverse variations. It's enjoyed globally, with regional specialties like Fettuccine Alfredo, Lokshen mit Kaese, and Macaroni and Cheese.

name: Veg Spring Roll
description: A vegetarian spring roll is a savory, cylindrical snack made of a thin pastry wrapper filled with various vegetables, and sometimes other ingredients like tofu or mushrooms, and then fried. The name "spring roll" is a literal translation from the Chinese word "chūn juǎn" (春卷), referring to its origin as a dish traditionally enjoyed during the spring festival in China.

name: Veg Bullets
description: Veg bullets, also known as vegetable bullets or veg cutlets, are a popular vegetarian starter or snack, particularly in West Bengal, India. They are essentially a vegetarian version of a cutlet, typically made with a mixture of mashed potatoes, vegetables, and spices, formed into a cylindrical shape and then deep-fried until golden brown and crispy.

name: Veg Manchurian ( Dry )
description: Veg Manchurian dry is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried vegetable balls tossed in a spicy, sweet, and tangy sauce. It's typically made with a mix of shredded vegetables like cabbage, carrots, and bell peppers, bound with cornstarch and maida, then deep-fried. The fried balls are then coated in a flavorful sauce, often featuring soy sauce, chili sauce, and ginger-garlic paste.

name: Veg Manchurian ( Gravy )
description: Veg Manchurian gravy is a popular Indo-Chinese dish consisting of fried vegetable balls in a thick, savory, and spicy sauce. The vegetables, often including cabbage, carrots, and capsicum, are finely chopped, formed into balls, coated in a batter, and deep-fried to achieve a crispy exterior. These crispy balls are then simmered in a flavorful gravy made with ingredients like soy sauce, chili sauce, ginger, garlic, and sometimes cornstarch for thickening. The gravy can vary in spiciness and sweetness, catering to individual preferences.

name: Hara Bhara Kabab
description: Hara Bhara Kabab is a popular Indian vegetarian snack or appetizer known for its vibrant green color and delicious flavor. It's primarily made from spinach, green peas, potatoes, and a blend of aromatic spices. The name "Hara Bhara" translates to "full of greens" in Hindi, reflecting its key ingredients. These kebabs are typically shallow-fried or grilled, resulting in a crispy exterior and a soft, flavorful interior. They are often served with chutneys or yogurt dips.

name: Cheese Corn Roll
description: A cheese corn roll is a snack or appetizer where a spring roll or similar wrapper is filled with a mixture of cheese and sweet corn, then fried until golden brown. The filling typically includes cheese, sweet corn, salt, and pepper, with the edges of the wrapper sealed with water and potato starch.

name: Cheese Finger
description: Cheese finger foods are small, easily handled portions of cheese, often served as appetizers or snacks at social gatherings. They can be made from various types of cheese, and are typically presented in a way that allows them to be eaten without utensils. Common examples include cheese straws, mozzarella sticks, and fried cheese curds.

name: Honey Chilly Cauliflower
description: Honey Chilli Gobi, also known as Honey Chilli Cauliflower, is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring crispy, battered and fried cauliflower florets tossed in a sweet and spicy sauce made with honey, chili peppers, and other flavorful ingredients. It's a vegetarian alternative to Honey Chilli Chicken, offering a delightful combination of textures and tastes.

name: Cocktail Kabab
description: Cocktail kebabs, also known as mini kebabs, are small, bite-sized appetizers, often served at parties and gatherings. They are a type of kebab, which is a dish of grilled or fried meat (often lamb, beef, or chicken) and sometimes vegetables, that originated in the Middle East and Central Asia. Cocktail kebabs are distinguished by their small size, making them easy to eat with one hand while holding a drink.

name: Crispy Corn
description: Crispy corn, also known as toasted corn or roasted corn, is a snack made from fried or roasted corn kernels. It's a popular crunchy snack, often seasoned with salt, spices, or other flavorings. Recipes for crispy corn typically involve blanching sweet corn, coating it in flour (often corn flour), and then frying or roasting it until golden brown and crispy.

name: Honey Chilli Potato
description: Honey chilli potato is a popular Indo-Chinese appetizer featuring crispy fried potato fingers tossed in a sweet and spicy sauce, typically made with honey, chilli, and other flavorings. It's a common dish in Indian restaurants and street food stalls, known for its appealing combination of textures and flavors.

name: Chilli Chaap
description: Chilli chaap is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring deep-fried or pan-fried soya chaap (a vegetarian meat substitute) that's tossed in a flavorful, spicy sauce. The sauce typically includes ingredients like soy sauce, chili sauce, ginger, garlic, and various spices. It's a versatile dish, appearing as a starter, in curries, or as a standalone dish.

name: Mushroom Chilly
description: Chilli Mushroom, a popular Indo-Chinese dish, features crispy fried mushrooms tossed in a flavorful, spicy sauce. It's a versatile appetizer or side dish, often served with fried rice or noodles. The dish combines the earthiness of mushrooms with the bold, savory, and spicy flavors characteristic of Indo-Chinese cuisine.

name: Paneer 65
description: Paneer 65 is a popular Indian vegetarian appetizer, a flavorful and spicy dish made from fried paneer (Indian cheese) that is coated in a spiced batter and tossed in a tangy sauce. It's a vegetarian counterpart to the well-known Chicken 65 and is often served as a starter or side dish.

name: Cheese Chilly
description: Cheese and chili-based dishes are varied, ranging from creamy sauces like Chile con Queso and Ema Datshi to more substantial fare like Chili Cheese Fries and Chili Burgers. These dishes often feature melted cheese, chili peppers, and other ingredients like meat, vegetables, or beans.

name: Mushroom Duplex (8 Pc )
description: Mushroom Duplex is a stuffed mushroom dish, popular as a cafe-style starter or snack. It typically involves filling mushroom caps with a mixture of cheese, vegetables, and spices, then coating them in a batter and breadcrumbs before frying until crispy. The filling often includes chopped mushroom stems, onions, garlic, capsicum, and various spices.

name: Dahi Kabab
description: Dahi Kabab, also known as Dahi ke Kebab, is a popular North Indian vegetarian appetizer, essentially a patty made with hung curd (yogurt), paneer (Indian cheese), and spices. These kebabs are known for their soft, creamy interior and crisp, fried exterior.

name: Veg Crispy
description: Veg crispy, also known as vegetable fritters, is a popular Indian-Chinese appetizer featuring deep-fried, battered vegetables. It is a crispy and flavorful dish often served with a spicy dipping sauce. The vegetables are typically coated in a batter made from maida (all-purpose flour) and cornflour, seasoned with spices like coriander leaves, sesame seeds, black pepper, and salt.

name: Red Sauce Pasta
description: Red sauce pasta, a popular dish in Italian and Italian-American cuisine, typically features a sauce made primarily from tomatoes, often with the addition of garlic, onions, herbs (like basil and oregano), and olive oil. Variations include adding ingredients like capers, olives, spices, and even a splash of wine. The sauce can be used with various pasta shapes, such as spaghetti or penne, and may include meat, seafood, or be served as a vegetarian dish.

name: White Sauce Pasta
description: White sauce pasta, also known as Béchamel sauce pasta, is a creamy and rich pasta dish made with a white sauce based on a roux (butter and flour) and milk, often with added cheese and seasonings. It's a versatile dish, with the white sauce acting as a foundation for many other sauces and recipes. The key to a good white sauce pasta is a well-made roux, which provides the sauce's thickening power.

name: Mix Sauce Pasta
description: A mix sauce pasta dish typically involves combining red sauce (like marinara or tomato sauce) with white sauce (like Alfredo or Bechamel). The resulting sauce is often referred to as "pink sauce". This combination creates a unique flavor profile, blending the richness of the white sauce with the acidity and tomato notes of the red sauce.

name: Simple Samosa
description: A samosa is a fried or baked pastry with a savory filling, commonly found in cuisines across South Asia, the Middle East, and Central Asia. The filling typically includes spiced potatoes, onions, peas, lentils, or minced meat, and can be either vegetarian or non-vegetarian. Samosas are often triangular or cone-shaped, and are frequently served with chutney.

name: Bread Pakora
description: Bread pakora is an Indian fried snack (pakora or fritter). It is also known as bread bhaji (or bajji). A common street food, it is made from bread slices, gram flour, and spices among other ingredients. The snack is prepared by dipping triangular bread slices in a spicy gram flour batter and frying them.

name: Maida Mix Naan
description: Naan is a single-layer bread with a light and slightly fluffy texture and golden-brown spots from the baking process.

name: Atta Mix Naan
description: Naan is a single-layer bread with a light and slightly fluffy texture and golden-brown spots from the baking process.

name: Atta Paneer naan
description: Paneer naan is a traditional flatbread and a version of naan. The dough is made with a combination of flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and yogurt. Once rolled, it's usually stuffed with freshly grated paneer cheese (preferably homemade), coriander, masala spices, and cumin.

name: Cold Drink
description: A "cold drink" generally refers to any beverage served at a cool or cold temperature, often achieved by refrigeration or adding ice.

name: Fiery Chicken Sandwich
description: chicken sandwich

name: Organic Chicken
description: Organic chicken

name: Steamed chicken
description: Steamed chicken is a cooking method where chicken is cooked using steam, resulting in a tender and moist dish.

name: Spring Roll
description: In Chinese cuisine, spring rolls are savoury rolls with cabbage and other vegetable fillings inside a thinly wrapped cylindrical pastry. They are usually eaten during the Spring Festival in mainland China, hence the name.

name: Mushroom pops
description: Mushroom popcorn is a type of popcorn kernel that, when popped, forms a large, round, ball-like shape, resembling a mushroom cap.

name: Gym Protein Sandwich
description: A sandwich is a meal in the form of two pieces of bread with meat, cheese, or some other filling between them. Your favorite lunch might be a peanut butter and jelly sandwich.

name: Chicken Seekh Salami Sandwich
description: Chicken salami is a processed meat product typically made from finely ground chicken meat, mixed with various spices and seasonings, and then air-dried or cooked.

name: Sauci Mexican sandwich
description: The fillings can vary widely, but common ingredients include a spread of refried beans, slices of fresh Mexican cheese, various meats, smashed avocado, mayonnaise, spicy salsa, shredded lettuce, tomato, and pickled jalapeños

name: Steam Gym chicken
description: Steamed chicken is a cooking method where chicken is cooked using steam, resulting in a tender and moist dish.

name: Chicken Wings 6pc
description: Chicken wings are a popular dish, typically featuring the three parts of a chicken wing: drumettes, wingettes (or flats), and wing tips.

name: Chicken popcorn
description: Chicken popcorn is a dish consisting of small, bite-sized pieces of boneless chicken that are breaded and deep-fried, creating a crispy, snackable treat.

name: Peri Peri Chicken Pops
description: Chicken pops

name: Samosa With Channa
description: Samosa with channa, often called Samosa Chaat, is a popular Indian street food that combines a crispy samosa with spiced chickpeas (channa masala), yogurt, and chutneys. It's a flavorful and textured dish, with the crispy samosa contrasting the creamy chickpeas and the various chutneys adding layers of sweet, tangy, and spicy notes.

name: Chole Bhature ( 2 Bhature )
description: Chole bhature is a popular dish from the northern Indian subcontinent, consisting of chana masala (spicy chickpea curry) and bhatura, a deep-fried bread made from maida (refined wheat flour). It's often enjoyed as a breakfast or street food, sometimes served with lassi, and can be a complete meal with accompaniments like onions, pickled carrots, and chutney.

name: Gobi Pakora ( 1 Kg )
description: Gobi pakora, also known as cauliflower pakora, is a popular Indian snack featuring battered and deep-fried cauliflower florets. It is made by coating cauliflower in a spiced gram flour batter and then frying it until crispy. These fritters are often enjoyed as a tea-time snack or appetizer, served with chutney or sauce.

name: Mix Pakora
description: Mix pakora, a popular Indian snack, are fritters made by coating various vegetables in a spiced batter and deep-frying them until crispy. They are typically made with ingredients like onions, potatoes, spinach, cauliflower, and other vegetables, all mixed with a batter of gram flour (chickpea flour) and spices. The spices can vary based on regional preferences and available ingredients, but often include chili, ginger, coriander, and turmeric.

name: Paneer Pakora ( 1  Kg )
description: Paneer pakora is a popular Indian snack consisting of deep-fried, spiced paneer (Indian cottage cheese) coated in a gram flour batter. It's a type of pakora, which are fritters made by coating ingredients in a spiced batter and deep-frying them. Paneer pakoras are known for their crispy exterior and soft, creamy interior.

name: Golgappe ( 6 Pc )
description: Panipuri or golgappa is a deep-fried breaded hollow spherical shell - about 1 inch (25 mm) in diameter - filled with a combination of potatoes, raw onions, chickpeas, and spices. It is a common snack and street food in the Indian subcontinent.[2]

name: Single Tikki
description: A single tikki refers to a small, usually round or oval-shaped, patty or cutlet, often made from mashed potatoes or other vegetables and spices. It's a popular snack in Indian cuisine, particularly in North India, and can be served on its own or as part of a larger dish like Aloo Tikki Chaat.

name: Papdi Chat
description: Papdi Chaat is a popular Indian and Pakistani street food, featuring crispy fried dough wafers called papdi, topped with various ingredients like boiled potatoes, chickpeas, yogurt, chutneys (especially tamarind and green chutney), and spices. The dish is known for its combination of textures and flavors, offering a mix of crispy, creamy, sweet, spicy, and tangy tastes.

name: Dahi Bhalla
description: Dahi Bhalla, also known as Dahi Vada, is a popular North Indian snack consisting of soft lentil fritters (vadas) soaked in creamy yogurt (dahi) and topped with various chutneys and spices. It's a type of chaat, known for its sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors.

name: Dahi Golgappa
description: Dahi golgappa, also known as dahi puri, is a popular Indian street food, particularly in Maharashtra. It's a variation of the classic pani puri, featuring hollow, crispy puri shells filled with a combination of potatoes, chickpeas, and chutneys, topped with yogurt (dahi) and sev. The dish is known for its sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors, offering a delightful mix of textures from the crunchy puri to the creamy yogurt.

name: Double Tikki
description: Double tikka, often referred to as chicken tikka masala, is a dish consisting of boneless pieces of marinated chicken, typically grilled or roasted, and then simmered in a creamy, spiced sauce.

name: Raj Kachori
description: Raj kachori is a popular North Indian chaat, originating in Bikaner, Rajasthan. It's a large, crispy kachori, typically filled with a mix of potatoes, moong dal, and chutneys, then topped with yogurt, sev, pomegranate seeds, and various chutneys. The name "Raj" signifies its grand and rich nature, referring to the lavish stuffing.

name: Water Bottle
description: A water bottle is a container, typically made of plastic or glass, designed to hold and transport drinking water or other beverages. It allows for convenient access to fluids when away from a traditional water source. Water bottles can be single-use (disposable) or reusable, with the latter gaining popularity for environmental reasons.

name: Hot Tea
description: Hot tea, when paired with food, often refers to a meal or event known as Afternoon Tea or High Tea, where a variety of savory and sweet items are served alongside tea. These typically include finger sandwiches, scones with clotted cream and jam, and a selection of cakes and pastries.

name: Hot Milk
description: Hot milk is milk that has been heated, and depending on the temperature and preparation, can have different culinary and even medicinal uses. Scalded milk, heated to 83°C (181°F), is used to kill bacteria and denature proteins, impacting consistency and cooking interactions. Hot milk can also be a simple beverage, often consumed for its soothing properties, sometimes with added flavoring like honey or vanilla. Additionally, hot milk is a key ingredient in certain dishes, such as hot milk cake, where it contributes to a fine-grained texture.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a beverage made by brewing roasted and ground coffee beans with hot water. It's a widely consumed drink, often enjoyed for its stimulating effect due to caffeine. Coffee can be prepared in various ways, including drip brewing, French press, and espresso. It's often served with milk, sugar, or cream to enhance its flavor.

name: Salted Lassi
description: Salted lassi, also known as Namkeen Lassi, is a traditional Indian yogurt-based drink with a savory flavor. It's a variation of the more common sweet lassi, typically made by blending yogurt, water, and spices like salt, black pepper, and cumin. Sometimes, herbs like mint or cilantro are added for extra flavor.

name: Sweet Lassi
description: Sweet lassi is a popular Indian beverage, a type of lassi, made by blending yogurt with water or milk, sugar, and often cardamom or other spices. It's a creamy, chilled drink, commonly enjoyed as a refreshing and cooling beverage, especially in North India. Sweet lassi is a variation of the traditional lassi, which can also be salty or flavored with fruits like mango.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla shake, also known as a vanilla milkshake, is a sweet, cold beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and vanilla flavoring. It is a popular and classic milkshake flavor, often enjoyed as a dessert or refreshing drink. The vanilla flavor can be derived from vanilla extract or the seeds of a vanilla pod.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry milkshake is a sweet, creamy beverage typically made by blending strawberries, milk, and often ice cream. It's a popular cold and refreshing drink, often served with whipped cream and a straw. The addition of ice cream distinguishes it from a smoothie, which typically does not contain ice cream.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: A butterscotch milkshake is a sweet and creamy beverage featuring the distinct flavor of butterscotch. Typically, it blends vanilla ice cream, butterscotch syrup, and milk, often incorporating brown sugar and butterscotch chips for added richness and texture.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate shake, also known as a chocolate milkshake, is a cold, sweet beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate flavoring (such as chocolate syrup or cocoa powder). It's known for its rich, creamy texture and decadent chocolate taste. Milkshakes, in general, are a popular dessert or treat, and chocolate is a common and well-loved flavor.

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo shake, also known as an Oreo milkshake, is a blended beverage typically made with Oreo cookies, milk, and vanilla ice cream, sometimes with the addition of chocolate syrup. The cookies are blended until smooth or coarsely chopped, creating a creamy, chocolatey shake with visible cookie pieces. It's a popular dessert or treat, often enjoyed for its sweet and refreshing taste.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee refers to any coffee beverage served chilled, encompassing a variety of preparations. Iced coffee is a general term for coffee served over ice, which can be made by brewing hot and then cooling it or by brewing it cold. Cold brew coffee, a specific method, involves steeping coffee grounds in cold water for an extended period, resulting in a concentrate that is then diluted.

name: Mint Mojito
description: A mint mojito is a classic Cuban highball cocktail, known for its refreshing combination of mint, lime, rum, and soda water. The drink is made by muddling fresh mint leaves with sugar and lime juice, then adding rum and topping it off with soda water and ice. It's a popular choice, particularly during warmer months, due to its light, sweet, and citrusy flavors.

name: Green Apple Mojito
description: A Green Apple Mojito is a refreshing variation of the classic mojito cocktail, replacing some of the traditional lime with green apple, and often incorporating apple liqueur or syrup. It combines the tartness of green apple with the sweetness of sugar or simple syrup, the herbaceousness of mint, the citrusy brightness of lime, and the fizz of soda water, all served over ice.

name: Blueberry Shake
description: A Blueberry Mojito is a refreshing, fruity twist on the classic Cuban cocktail, the mojito. It typically features fresh blueberries, muddled with mint and lime, then mixed with white rum and topped with club soda. The addition of blueberries adds a sweet and slightly tart flavor, complementing the mint and lime.

name: Crispy Chicken Stripes
description: Crispy chicken strips, also known as chicken fingers, chicken tenders, or chicken goujons, are pieces of chicken meat that are breaded and deep-fried, grilled, or baked. They are a popular dish, often served as a snack, appetizer, or main course. The preparation typically involves coating the chicken in a batter and breading, then cooking until golden brown and crispy.

name: Peri Peri Chicken Stripes
description: Peri peri chicken strips are chicken pieces, often tenders or fillets, that are marinated in or coated with a flavorful peri peri sauce, then grilled, baked, or fried. The peri peri sauce, originating from Portuguese influence in Southern Africa, is typically made with bird's eye chili peppers, garlic, and other spices.

name: Honey Chilly Pops
description: Honey chilli chicken is a popular dish, particularly in Indo-Chinese cuisine, featuring crispy fried chicken pieces coated in a sweet and spicy sauce. The sauce typically includes honey, chili peppers, and other flavorings like soy sauce, garlic, and ginger. It's known for its balance of sweet, savory, and spicy notes, with the crispy chicken providing a satisfying textural contrast.

name: Crispy Butter Chicken
description: Crispy butter chicken, while not a universally defined dish, typically refers to a variation of the classic butter chicken where the chicken pieces are fried to a crispy texture before being added to the creamy tomato-based gravy. This contrasts with the more traditional preparation where the chicken is either tandoori-cooked or pan-fried and then simmered in the sauce. The result is a dish with a satisfying textural contrast between the crispy chicken and the smooth, rich sauce.

name: Stripes & Chips Chicken
description: "Stripes and chips chicken" isn't a standard, universally recognized term for a specific chicken dish. However, it likely refers to chicken strips or fingers, which are typically breaded and fried or baked. The "chips" part likely refers to the side dish of potato chips, fries, or similar fried potato-based accompaniment.

name: French Fries
description: French fries, also known as fries, are strips of potatoes that have been deep-fried. They are typically served hot and are a popular snack or side dish, often seasoned with salt and accompanied by various condiments like ketchup, mayonnaise, or vinegar.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri-Peri fries are French fries seasoned with peri-peri sauce or seasoning, which incorporates African bird's eye chili peppers, garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, and other spices. The fries are typically cooked until crispy and golden brown, then tossed in the peri-peri sauce or sprinkled with the seasoning. They are a popular variation of regular French fries, known for their spicy and flavorful kick.

name: Cheese Loaded Fries
description: Cheese-loaded fries, also known as cheese fries or cheesy chips, are a dish consisting of french fries topped with melted cheese, and often other ingredients like bacon, chili, or various sauces. They are a popular variation of loaded fries, which typically include a variety of toppings.

name: Chicken Loaded Fries
description: Chicken loaded fries are a variation of loaded fries, featuring French fries topped with chicken, cheese, and various sauces, often including bacon, and sometimes vegetables. They are a popular and customizable dish, frequently found on pub and fast-food menus, offering a hearty and flavorful combination of textures and tastes.

name: Masala Fries
description: Masala fries are a popular Indian-inspired dish consisting of French fries that are seasoned with a blend of spices, often including garam masala, chili powder, turmeric, and other Indian spices. They offer a flavorful twist on traditional fries by incorporating a savory and aromatic spice mix.

name: Spicy Pineapple Mojito
description: A Spicy Pineapple Mojito is a variation of the classic mojito, incorporating the sweetness of pineapple and a touch of heat from a spicy element like jalapeño. The drink typically features white rum, lime juice, mint, pineapple juice, and soda water, along with the added spicy element. The traditional mojito's combination of sweetness, citrus, and mint is enhanced by the pineapple and the spiciness, making it a popular summer cocktail with a unique twist.

name: Red Wine Mojito
description: A Red Wine Mojito is a variation of the classic Mojito cocktail, substituting red wine for the traditional white rum. It typically retains the core ingredients of lime juice, sugar (or simple syrup), mint, and soda water, but replaces the rum with red wine. This variation offers a different flavor profile, incorporating the tannins and fruit notes of the red wine alongside the refreshing elements of the mojito.

name: Mint Mojito
description: A Mojito is a traditional Cuban cocktail known for its refreshing combination of flavors. It typically includes white rum, sugar (or simple syrup), lime juice, soda water, and fresh mint. The drink is prepared by muddling mint leaves with sugar and lime juice, then adding rum and soda water, and serving it over ice with a mint sprig or lime wedge garnish.

name: Peach Ice Tea
description: Peach iced tea is a refreshing beverage made by chilling or cooling tea and adding peach flavoring, which can be achieved through natural fruit or peach-flavored syrup. It's a popular variation of iced tea, often sweetened and enjoyed in the United States and other regions.

name: Berry Mojito
description: A Berry Mojito is a refreshing, fruity variation of the classic Mojito cocktail. It combines the traditional elements of rum, lime juice, mint, and sugar with the addition of various berries, such as raspberries, strawberries, or blueberries. The berries are typically muddled with the other ingredients to release their flavors, creating a sweet and tart twist on the original.

name: Green Apple Mojito
description: A Green Apple Mojito is a refreshing variation of the classic mojito cocktail, featuring the addition of green apple for a unique twist. It combines the traditional mojito ingredients of white rum, lime, mint, and soda water with the crisp, tart flavor of green apple. Some recipes also include apple liqueur or apple juice alongside the rum.

name: Chilly Guava
description: "Chilly guava" typically refers to strawberry guava (Psidium cattleyanum), also known as purple guava or pineapple guava. It is a shrub or small tree native to Brazil, but now widely distributed in tropical regions. It's known for its aromatic leaves, fragrant flowers, and small, round fruits that can be red or yellow. While it's edible and has some economic value for its fruits, it also has invasive tendencies.

name: Pina Colada
description: A Piña Colada Mojito is a cocktail that combines the tropical flavors of a Piña Colada with the refreshing elements of a Mojito. It typically includes rum, pineapple juice, coconut cream or milk, lime juice, mint, and sugar or simple syrup, sometimes with a muddling step for the mint and lime, similar to a Mojito, and then mixed with ice, often blended like a Piña Colada. Some recipes also include pineapple chunks and coconut rum.

name: Spicy Mango
description: A Spicy Mango Mojito is a twist on the classic mojito, incorporating the flavors of mango and spice alongside the traditional ingredients of rum, mint, lime, and soda. The spiciness typically comes from ingredients like chili peppers or jalapenos, which are muddled with the mint and lime to release their flavors. Mango is added, either as juice or chunks of fruit, to complement the sweetness and tropical notes.

name: Watermelon
description: A Watermelon Mojito is a refreshing variation of the classic Mojito cocktail, substituting some of the traditional lime with watermelon. It typically includes white rum, lime juice, fresh mint, sugar (or simple syrup), and soda water, with muddled watermelon or watermelon juice adding the signature flavor. The result is a crisp, fruity, and revitalizing drink, perfect for warm weather.

name: Crispy Paneer Burger Meal
description: A crispy paneer burger typically features a patty made from paneer (Indian cheese) that is coated in a crispy, often breaded or battered, layer and fried or air-fried to a golden-brown crispness. It's commonly served on a bun with various toppings like lettuce, onions, tomatoes, and a sauce like mayonnaise or chutney.

name: Crispy Chicken Burger Meal
description: A crispy chicken burger, also known as a crispy chicken sandwich in the US, typically features a breaded and deep-fried chicken patty served on a bun with various toppings. It's a popular fast-food item, with variations found in numerous restaurant chains. The chicken patty can be made from ground chicken or a whole piece of breast or thigh meat.

name: French Fries
description: French fries, also known as fries, are a popular side dish or snack consisting of deep-fried potato strips. They are typically made by cutting potatoes into even strips, drying them, and then frying them, often in a deep fryer, though they can also be baked. French fries are commonly salted and served with various condiments like ketchup, mayonnaise, or vinegar.

name: Veg Fried Momos
description: Veg fried momos are a popular variation of the Tibetan and Nepali dumpling, momo, where the steamed dumplings are deep-fried or pan-fried until golden and crispy. They are typically filled with a mixture of finely chopped vegetables, spices, and herbs, and are often served with a spicy dipping sauce like chili garlic sauce or a tomato-based chutney.

name: Noodles Spring Roll
description: Noodle spring rolls, often called fresh spring rolls or summer rolls, are a Vietnamese dish consisting of rice vermicelli noodles, various fresh vegetables, and often shrimp or pork, all wrapped in a thin, translucent rice paper. Unlike fried spring rolls, these are not cooked after wrapping, and are typically served at room temperature with a dipping sauce.

name: Potato Pops (20 pc)
description: Potato pops can refer to different potato-based snacks or dishes. Pommes Dauphine are potato puffs made by mixing mashed potatoes with choux pastry, then deep-fried. Popchips are a brand of popped potato and corn products, marketed as a healthier alternative to potato chips. Potato chips, or crisps, are thin slices of potatoes that are deep-fried, baked, or air-fried.

name: Veg Strips (5 Pc )
description: "Veg strips" most commonly refers to either vegetable chips, particularly those made from various vegetables other than potatoes, or julienned vegetables, which are long, thin strips cut from vegetables like carrots or zucchini. It can also refer to Textured Vegetable Protein (TVP) strips, a soy-based meat substitute.

name: Veggie Spring Roll
description: Veggie spring rolls are a type of savory Asian appetizer, typically consisting of a thin wrapper filled with a mixture of vegetables and sometimes other ingredients, then either fried or served fresh. They are named for their association with the spring season and the fresh vegetables that often make up the filling.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Loaded fries are a dish consisting of French fries topped with a variety of ingredients, typically including cheese, sauces, meat (like bacon), and vegetables. They are known for being a filling and often indulgent dish. Variations can be based on different cuisines, such as Tex-Mex or Indian, and can include ingredients like melted cheddar, bacon bits, jalapeños, and ranch dressing.

name: Creamy Momos
description: Creamy momos, also known as cheese momos, are a popular variation of the traditional Tibetan dumpling, momo. They are typically filled with a rich, creamy cheese mixture, often combined with other ingredients like vegetables or spices. The filling is enclosed in a thin, delicate dough and then steamed or fried. The resulting momos offer a delightful contrast of textures and a satisfying, creamy flavor that is both comforting and delicious.

name: Creamy Spring Roll Noodle
description: A "creamy spring roll noodle" dish doesn't directly correspond to a specific, widely recognized dish in the same way as "spring rolls" or "rice noodle rolls" do. However, it could refer to a Vietnamese fresh spring roll (gỏi cuốn) that includes a creamy element, or potentially a fusion dish incorporating elements of both spring rolls and creamy noodles.

name: Veggie Creamy Spring Roll
description: vegetarian creamy spring roll is a type of spring roll, a savory Asian dish, where the filling is made with a variety of vegetables and a creamy element. The filling is then wrapped in a thin pastry and typically deep-fried until crispy. The "creamy" aspect likely comes from the addition of ingredients like cream cheese, a creamy sauce, or a creamy vegetable puree to the filling.

name: Mix Raita
description: Veg Raita is a quick to make and delicious raita made with mixed vegetables and curd.

name: Dahi
description: Veg Raita is a quick to make and delicious raita made with mixed vegetables and curd.

name: Masala Papad
description: Masala Papad is a popular Indian appetizer consisting of a crispy papad (thin lentil cracker) topped with a mixture of finely chopped vegetables, spices, and herbs.

name: Mehak Special
description: Exclusive from Mehak Dhaaba

name: Dry Papad
description: Dry papad is a thin, crispy Indian flatbread made from a seasoned dough, typically derived from lentils, chickpeas, or rice flour.

name: Missi Roti Punjabi
description: Missi Roti is a North Indian flatbread prepared with chickpea flour, onions, ginger, kasuri methi and a few everyday spices.

name: Daal Makhni
description: Great North Indian Food

name: Butter Naan
description: It is made with wheat flour, water, yeast, and butter. The dough is kneaded until it is smooth and elastic, then it is allowed to rise.

name: Amma Roti
description: Roti, also known as chapati, is a type of unleavened flatbread originating from the Indian subcontinent.

name: Masala Naan
description: A blend of fresh chopped hot chili and onions with oriental spices create this wonderfully flavorful oval flatbread. Heat this flavorful, authentic nan bread slightly to enhance the flavor.

name: Stuffed Naan
description: A blend of fresh chopped hot chili and onions with oriental spices create this wonderfully flavorful oval flatbread. Heat this flavorful, authentic nan bread slightly to enhance the flavor.

name: Aloo Jeera
description: Aloo Jeera, also known as Jeera Aloo, is a popular Indian side dish made with potatoes (aloo) and cumin seeds (jeera). It's known for its simple preparation and earthy, nutty flavor from the cumin. The dish is typically prepared by sautéing or frying cubed potatoes with cumin seeds and various Indian spices like turmeric, red chili powder, and coriander powder. Aloo Jeera is commonly served with Indian breads like roti or paratha, but can also be enjoyed with rice and lentils.

name: Dum Aloo
description: Dum aloo, also known as dam aloo or aloo dum, is a popular potato-based dish in the Indian subcontinent. It's a traditional Kashmiri Pandit cuisine dish, but variations exist across India and Pakistan. The word "dum" signifies slow-cooked or steam-cooked, while "aloo" means potato. The dish features potatoes, often baby potatoes, cooked in a flavorful gravy or sauce.

name: Lachha paratha
description: Lachha paratha is a popular, layered Indian flatbread known for its flaky and crispy texture.

name: Kala Chana
description: Kala chana, also known as black chickpeas or Desi chickpeas, are a variety of chickpea (Cicer arietinum) with small, dark seeds and a rough coat. In Hindi, they are referred to as "desi chana" or "kala chana", and in Bengali and Assamese, they are called "boot" or "chholaa boot". Kala chana is known for its high fiber content and is a popular ingredient in various Indian and South Asian dishes.

name: Lachha Naan
description: Naan is a leavened, oven-baked flatbread, traditionally cooked in a tandoor (clay oven), and is a staple in Indian cuisine.

name: Aloo Matar
description: Aloo Matar is a popular North Indian vegetarian dish made with potatoes (aloo) and peas (matar) in a spiced gravy, often featuring tomatoes, onions, and various spices. It's a staple in North Indian cuisine and is known for its comforting and flavorful nature.

name: Butter Roti
description: Tawa Butter Roti Recipe | Make Delicious Tawa Butter Roti. In a large mixing bowl, combine 250 grams of whole wheat flour (atta), 1/2 teaspoon of salt, and 1 tablespoon of oil.

name: Mix Paratha
description: Mix Paratha is a type of Indian flatbread, typically made with whole wheat flour and stuffed with a mixture of finely chopped or mashed vegetables and spices.

name: Kadhi Pakora
description: Kadhi Pakora is a popular Indian dish consisting of a yogurt-based curry (Kadhi) and deep-fried fritters (Pakoras). The Kadhi is typically made with yogurt, gram flour (besan), and spices, while the Pakoras are usually made with gram flour and vegetables like onions, potatoes, or spinach. The dish is known for its tangy and savory flavor, with the crispy Pakoras adding a contrasting texture.

name: Chana Dry
description: A dry chana dish, also known as Pindi Chole or Dry Kala Chana Masala, is a popular Indian dish featuring chickpeas (chana) cooked until dry and coated in a blend of spices. It's known for its bold, spiced flavor and can be made with either white or black chickpeas (Kala Chana). The dish is often served as a snack or side dish and can be customized with various spices and additions.

name: Chana Masala
description: Chana Masala, also known as Chole Masala or Chholay, is a popular Indian and Pakistani dish featuring chickpeas in a tomato-based sauce, often with a blend of spices. It's a staple in North Indian cuisine and is commonly enjoyed with bread like bhatura (deep-fried) or kulcha (flatbread). The dish is characterized by its rich, flavorful gravy and can be found in various levels of spiciness, from mild to very spicy.

name: Dal Fry
description: Dal fry is a popular Indian dish featuring cooked lentils (dal) that are simmered and then tempered with a flavorful mixture of spices fried in ghee or oil. It's a staple in North Indian cuisine, known for its rich, aromatic taste and creamy texture. The dish typically uses toor dal (split pigeon peas) but can be made with other dals like moong or masoor.

name: Mix Veg
description: Mix veg curry is one such recipe prepared with a combination of vegetables and paneer in a single curry. In this recipe of Mixed Vegetable curry, I have added vegetables like potatoes, capsicum, cauliflower, paneer, carrot, peas, and beans.

name: Mushroom Mattar
description: Matar Mushroom, also known as Mushroom Matar or Mutter Mushroom, is a popular Indian dish featuring a flavorful curry made with white button mushrooms and green peas in an onion-tomato gravy. It's a versatile dish that can be enjoyed as a dry preparation or with a more substantial gravy, and it's often served with Indian breads like roti or naan, or with rice.

name: Mushroom Taka Tak
description: Mushroom Taka Tak is a vegetarian dish, primarily made with mushrooms and other vegetables, cooked with spices and often served with roti or naan. The name "Taka Tak" refers to the onomatopoeic sound created when the ingredients are chopped and tossed on a hot griddle or tava with a spatula or blade. This dish is inspired by the meat-based "Kata-kat" or "Taka-tak" dish popular in Pakistan and is known for its spicy and flavorful taste.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Shahi Paneer is a vegetarian Mughlai style curry where paneer is cooked in a creamy sauce made with onions, yogurt, nut and seeds.

name: Mushroom Do Payaza
description: Mushroom do pyaza is a popular North Indian dish featuring button mushrooms cooked with a generous amount of onions and tomatoes, along with aromatic spices. The name "do pyaza" translates to "double onions," indicating the dish uses a significant amount of onions, often twice the amount of the main ingredient, in this case, mushrooms. This semi-dry preparation is known for its rich, flavorful gravy and is often served with Indian breads like naan or roti.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Malai Kofta is a curried vegetarian dish consisting of crisp fried potato paneer balls (koftas) dunked in a creamy, silky smooth and rich sauce/ curry.

name: Tawa Paneer
description: Tawa Paneer is a popular Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) cooked on a flat griddle (tawa) with a flavorful blend of spices, onions, tomatoes, and bell peppers.

name: Kadahi Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer (or known as Kadhai Paneer) is an Indian dish made by cooking paneer and bell peppers in a fragrant, freshly ground spice powder.

name: Butter Paneer Masala
description: Paneer makhani (also called paneer butter masala) is an Indian dish of paneer, originating in New Delhi, in which the gravy is prepared usually with butter (makhan), tomatoes and cashews. Spices such as red chili powder and garam masala are also used to prepare this gravy.

name: Cheese Tomato
description: Cheese and tomatoes are a classic combination, enjoyed in various forms from simple sandwiches to elaborate dishes. The sweet and acidic flavor of tomatoes pairs well with the richness and saltiness of different cheeses, creating a balanced and flavorful experience.

name: Mushroom Masala
description: Mushroom masala is a flavorful Indian dish featuring mushrooms cooked in a rich, aromatic gravy. The gravy typically includes onions, tomatoes, garlic, and ginger, along with a blend of Indian spices like cumin, coriander, turmeric, and garam masala. It's a popular North Indian dish, often served with flatbreads like naan or roti, or with rice to soak up the delicious sauce.

name: Mattar Paneer
description: Green Peas, Water, Paneer Cheese Cubes, Fresh Onion, Sour Cream, non-GMO, Tomato Paste, Lemon Juice Concentrate, Spices, Salt, Fresh Ginger, and Fresh Garlic.

name: Kadahi Kofta
description: Kadahi Kofta is a dish consisting of koftas (meatballs or dumplings) cooked in a rich, spicy gravy, traditionally prepared in a karahi (a type of wok). The koftas can be made with various ingredients like meat (beef, chicken, lamb, or mutton), vegetables, or paneer (Indian cheese), and are often deep-fried before being added to the curry. The gravy, often tomato-based, incorporates a blend of spices and is cooked in the karahi, giving the dish its characteristic flavor.

name: Methi Matar Malai
description: Methi Matar Malai is fenugreek leaves and peas, cooked in a fragrant and creamy gravy.  is fenugreek leaves and peas, cooked in a fragrant and creamy gravy.

name: Zhilmil
description: The name "zilmil" likely refers to Jalebi, a popular sweet snack in the Indian subcontinent and other regions. It's known by various names like jilapi, zelepi, jilebi, and others. Jalebi is a deep-fried, pretzel-shaped confection made from maida flour and soaked in sugar syrup.

name: Shahi Korma
description: A korma can be mildly spiced or fiery and may use lamb, goat meat, chicken, beef or game; some kormas combine meat and vegetables, such as spinach and turnip. The term shahi (English: royal), used for some kormas, indicates its status as a prestige dish, rather than an everyday meal, and its association with the court.

name: Methi Malai Paneer
description: Methi Malai Paneer is a rich, creamy Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) cooked in a flavorful gravy made with fenugreek leaves (methi), cream, and spices. The dish is known for its mildly sweet and slightly bitter taste, due to the fenugreek, and its luxurious, velvety texture from the cream. It's a popular choice for special occasions and is often served with naan or roti.

name: Paneer do pyaza
description: The taste of paneer do pyaza gravy is rich, very unique and delicious. I had always wondered about the unique flavor & taste of few paneer dishes served in a North Indian restaurant in Singapore. After several trials I was very happy with this recipe which yielded me a similar one that tasted the best.

name: Matar Sev Bhaji
description: Matar Sev Bhaji is a Maharashtrian dish featuring a spicy, coconut-based gravy with matar (peas) and topped with sev (crispy chickpea flour noodles). It's a popular and flavorful dish known for its rich, aromatic gravy and satisfying crunch.

name: Paneer Bhurji
