description: Paneer Bhurji is a scrambled paneer dish cooked with onions, tomatoes, and spices, creating a flavorful and quick-to-make meal. It's a versatile dish that pairs well with bread or as a filling for wraps.

name: Chana Sev Bhaji
description: Chana Sev Bhaji is a Maharashtrian dish where a spicy, coconut-based gravy is topped with crunchy sev (gram flour noodles). The dish is characterized by its combination of textures and flavors, with the spicy gravy providing a base for the crispy sev. It is often served with naan, roti, or bhakri.

name: Cheese Chilly
description: . It features fried paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cubes, tossed in a flavorful, spicy, and slightly sweet sauce with onions, peppers, and various seasonings.

name: Sev Bhaji
description: Sev bhaji is a Maharashtrian dish consisting of a spicy, flavorful curry, typically coconut-based, topped with crispy, deep-fried sev (gram flour noodles). It's known for its rich, bold flavors and is often served with chapati, puri, or rice. The sev absorbs the gravy, creating a satisfying and hearty meal.

name: 5 Roti+kala Channa
description: Pure veg thali

name: Tandoori Roti
description: Tandoori Roti is a popular Indian flatbread, typically made with whole wheat flour (atta) and cooked in a tandoor, a cylindrical clay oven. This cooking method gives the roti a distinctive smoky flavor and a slightly charred, chewy, yet tender texture. It's a staple in South Asian cuisine and is often served with curries, lentils, grilled meats, and other dishes.

name: Butter Roti
description: Butter roti, also known as Tandoori Roti in restaurants, is a type of Indian flatbread (roti) that is enriched with butter, often ghee (clarified butter). It is made from whole wheat flour, water, and salt, and cooked on a hot griddle (tawa). The roti is then brushed with melted butter, giving it a rich flavor and flaky texture.

name: Missi Roti
description: Missi roti is a popular North Indian flatbread, particularly enjoyed in Punjab and Rajasthan. It's made from a blend of whole wheat flour (atta) and chickpea flour (besan), along with spices and sometimes vegetables. It's known for its slightly crisp texture and savory flavor, often served with various dishes.

name: Punjabi Missi Roti
description: Missi roti is a popular Punjabi flatbread made from a mixture of whole wheat flour (atta) and gram flour (besan), along with spices and herbs. It's a staple in Punjabi cuisine, especially during the winter months. The addition of gram flour gives the roti a slightly nutty flavor and makes it more filling than regular wheat flour roti.

name: Plain Naan
description: Plain naan is a leavened, oven-baked or tawa-fried flatbread, typically made with flour, yeast, salt, and water, and sometimes milk, yogurt, or ghee. It's known for its light, fluffy texture and golden-brown spots, often achieved by baking in a tandoor oven. Naan is a staple in South and Central Asian cuisines and is also found in Southeast Asia and the Caribbean.

name: Peanut Masala
description: Peanut masala, also known as masala peanuts, is a popular Indian snack made with roasted peanuts coated in a flavorful blend of spices, herbs, and sometimes flour.

name: Butter Naan
description: Butter naan is a popular Indian flatbread, a variation of naan, characterized by its soft, pillowy texture and a generous coating of butter on top. It's typically made with refined flour, yeast, and yogurt, and cooked in a tandoor oven, resulting in a slightly crisp exterior and a soft interior. The addition of butter not only enhances the flavor but also gives it a glossy, appealing finish.

name: Aloo Channa Chaat
description: Aloo chaat is a popular Indian street food primarily made from crispy fried potato cubes flavoured with ground spices and sweet-and-sour date and tamarind sauce, and finished with coriander leaves and crunchy pomegranate seeds.

name: Garlic Butter Naan
description: Garlic butter naan is a popular Indian flatbread, known for its soft, fluffy texture and rich flavor. It's made with maida flour (all-purpose flour), yogurt, and a leavening agent like baking powder, then traditionally cooked in a tandoor oven. After baking, it's brushed with melted butter and topped with minced garlic, sometimes with added coriander. The result is a delicious, flavorful bread that pairs well with various Indian dishes, especially curries.

name: Aaloo Parantha
description: made with perfeciton

name: Kurkure chaat
description: Chaat is an umbrella term for a wide range of roadside foods that usually feature some kind of fried dough with various ingredients that typically create a spicy, tangy, or salty flavour, though some chaat are sweet.

name: Aaloo Parantha with Curd
description: made with perfection

name: Classic fries
description: French fries, side dish or snack typically made from deep-fried potatoes that have been cut into various shapes, especially thin strips.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri Peri fries are French fries that are typically seasoned with a spicy Peri Peri seasoning or sauce.

name: Mix Parantha
description: Hari mirch paratha, also known as green chili paratha, is a spicy Indian flatbread stuffed with a mixture of finely chopped green chilies, herbs, and spices. It's a flavorful and bold dish, popular among those who enjoy a spicy kick. The paratha is typically made with whole wheat flour, and the dough is rolled out to encase the chili-based filling. It's then cooked on a hot tawa (griddle) with ghee or oil until golden brown and crispy.

name: Egg Bhurji
description: Anda is the Hindi word for “Eggs” and Bhurji refers to “Scramble”. Anda Bhurji translates to scrambled eggs (but cooked in Indian style). It is made basically by scrambling beaten eggs with sautéed onions, tomatoes, spices and herbs.

name: Dahi Kabab
description: Dahi Kabab, also known as Dahi ke Kebab, is a vegetarian appetizer originating from the Awadhi cuisine of Lucknow, India. It's made with hung curd (yogurt), paneer (Indian cheese), and aromatic spices, resulting in a crisp, golden-brown exterior and a soft, creamy interior.

name: Beetroot Kabab
description: Beetroot kebabs, also known as Chukander kebabs, are a vegetarian appetizer or main course featuring beetroot as the star ingredient, often combined with potatoes, spices, and binding agents. They offer a healthy and flavorful alternative to traditional meat-based kebabs, boasting a vibrant color and a satisfying texture.

name: Methi Makai Kebab
description: Methi Makai Kabab is a type of kebab, likely a vegetarian one, featuring fenugreek (methi) and corn (makai) as its main ingredients. It's a dish where these two ingredients are combined, possibly with other spices and binding agents, and then shaped into patties or balls and cooked, possibly by grilling, shallow frying, or baking. The exact preparation method and specific ingredients can vary depending on the region and the recipe.

name: Cocktail Kabab
description: Cocktail kebabs, also known as party or bite-sized kebabs, are small, flavorful skewers or patties typically served as appetizers or snacks at social gatherings. They are known for their rich, savory taste and often feature a mix of spices and herbs, making them a popular choice for cocktail parties and other events.

name: Mushroom Mix Kabab
description: Mushroom mix kebab, often a vegetarian alternative to meat kebabs, features a combination of different types of mushrooms, blended or chopped, and seasoned with spices and herbs.

name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka
description: Tandoori Paneer Tikka is a popular Indian appetizer consisting of marinated paneer (Indian cheese) chunks grilled in a tandoor (clay oven). It's a vegetarian alternative to dishes like chicken tikka, offering a spicy, juicy, and slightly smoky flavor profile. The dish is widely enjoyed in India and among the Indian diaspora.

name: Malai Paneer Tikka
description: Malai Paneer Tikka is a North Indian appetizer made with marinated paneer (Indian cheese) cubes that are grilled or baked. It's characterized by its creamy, rich flavor due to the use of cream and yogurt in the marinade, along with spices and herbs. The dish is often served with mint chutney, lemon wedges, and salad.

name: Achari Paneer Tikka
description: Achari paneer tikka is a popular Indian appetizer featuring paneer (Indian cheese) marinated in a flavorful pickling spice blend (achari masala) and then grilled. It offers a tangy, spicy, and savory taste profile, often described as having a pickle-like flavor.

name: Tandoori Mushroom
description: Tandoori Mushroom Tikka is an Indian dish featuring marinated and grilled mushrooms, traditionally cooked in a tandoor (a cylindrical clay oven). The dish is known for its smoky flavor and vibrant spices, achieved through marinating the mushrooms in a yogurt-based mixture with various Indian spices. It's typically served with lime wedges, onion salad, and mint-coriander chutney.

name: Stuffed Mushroom
description: Stuffed mushrooms are a dish featuring edible mushrooms, typically baked or broiled, with a variety of fillings. They can be served hot, at room temperature, or even cold, and can be enjoyed as an appetizer, side dish, or snack. The texture can be meaty, and the flavor profile can vary greatly depending on the type of mushroom and filling used.

name: Mushroom Duplex
description: Mushroom Duplex, also known as Stuffed Mushrooms, is a popular appetizer or snack featuring edible mushrooms filled with a flavorful mixture, often including cheese, vegetables, and spices. The stuffed mushrooms are typically coated in breadcrumbs and then deep-fried until golden and crispy. It's a versatile dish that can be served hot or at room temperature, and it's enjoyed as an appetizer, side dish, or snack

name: Tandoori Soya Chaap
description: Tandoori Soya Chaap is a popular vegetarian dish in India, particularly in the north, featuring marinated and grilled or baked soya chunks that mimic the texture of meat. It's a flavorful and protein-rich appetizer or snack, often served with mint chutney and onions.

name: Malai Soya Chaap
description: Malai Soya Chaap is a popular North Indian vegetarian dish known for its creamy, rich texture and flavor. It features soya chaap (a meat substitute made from soybeans and flour) that is marinated in a creamy, spiced sauce and typically served with naan or roti. The dish is a favorite among vegetarians seeking a flavorful and filling meal, often enjoyed as a starter or main course.

name: Achari Soya Chaap
description: Achari Soya Chaap is a popular vegan dish featuring soya chaap (a vegetarian mock meat product) marinated in a tangy, pickling-spice blend and then grilled or cooked. It's known for its unique, slightly nutty flavor and the way the soya absorbs the flavorful marinade.

name: Garlic Soya Chaap
description: Garlic soya chaap is a vegetarian dish popular in North India, featuring soya chaap marinated and cooked with garlic and other spices, often served as a starter or snack. Soya chaap is made from ground soybeans or soybean chunks

name: Murg Tikka
description: Murg tikka, also known as Chicken Tikka, is a dish from the Indian subcontinent, particularly associated with the Punjab region. It consists of boneless chicken pieces marinated in spices and yogurt, then traditionally cooked in a tandoor (clay oven). The term "murg" is Persian for chicken, and "tikka" refers to small pieces or morsels. It's a popular appetizer or main course, often served with naan bread, rice, or as part of a curry, like Chicken Tikka Masala.

name: Murg Malai Tikka
description: Murg Malai Tikka, also known as Chicken Malai Tikka, is a popular North Indian dish consisting of boneless chicken pieces marinated in a creamy mixture and grilled until tender and juicy. The marinade typically includes yogurt, cream, cheese, and spices, resulting in a mild, rich, and flavorful kebab. The name "Murg Malai Tikka" translates to "chicken cream bite," highlighting the creamy texture and bite-sized pieces.

name: Garlic Murg Tikka
description: Garlic murgh tikka, also known as chicken tikka, is a popular Indian dish consisting of marinated, boneless chicken pieces cooked in a tandoor (a cylindrical clay oven) or grilled. The marinade typically includes yogurt, ginger, garlic, and spices, giving the chicken a flavorful and tender texture. "Murgh" is the Urdu/Hindi word for chicken, and "tikka" refers to bite-sized pieces.

name: Peri Peri Chicken Tikka
description: Peri Peri Chicken Tikka is a fusion dish that combines the flavors of Peri Peri (also spelled Piri Piri) with the Indian dish, Chicken Tikka. It typically involves marinating boneless chicken pieces in a Peri Peri sauce, which includes chili peppers and other spices, then grilling or cooking them in a tandoor (clay oven). The resulting chicken is characterized by a spicy, tangy, and slightly smoky flavor profile.

name: Noorani Seekh Kabab
description: Noorani Seekh Kabab, originating from Lucknow, India, is a vegetarian appetizer featuring lentils and paneer (Indian cheese). It is known for being a low-fat, easy-to-make dish rich in protein, fiber, and vitamin B1. The kebabs are typically made with Bengal gram lentils, mashed paneer, and finely chopped vegetables like onions, ginger, green chilies, cabbage, carrots, and bell peppers. They are seasoned with various spices such as salt, chili powder, garam masala, chaat masala, and tandoori masala. The kebabs are traditionally grilled, preferably in a barbecue, but can also be cooked in an oven.

name: Tandoori Fish Tikka
description: Tandoori Fish Tikka is a popular Indian appetizer or snack consisting of boneless fish pieces marinated in a flavorful tandoori masala and cooked in a tandoor oven. The marinade typically includes yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, and various spices, lending a smoky, aromatic, and slightly tangy taste to the fish. While traditionally cooked in a tandoor, it can also be prepared in an oven, air fryer, or on a stovetop.

name: Kali Mirch Fish Tikka
description: Kali Mirch Fish Tikka is a popular Indian appetizer featuring fish marinated in a blend of yogurt, spices, and crushed black pepper (Kali Mirch), then grilled or roasted. The dish is known for its creamy, peppery flavor and is often served with mint chutney and lemon wedges.

name: Garlic Fish Tikka
description: Garlic fish tikka is a flavorful Indian appetizer or main course made with boneless fish marinated in a garlic-infused yogurt and spice mixture, then cooked in a tandoor (clay oven) or grilled. The marinade typically includes garlic, ginger, various spices, and yogurt, which tenderizes the fish and imparts a delicious flavor. The dish is often served with lemon wedges, mint chutney, or other accompaniments.

name: Veg Lollipops
description: Veg lollipops are a popular vegetarian appetizer or snack, particularly in Indian cuisine, made by shaping a mixture of vegetables into lollipop shapes and deep-frying them. They are often served with a stick inserted, resembling a lollipop. The vegetable mixture can be customized with various spices and seasonings to suit individual preferences.

name: Soya Chaap Lollipop
description: Soya chaap lollipops are a popular vegetarian street food in North India, essentially a meat substitute made from soya chunks or nuggets. These are marinated and often skewered, resembling lollipops in presentation, and can be grilled, fried, or cooked in various curries. The dish is prized for its high protein content and meat-like texture, making it a popular choice for vegetarians and vegans.

name: Chicken Lollipop
description: Chicken lollipop is a popular Indian fried chicken appetizer featuring a frenched chicken winglet with the meat pushed down to resemble a lollipop. The dish is often found in Indo-Chinese cuisine and is typically coated in a spicy red batter and deep-fried.

name: Paneer Duplex
description: There's no dish called "Paneer Duplex" listed on Wikipedia. It's possible this is a less common or regionally specific name, or a misunderstanding of another paneer dish. Popular paneer dishes on Wikipedia include Kadai Paneer, Palak Paneer, and Matar Paneer.

name: Stuffed Crispy Chaap
description: Stuffed crispy chaap is a popular North Indian snack, particularly in Delhi, where it is often found at roadside food stalls. It is a type of chaat, meaning it's a savory snack, and it's characterized by its crispy exterior and flavorful stuffing. The "chaap" refers to a soya-based preparation, often made to resemble meat, which is then stuffed and deep-fried to a crisp.

name: Tandoori Manchurian
description: Tandoori Manchurian is a fusion dish that combines the flavors of Indian tandoori cuisine with the Indo-Chinese style of Manchurian. It typically involves grilling or baking marinated vegetable or meat balls in a tandoor (clay oven) to give them a smoky, charred flavor, and then tossing them in a Manchurian sauce. The sauce is a combination of soy sauce, chili sauce, ginger, garlic, and other spices, often thickened with cornstarch and finished with a garnish of spring onions.

name: Hot Chicken Wings (6 Pcs )
description: Hot chicken wings, often called Buffalo wings, are unbreaded chicken wings that are deep-fried and then coated in a sauce, typically a cayenne pepper-based hot sauce and melted butter. They are commonly served with celery and carrot sticks, and a dipping sauce like ranch or blue cheese.

name: Lemon Chicken
description: Lemon chicken tangri, also known as chicken tangri kebab or Murgh Tangdi Kabab, is a popular Indian dish consisting of marinated chicken drumsticks cooked in a tandoor (cylindrical clay oven) or grilled, then typically served with lemon wedges and sliced red onions. The chicken is marinated in a mixture of yogurt, lemon juice, and spices, resulting in a flavorful and tender kebab.

name: Roasted Chicken Tangri (6 Pcs )
description: A "Roasted Chicken Tangri" isn't a standard dish with a specific Wikipedia entry. However, "Tangri" typically refers to the chicken leg or drumstick in Indian cuisine, and "Roasted" indicates it's cooked by roasting, likely in an oven or tandoor. So, a Roasted Chicken Tangri would be a chicken leg, marinated and then roasted.

name: Tandoori Pomfret Fish
description: Tandoori Pomfret is a dish featuring pomfret fish marinated in a blend of spices and yogurt, then cooked in a tandoor (clay oven). This results in a flavorful, smoky, and tender fish dish, often served as an appetizer.

name: Amritsari Fish
description: Amritsari fish, also known as Amritsari macchi, is a popular Indian street food and restaurant-style appetizer from Amritsar, Punjab. It's a crispy, deep-fried fish dish known for its bold flavors and unique blend of spices. The fish is typically marinated in a mixture of gram flour (besan), spices, and sometimes rice flour, then deep-fried until golden brown and crispy. It's often served with a tangy chutney, such as mint or coriander chutney, and can be enjoyed as an appetizer or a side dish.

name: Fish & Chips
description: Fish and chips is a popular hot dish, typically consisting of battered and deep-fried fish, served with fried potatoes (chips). It's widely recognized as a staple of British cuisine and is a common takeaway food in many countries. The dish is often associated with British culture and is frequently found in fish and chip shops, also known as "chippies" in the UK.

name: Fish Finger
description: Fish fingers, also known as fish sticks in North America, are a processed food consisting of a whitefish, like cod or haddock, that has been battered or breaded and shaped into a rectangular finger-like shape. They are typically found frozen in supermarkets and can be cooked by baking, grilling, or frying. Fish fingers are a popular finger food, especially among children, and are often served with tartar sauce or ketchup.

name: Thai Veg Spring Rolls
description: Thai vegetable spring rolls, also known as "po pia tod" (ปอเปี๊ยะทอด) in Thai, are a popular appetizer featuring a savory filling of vegetables and sometimes noodles, wrapped in a thin, crispy pastry shell and deep-fried until golden brown. They are typically served with a sweet chili dipping sauce.

name: Spinach Corn Rolls
description: Spinach corn rolls are a snack or meal made by wrapping a spinach and corn filling in a thin, flatbread, often made with whole wheat flour, and then cooking it. The filling typically includes sauteed spinach, boiled sweet corn, and various spices, and sometimes cheese. They can be served as a healthy snack or a light meal.

name: Mushroom Spring Rolls
description: Mushroom spring rolls, a variation of the popular savory snack, feature a filling of various mushrooms, often along with other vegetables and sometimes meat, wrapped in a thin pastry and then fried until golden and crispy. The specific type of mushrooms and other ingredients can vary depending on the region and recipe.

name: Veg Manchurian
description: Veg Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese dish where deep-fried vegetable balls (often made with cabbage, carrots, and other vegetables) are simmered in a spicy, sweet, and tangy sauce. It exists in both dry and gravy forms, with the latter served over rice or noodles. The dish is a fusion of Chinese cooking techniques and Indian flavors, and it's a common sight on menus in both Indian and Chinese restaurants.

name: Honey Chilli Potato
description: Honey Chilli Potato is a popular Indo-Chinese dish consisting of deep-fried potato fingers coated in a sweet and spicy sauce, typically featuring honey, chili sauce, and soy sauce. It's a well-loved appetizer or side dish known for its crispy texture and a delightful balance of sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors.

name: Honey Chilly Cauliflower
description: Honey Chilli Gobi is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring crispy, fried cauliflower florets tossed in a sweet, spicy, and slightly tangy sauce made with honey, chili peppers, and other aromatic ingredients. It's often garnished with sesame seeds and spring onions. The dish is known for its balance of flavors and textures, combining the crispness of the cauliflower with the savory, sweet, and spicy sauce.

name: Chilli Paneer
description: Chilli Paneer is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried paneer (Indian cheese) tossed in a spicy, sweet, and tangy chili sauce. It's commonly served as an appetizer or side dish with rice or noodles, and can be prepared dry, semi-dry, or in gravy form. The dish is known for its balance of flavors, with the heat from chilies and sauces complemented by the sweetness of the sauce and the savory notes of soy sauce.

name: Chilli Mushroom
description: Chilli mushroom, a popular Indo-Chinese dish, features crispy fried mushrooms tossed in a savory, spicy sauce with bell peppers and onions. The mushrooms, often deep-fried after marinating, absorb the sauce's flavors, creating a delicious and visually appealing dish. It's a versatile dish, suitable as a snack, appetizer, or side with rice or noodles.

name: Classic Chilli Chicken
description: Classic Chilli Chicken, popular in Indo-Chinese cuisine, is a stir-fried chicken dish with a spicy and savory flavor profile. It typically involves boneless chicken pieces, although bone-in chicken can also be used, that are tossed with various sauces and spices, often including chili peppers. The dish is known for its vibrant flavors and is a staple in many Indian restaurants serving Chinese-inspired cuisine.

name: Street Style Chilli Fish
description: Street-style Chilli Fish and Chicken are Indo-Chinese dishes, meaning they are a fusion of Chinese cooking techniques and Indian flavors. Both dishes are characterized by their spicy and savory taste, often featuring a combination of chilies, ginger, garlic, and other aromatic spices.

name: Momos Platter
description: Momos are steamed, filled dumplings that originated in Tibet, Nepal, Bhutan, and parts of India. They are typically made with a dough casing and a savory filling, often meat or vegetables. Momos are often served with a dipping sauce, such as chilli garlic sauce, tomato-based chutneys, or achar, which can be peanut, sesame, or soybean-based.

name: Paneer Kathi Roll
description: A Paneer Kathi Roll is a popular Indian street food, essentially a wrap featuring marinated paneer (Indian cheese) and vegetables, typically served in a paratha (flatbread). Originating from Kolkata, it's a versatile dish where the paneer, often cooked as a tikka (marinated and grilled), is paired with onions, peppers, and various sauces, then rolled into a portable wrap.

name: Chicken Kathi Roll
description: A Chicken Kathi Roll, also known as a Kati Roll, is a popular Indian street food originating from Kolkata. It's essentially a skewer-roasted kebab, typically made with chicken, wrapped in a paratha (a type of Indian flatbread) along with salad and chutneys. Variations include different meats, vegetables, and sauces, but the core concept remains a flavorful filling wrapped in a soft, flaky bread.

name: Chicken Garlic Fried Rice
description: Chicken Garlic Fried Rice is a flavorful dish where cooked rice is stir-fried with chicken, garlic, and various seasonings, often with a distinct garlic flavor and sometimes with a "burnt garlic" element for added aroma and taste.

name: Onion Naan With Gravy
description: Onion naan is a type of leavened, oven-baked flatbread that is typically made with all-purpose flour, yogurt, and a leavening agent (like yeast or baking soda). It's often topped with finely chopped onions and sometimes other ingredients like coriander. The naan is then baked until golden brown and slightly crisp on the outside, while remaining soft and fluffy on the inside. Onion naan is commonly served with various types of gravy, such as butter chicken, dal makhani, or other rich, saucy dishes.

name: Cheese Naan With Gravy
description: Cheese naan is a popular variation of the Indian flatbread, naan, featuring a filling or topping of cheese, often served with a flavorful gravy, such as a curry or lentil-based dish. It's a delicious combination of the soft, fluffy naan and the rich, melted cheese, enhancing the overall dining experience.

name: Amritsari Kulcha
description: Amritsari kulcha is a popular Indian flatbread, a type of naan, that originates from Amritsar, Punjab. It's typically made with maida (all-purpose flour) and stuffed with a mixture of mashed potatoes, onions, and spices. The stuffed dough is then baked in a tandoor (clay oven), resulting in a crispy yet soft bread that's often brushed with butter. It's a common breakfast or meal item, traditionally served with chole (chickpea curry) and onion chutney.

name: Veg Schezwan Noodles
description: Veg Schezwan Noodles is a delicious, stir-fried noodle dish loaded with vibrant vegetables and tossed in either a classic Hakka or spicy Schezwan sauce. The noodles are cooked to perfection, with crunchy carrots, bell peppers, and cabbage adding texture and freshness.

name: Chicken Schezwan Noodle
description: Chicken Schezwan Noodles is a popular Indo-Chinese dish known for its spicy and flavorful profile. It typically features stir-fried noodles tossed with tender chicken pieces, vegetables like capsicum and cabbage, and a generous amount of Schezwan sauce.

name: Veg Hyderabadi Biryani
description: Hyderabadi veg biryani, also known as Tarkari Biryani, is a vegetarian version of the classic Hyderabadi biryani, where vegetables like carrots, peas, cauliflower, and potatoes replace meat. It's a layered rice dish cooked with aromatic spices, herbs, and sometimes nuts and dried fruits, resulting in a flavorful and aromatic experience.

name: Chicken Biryani

name: Paneer  Biryani
description: Paneer Biryani is a fusion dish that combines the rich, creamy flavors of Paneer Makhani (also known as Paneer Butter Masala) with the aromatic and layered presentation of Biryani. It features paneer (Indian cottage cheese) cooked in a luscious tomato-based gravy, enriched with butter and cream, layered with fragrant basmati rice, and often finished with a smoky "dum" cooking method.

name: Cheesy Garlic Bread

name: Tandoori chicken tikka sub

name: Chicken Crunch Burger

name: Crispy Chicken Burger

The chicken can be white or dark meat, and the patty can be made from ground or whole chicken breast. Common toppings include lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise, but many variations exist.

name: Hc Chicken Schnitzel
description: A "HC Chicken Schnitzel Burger" is a burger featuring a chicken schnitzel as its centerpiece. The burger typically includes this schnitzel served on a bun with various toppings and condiments, often reflecting local or house preferences.

name: BBQ Chicken Salad

name: Bbq Chicken Burger
description: A BBQ chicken burger typically features a grilled or smoked chicken patty, often seasoned with barbecue spices and sauce, served on a bun with standard burger toppings like lettuce, tomato, and potentially pickles or slaw. The defining characteristic is the use of chicken, which may be ground or a whole breast filet, and the application of barbecue flavors.

name: American Chicken Tikka
description: An "American Chicken Tikka Burger" typically combines the flavors of Indian chicken tikka with the format of an American burger. It involves marinated and grilled chicken pieces, often marinated in yogurt and spices like garam masala, ginger, garlic, and chili powder, placed in a hamburger bun with typical burger toppings and condiments. Variations may include adding a mint-yogurt raita or other chutneys, and using different types of buns.

name: American Crisper
description: An "American crisper burger" likely refers to a burger, possibly a cheeseburger, that is prepared to have a crispier or "smashed" patty, and potentially with a focus on fresh, crisp toppings like lettuce and pickles. name: Mix Chicken Salad

name: American Schnitzel
description: An American schnitzel burger typically features a breaded and fried cutlet, often chicken or pork, served on a bun with various toppings like lettuce, tomato, and sauces. It's an Americanized version of the traditional European schnitzel, which is a thin, pounded cutlet, breaded and fried, most commonly associated with Austrian and German cuisine. Chicken fried steak, a popular dish in the American Southwest, is a related concept, often considered an American adaptation of schnitzel.

name: American Bbq Chicken
description: An American BBQ burger typically features a beef patty cooked on a grill or smoker, often with barbecue sauce and various toppings, served on a bun. It's a variation of the classic hamburger, incorporating elements of American barbecue, such as slow-cooked, smoky meat and often a sweet and tangy barbecue sauce.

name: Loaded Crispy Chicken Salad

name: Hc Schnitzel King

Burger King is known for its burgers, including the Big King, and has also featured chicken burgers and other variations.

name: Crisper King
description: The "Crispy King" burger is a menu item at Burger King, known for its hand-breaded, crispy chicken patty. It features a white meat chicken fillet that is breaded and deep-fried, served on a toasted sesame seed bun with lettuce, tomato, mayonnaise, and pickles. The burger is one of Burger King's specialty sandwiches and is part of their chicken offerings.

name: Crispy Chicken Taco
description: A crispy chicken taco is a Mexican-inspired dish consisting of a crispy tortilla shell, typically made of corn, filled with seasoned shredded chicken, and often topped with cheese, lettuce, and other desired toppings. The chicken is typically seasoned with taco seasoning and lime juice, and the taco is often baked or fried to achieve a crispy texture.

name: Tandoori Chicken Taco
description: A Tandoori Chicken Taco is a fusion dish combining the flavors of Indian tandoori chicken with the presentation of a Mexican taco. It typically features marinated and spiced chicken, cooked in a tandoor oven, served in a tortilla with traditional taco toppings and possibly Indian-inspired sauces or chutneys.

name: Bbq Chicken Taco
description: A barbecue chicken taco features grilled or smoked chicken, typically seasoned with barbecue sauce or spices, nestled in a tortilla and often topped with various condiments. These tacos are a fusion of Mexican and American barbecue traditions, creating a flavorful and popular handheld meal.

name: Crispy Chicken Wrap
description: A crispy chicken wrap typically features a soft flatbread or tortilla filled with crispy fried chicken and other ingredients like lettuce, cheese, and sauce. The chicken is often breaded and deep-fried to achieve a crunchy exterior, while the tortilla or flatbread provides a convenient, portable way to enjoy the meal.

name: Tandoori Chicken  Wrap
description: A Tandoori Chicken Tikka wrap typically features marinated and grilled chicken pieces, known as tikka, that are cooked in a tandoor oven. The chicken is seasoned with a blend of Indian spices and yogurt, giving it a distinctive flavor and tender texture. This tikka is then typically wrapped in a tortilla, pita, or naan bread, often with additional ingredients like chutneys, yogurt sauces, or salad.

name: Bbq Chicken Wrap
description: A BBQ chicken wrap is a type of wrap consisting of shredded or sliced BBQ chicken and other fillings, all encased in a soft tortilla or flatbread. The fillings can vary, but often include BBQ sauce, lettuce, tomato, and sometimes cheese or other toppings like bacon or mayonnaise.

name: Spicy Chicken Wrap
description: A spicy chicken wrap is a type of sandwich consisting of cooked chicken, often seasoned and sauced to be spicy, wrapped in a flatbread or tortilla. It's a versatile dish, with various ingredients like vegetables, sauces, and cheese being added to customize the flavor and texture.

name: Makhni Chicken Wrap
description: A makhani chicken wrap typically features grilled or roasted chicken, marinated in a yogurt-based mixture with spices, and then wrapped in a flatbread with a rich, buttery tomato-based sauce (makhani sauce) and other fillings. The makhani sauce is a key component, known for its creamy, buttery, and mildly spiced flavor, often made with butter, tomatoes, and various spices like cumin, coriander, and fenugreek.

name: Chicken Cheese Wrap
description: A chicken cheese wrap is a type of sandwich or wrap where grilled or fried chicken and cheese are the primary fillings, often accompanied by other ingredients like lettuce, tomatoes, and various sauces, all wrapped in a tortilla or flatbread.

name: Special Mix Chicken Wrap
description: A "special mix chicken wrap" typically refers to a wrap sandwich filled with a combination of ingredients, with chicken as the primary protein, and a variety of other components like vegetables, cheese, and sauces, all enclosed in a flatbread. The specific "special mix" can vary widely depending on the restaurant or recipe, but it generally aims to offer a flavorful and convenient meal.

name: Crispy Fish Wrap
description: A crispy fish wrap typically consists of fried or baked fish, often cod or haddock, enclosed in a soft flatbread like a tortilla or pita. The fish is usually coated in a crispy batter or breading and may be accompanied by shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, and a sauce like tartar sauce or a creamy dressing.

name: Crispy Veg Salad
description: A crispy chicken salad typically features fried chicken, often breaded and deep-fried, paired with a variety of fresh vegetables and often a salad dressing. It's a popular dish in fast-casual restaurants and can be found in many variations, including those with different types of greens, toppings, and dressings.

name: Crispy Paneer Salad
description: A barbecue chicken salad typically features grilled or smoked chicken tossed with a variety of fresh ingredients like lettuce, tomatoes, and other vegetables, all dressed with a barbecue-flavored sauce or dressing. It combines the smoky flavors of barbecue with the crispness of a salad.

name: Tandoor Chicken Tikka Salad
description: A Tandoori Chicken Tikka salad typically features bite-sized pieces of boneless chicken, marinated in yogurt and spices, and cooked in a tandoor (a cylindrical clay oven). The cooked chicken tikka is then incorporated into a salad, often with a mix of fresh vegetables and a dressing or sauce.

name: Mix Veg Salad
description: A chicken salad is a dish typically made with cooked chicken, mixed with mayonnaise, and other ingredients like celery, onion, and grapes, and served on lettuce or bread. It's a popular cold dish, often enjoyed as a main course or sandwich filling. Key ingredients often include mayonnaise, celery, onion (or scallions), and grapes, with seasonings like salt, pepper

name: Loaded Crispy Chicken Salad
description: A loaded crispy chicken salad typically features crispy fried chicken pieces atop a bed of mixed greens and various toppings, often including vegetables, cheese, and a flavorful dressing. The "loaded" aspect means it includes a variety of ingredients beyond just lettuce and chicken, offering a more substantial and satisfying meal.

name: Loaded Chicken Salad
description: A loaded chicken salad is a variation of chicken salad that includes additional ingredients beyond the typical mayonnaise, chicken, and celery. It's often characterized by extra toppings and mix-ins that enhance the flavor and texture, potentially including ingredients like bacon, cheese, grapes, or nuts. While the specific ingredients can vary widely, the "loaded" aspect generally refers to an abundance of mix-ins that elevate the salad beyond a simple chicken and mayo mixture.

name: Coffee Frappe
description: A frappé coffee, also known as Greek frappé, is a frothy iced coffee drink made with instant coffee, water, sugar, and milk. The drink is shaken or blended to create a foamy consistency and is typically served over ice. The term "frappé" comes from the French word "frapper," meaning "to strike" or "to chill," referencing the shaking or blending process used to make the drink.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate milkshake is a cold, sweet beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate flavoring like chocolate syrup. It's a popular drink, often enjoyed with a straw and in a tall glass or cup.

name: Butterscotch
description: A butterscotch milkshake is a creamy, indulgent beverage made by blending ice cream, milk, and butterscotch flavoring, often with the addition of butterscotch syrup or chips. It's known for its rich, buttery, and slightly salty flavor, derived from the caramelization of sugar and butter. The addition of vanilla ice cream contributes to the smooth, creamy texture.

name: Strawberry
description: A strawberry milkshake is a sweet, creamy beverage made by blending strawberries, milk, and ice cream. It can be customized with additional ingredients like sugar, vanilla extract, or whipped cream, and is enjoyed as a refreshing drink, snack, or dessert.

name: Blueberry
description: A blueberry shake, or smoothie, is a blended beverage typically made with blueberries, a liquid base (like milk or yogurt), and sometimes other fruits or sweeteners. It's a refreshing and customizable drink, with variations including added ice cream or protein powder. The key to a good blueberry smoothie is often the use of frozen blueberries for a thicker, creamier texture.

name: Mix Berry
description: A mixed berry shake, often referred to as a smoothie, is a blended beverage typically made with a combination of fresh or frozen berries, a liquid base like milk or yogurt, and sometimes sweeteners or other additions. These shakes are known for their vibrant flavor, nutritional benefits, and versatility, as they can be customized with various fruits, liquids, and add-ins.

name: Blue Sky Frappe
description: A blue sky frappe shake, as the name suggests, is likely a blended beverage with a blue color reminiscent of a clear sky. It could be a milkshake or a frappé, potentially incorporating ingredients like blue spirulina, vanilla, or other blue-colored flavorings. The exact recipe would vary, but the aim is to achieve a visually appealing blue hue and a refreshing, blended texture.

name: Oreo Blast
description: An Oreo Blast Shake is a blended beverage featuring crushed Oreo cookies, vanilla ice cream, and milk, often garnished with whipped cream and extra Oreo pieces. It's a popular milkshake known for its creamy texture and chocolatey Oreo flavor. Some recipes also include chocolate syrup or other additions for extra richness and flavor.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: A Virgin Mojito, also known as a Nojito, is a non-alcoholic version of the classic Cuban cocktail, the Mojito. It replaces the rum with a non-alcoholic substitute like club soda, sparkling water, or ginger ale. The core components of mint, lime juice, and sweetener remain the same, offering a refreshing and tangy taste without the alcohol.

name: Masala Lemonade
description: Masala lemonade, also known as "Shikanji" or "Nimbu Pani" in India, is a spiced version of lemonade. It's a popular Indian beverage made by combining freshly squeezed lemon juice with water, a blend of spices (like cumin, black salt, and others), and a sweetener like sugar or honey. The resulting drink has a unique flavor profile, offering a refreshing mix of tangy, spicy, and slightly sweet notes.

name: Watermelon
description: A watermelon mocktail is a refreshing, non-alcoholic beverage that features watermelon as its primary ingredient. It often includes other complementary flavors like lime, mint, and sometimes a touch of sweetness from honey or simple syrup. Mocktails are essentially cocktails without the alcohol, and watermelon mocktails are a popular choice, particularly in warmer months, due to the fruit's high water content and naturally sweet taste.

name: Blue Lagoon
description: A Blue Lagoon Mojito is a refreshing cocktail that combines the classic mojito with the vibrant blue color and flavor of Blue Curaçao. It typically features rum, lime juice, mint, sugar, and blue curaçao, creating a visually appealing and tasty drink reminiscent of the Blue Lagoon.

name: Masala mojito
description: A masala mojito shake is a fusion drink that combines the refreshing flavors of a classic mojito with the aromatic spices of Indian cuisine. It typically includes fresh mint, lime juice, a touch of sweetness (often from a masala syrup), and a splash of soda water, sometimes with rum or a non-alcoholic base. The "masala" element often comes from a spiced simple syrup or a blend of spices added to the drink, creating a unique and aromatic flavor profile.

name: Crispy Chicken Fries
description: Chicken fries are breaded and fried strips of chicken, typically shaped like French fries, and served with dipping sauces. They are a type of finger food, often found on fast-food menus.

name: Peri Peri Chicken Fries
description: Peri-peri fries are french fries seasoned with peri-peri sauce, a spicy condiment originating from Portuguese-African cuisine. The sauce typically includes peri-peri (or piri-piri) chili peppers, garlic, lemon juice, and other spices. The fries are often seasoned with additional spices or herbs like cilantro or parsley.

name: Crunchy Chicken Fries
description: Chicken fries are a type of fried chicken, typically made from chicken breast meat, that are shaped and fried to resemble French fries. They are often breaded and seasoned before being deep-fried until crispy.

name: Tandoori Chicken Fries
description: However, tandoori chicken is a popular Indian dish where chicken is marinated in yogurt and spices, then traditionally cooked in a tandoor (a cylindrical clay oven).

name: Bbq Chicken Fries
description: BBQ chicken fries typically consist of crispy fried potatoes topped with shredded or diced barbecue-flavored chicken and often other toppings like cheese, onions, or sauces. They are a variation of loaded fries, taking inspiration from barbecue chicken dishes.

name: Hc Special Non Veg Fries
description: "HC Special Non Veg Fries" typically refers to a variation of loaded fries, a dish that combines french fries with various toppings, in this case, non-vegetarian toppings. While the exact ingredients can vary, it usually involves a base of french fries topped with meat, cheese, and other savory items. The "HC" likely refers to a specific restaurant or brand that offers this particular combination.

name: Maharaja  burger
description: The Maharaja Mac is a McDonald's burger sold in India, essentially the Indian version of the Big Mac. It's a chicken burger, as beef is prohibited in India, and features two grilled chicken patties, along with jalapenos, onions, tomatoes, lettuce, cheese, and a habanero sauce, all nestled between McDonald's signature Mac buns.

name: Virgin Mojito

It retains the refreshing flavors of mint and lime but replaces the rum with a sparkling beverage like club soda, Sprite, or ginger ale. This makes it a popular choice for those seeking a refreshing, alcohol-free option.

name: Spicy Mango Mojito
description: A Spicy Mango Mojito is a refreshing and vibrant cocktail that blends the classic mojito with the tropical sweetness of mango and a touch of heat. It typically includes white rum, lime juice, mint leaves, mango puree or chunks, sugar or simple syrup, and soda water. The addition of jalapeño or other chili peppers, muddled with the mint and lime, provides the spicy kick.

name: Blue Crush Mojito
description: A Blue Crush Mojito, also sometimes called a Blue Mojito, is a vibrant, blue-colored twist on the classic mojito cocktail. It typically features white rum, lime juice, mint, and sugar, just like a traditional mojito, but with the addition of blue curaçao liqueur, which gives it the signature blue hue and a slightly sweet, citrusy flavor. Sparkling water or soda water is also added to top it off, creating a refreshing and visually appealing drink.

name: Garlic Noodles
description: Garlic noodles are a noodle dish known for their rich garlic flavor, originating in San Francisco. The dish typically features Asian-style wheat noodles tossed with a flavorful garlic sauce. They were popularized by Chef Helene An in 1975 at the Thanh Long restaurant. The original recipe is a closely guarded secret, but it involves long strands of medium-thick noodles coated in a special garlic sauce and spices.

description: A veggie burger or meatless burger is a hamburger made with a patty that does not contain meat, or the patty of such a hamburger.

name: Schezwan Noodles
description: Schezwan Noodles, a popular Indo-Chinese dish, are characterized by their spicy, flavorful Schezwan sauce, which coats al dente noodles. The sauce typically includes ingredients like red chilies, Sichuan peppercorns, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, and vinegar. It's believed to be inspired by the bold flavors of Sichuan cuisine from China. Schezwan Noodles are a common street food and are easy to prepare at home, often incorporating vegetables and other ingredients for added flavor and texture.

name: Cheese Corn Burger

name: Vegetable Hakka Noodles
description: Vegetable Hakka noodles, a popular dish in Indo-Chinese cuisine, are typically made with stir-fried wheat noodles and a variety of vegetables, often including cabbage, bell peppers, carrots, and onions. The noodles are cooked and then tossed with the vegetables in a flavorful sauce, which can include soy sauce, vinegar, and chili sauce.

name: Singapore Noodles
description: Singapore-style noodles, also known as Singapore noodles, is a dish of stir-fried rice vermicelli noodles seasoned with curry powder, often featuring a combination of vegetables, eggs, and meat like char siu pork, shrimp, or chicken. Despite its name, the dish is believed to have originated in Hong Kong, not Singapore, and is commonly found in Cantonese-style eateries.

name: Chilly Garlic Noodles
description: Chilli Garlic Noodles are a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring noodles stir-fried with chili paste, burnt garlic, and various vegetables, offering a spicy and flavorful experience. The dish is relatively quick and easy to prepare, making it suitable for both everyday meals and gatherings.

name: Mix Veg Loly Pop
description: The veggies that I use for this recipe are potatoes, cabbage, carrots, capsicum and onion (or spring onions). You can add other vegetables like broccoli, French beans, cauliflower, etc. or just make it with a combination of 1 or 2 vegetables too. This recipe is a good way to use leftover veggies to make a delicious party snack.

name: Full Toping Veg Lolly Pop
description: These veg lollipop are crispy fried balls made with mix vegetable filling. In the Indo Chinese cuisine, there are two types of vegetarian lollipops. One is made with cauliflower and the second one is made with mix veggies. In this post I am sharing the mix vegetable version.

name: Cheese Lolly Pop
description: A "cheese lollipop" is not a standard or common food item like a cheese puff or a hard candy lollipop. It's likely a creative, non-standard term for a lollipop with a cheese flavor or ingredient. Cheese puffs are a common snack, but they are not lollipops. Lollipops are typically hard candies on a stick. If someone were to make a cheese lollipop, it would likely involve creating a cheese-flavored hard candy or perhaps a lollipop with a cheese-flavored filling or coating.

name: Cram Lolly Pop
description: A "Veg Cram Lollipop" is likely a reference to a vegetarian version of the popular Chicken Lollipop appetizer, also known as Vegetable Lollipop or Veg Lollipop. It is a deep-fried, bite-sized snack made with mashed mixed vegetables, breadcrumbs, and spices. The "cram" part of the name may refer to the way the vegetables are compressed or "crammed" into a lollipop shape.

name: Grilled Sandwich

name: Tandoor Paneer Sandwich
description: A tandoori paneer sandwich features marinated and grilled paneer, often with tandoori spices, nestled between bread slices with various fillings and sauces.

name: Cheesy Corn Sandwich
description: A cheesy corn sandwich typically features a filling of sweet corn kernels mixed with cheese and other flavorings, sandwiched between slices of bread, and often grilled or toasted.

name: HAV,N Pizza sandwich
description: A pizza sandwich is essentially a sandwich that combines the flavors of pizza with the convenience of a sandwich.

name: Sesame Paneer
description: Sesame Paneer is a dish that features Indian cottage cheese (paneer) coated in sesame seeds, offering a flavorful and textural contrast. The paneer is typically coated in a mixture of sesame seeds, spices, and sometimes a binder like flour, then pan-fried or baked until crispy. The sesame seeds provide a nutty flavor and a satisfying crunch, enhancing the overall experience.

name: SPL HAV,N PASTA
description: Pasta is a type of food made from an unleavened dough, typically of durum wheat flour and water, sometimes with eggs.

name: Paneer Finger
description: Paneer, a fresh cheese common in Indian cuisine, is often enjoyed as a finger food, particularly in dishes like paneer tikka and paneer pakora. Paneer tikka involves marinating and grilling or tandoor-cooking paneer cubes with vegetables like bell peppers, onions, and tomatoes. Paneer pakora involves deep-frying batter-coated paneer pieces. These dishes are popular appetizers or snacks, often served with chutneys or sauces.

name: Cheese Chilly ( Dry)
description: Cheese chilli refers to dishes that combine cheese with chili peppers, often creating a spicy and savory flavor profile. These dishes can range from appetizers like chile con queso to main courses such as chili cheese fries or even fusion dishes like chilli paneer. The term can also refer to dishes where cheese and chili are combined in a specific way, like in the Bhutanese national dish, ema datshi, which is a stew made with chili peppers and cheese.

name: Cheese Chilly Gravy
description: Cheese chilly gravy, as a specific dish, isn't a universally recognized or defined food. However, there are several dishes that involve cheese, chili, and gravy that could be interpreted as variations of this concept. "Chile con queso" is a Tex-Mex appetizer of melted cheese and chili peppers, often served with tortilla chips. Ema datshi, a Bhutanese stew, features chili peppers and cheese. Chili mac, a staple in American military dining facilities, combines chili with macaroni and cheese. Additionally, some dishes like chili paneer or macaroni and cheese can be customized with the addition of chili or a cheese sauce.

name: Paneer and Cheese sub
description: A Paneer and Cheese sub typically features spiced, crumbled or sliced paneer (Indian cottage cheese) combined with cheese, and often includes vegetables like onions, tomatoes, and bell peppers, all nestled between slices of bread.

name: Paneer Manchurian (Dry)
description: Paneer Manchurian Dry is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried paneer (Indian cheese) coated in a spicy, tangy sauce. It is a dry or semi-dry variation of the Manchurian dish, where the paneer is deep-fried until crispy and then tossed in a flavorful sauce. The sauce typically includes ingredients like soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, and chili paste, creating a delicious balance of savory, spicy, and slightly sweet flavors.
