name: Wateremelon Mocktail
description: Carefully slice the watermelon in half then in quarters to make it easier to remove the outer rind. Add the watermelon to a food processor or high speed blender. Add the fresh mint leaves, honey, and lime juice to the blender. Pulse until smooth. Adjust to taste with a pinch of fine sea salt and the honey.

name: Paneer Manchurian (Gravy)
description: Paneer Manchurian is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried paneer (Indian cheese) in a sweet, savory, and slightly spicy Manchurian sauce. It's a vegetarian variation of the more common meat-based Manchurian dishes. The dish typically involves deep-frying the paneer after coating it in a batter, then simmering it in a flavorful sauce made with ingredients like soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and other spices.

name: Paneer Pepper
description: Paneer pepper, also known as Kadai Paneer, is a popular Indian dish made by cooking paneer (Indian cheese) and bell peppers in a spicy, aromatic sauce. It is a vegetarian dish, often served with naan bread, paratha, or rice. The dish's name, Kadai Paneer, refers to the "kadai" or wok in which it is traditionally prepared.

name: Veg. Spring Roll
description: Veg spring rolls are a type of savoury, fried or baked appetizer or snack, popular in many Asian cuisines, particularly Indo-Chinese style. They consist of a thin pastry sheet wrapped around a filling of mixed vegetables and seasonings, then fried until crispy.

name: Crispy Vegetable
description: Crispy vegetables, often enjoyed as snacks or side dishes, are prepared by cooking vegetables until they achieve a crunchy texture. This can be done through various methods like frying, deep-frying, dehydrating, drying, or baking. Vegetable chips are a common example of crispy vegetables, typically made from a variety of root or leaf vegetables.

name: Crispy Corn Salt $ Pepper
description: Crispy corn with salt and pepper is a popular appetizer or snack, particularly in Chinese and Indian cuisine. It features crispy fried corn kernels seasoned with a simple yet flavorful combination of salt and pepper. The dish is known for its satisfying crunch and the balance of savory and slightly spicy flavors.

name: Honey Chilly Potato
description: Honey Chilli Potato is a popular Indo-Chinese dish consisting of fried potato fingers tossed in a sweet and spicy sauce made with honey, chili sauce, and other ingredients. It's a common appetizer or starter in Indian restaurants and street food, known for its crispy texture and sweet and spicy flavor profile.

name: Chilly Potato
description: Chilli potato is a popular Indo-Chinese appetizer known for its crispy fried potatoes tossed in a spicy, sweet, and tangy chili sauce. The dish is a fusion of Indian and Chinese flavors, commonly found in Indian restaurants and street food stalls. It typically involves deep-fried or air-fried potato fingers coated in a flavorful sauce made with ingredients like chili sauce, soy sauce, garlic, and onions.

name: Crispy Baby Corn
description: Crispy baby corn is a popular appetizer or side dish, particularly in Indo-Chinese cuisine. It involves lightly coating baby corn in a batter and then deep-frying it until golden and crispy. The coating often includes a mixture of cornstarch, all-purpose flour, and spices.

name: Veg Manchurian [DRY]
description: Veg Manchurian dry is a popular Indo-Chinese dish, typically served as a starter. It features deep-fried vegetable balls, often made with a mix of shredded vegetables like cabbage, carrots, and onions, bound with flour and spices. These fried balls are then tossed in a flavorful, thick, and semi-dry sauce, which is a mix of soy sauce, chili sauce, and other spices, creating a spicy, sweet, and savory taste. The "dry" version lacks the gravy found in the more saucy Manchurian dishes.

name: Veg Manchurian [GRAVY]
description: Veg Manchurian Gravy is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring crispy, fried vegetable balls (often made with cabbage, carrots, and other vegetables) simmered in a flavorful, slightly sweet, spicy, and tangy gravy. The gravy typically includes soy sauce, chili sauce, ginger, garlic, and other spices. It can be served as a starter or with fried rice or noodles.

name: Mushroom Duplex
description: Mushroom Duplex, also known as a stuffed mushroom or mushroom double-decker, is a snack or appetizer where mushroom caps are filled with a mixture, often cheese, vegetables, and spices, then joined together and deep fried. The resulting snack is crispy on the outside and savory on the inside, and can be served with ketchup or salsa.

name: Chilly Mushroom (Dry)
description: Chilli mushroom, a popular Indo-Chinese dish, features crispy fried mushrooms tossed in a flavorful, spicy, and slightly tangy sauce. It's a versatile dish, often served as an appetizer or side, and can be made dry or with a gravy,

name: Chilly Mushroom (Gravy)
description: Chilli mushroom gravy, a popular Indo-Chinese dish, features sauteed or fried mushrooms tossed in a spicy, sweet, and tangy sauce. It's often described as a saucy, semi-dry dish but can be made into a gravy with the addition of a cornstarch slurry. The sauce typically includes chili sauce, soy sauce, and other ingredients to achieve the desired balance of flavors.

name: Maida Paneer Naan
description: Maida paneer naan is a type of Indian flatbread (naan) that is made with refined wheat flour (maida) and stuffed with paneer, a type of Indian cheese. It is a popular variation of naan, known for its soft, fluffy texture and the savory flavor of the paneer filling.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Pav bhaji is a popular Indian street food consisting of a spicy mashed vegetable curry (bhaji) served with a soft bread roll (pav). Originating in Mumbai, Maharashtra, it's a dish known for its rich, buttery flavor and is often enjoyed as a snack or a main meal. The bhaji is typically made with a blend of mashed vegetables, including potatoes, onions, tomatoes, and peas, cooked in a flavorful masala base. The pav is buttered and lightly toasted, creating a delightful contrast to the spicy bhaji.

name: Cold Sandwich
description: A cold sandwich is a type of sandwich, often prepared ahead of time, where the ingredients are typically assembled without being heated. They are a popular lunch choice and can be made with a variety of breads, fillings, and condiments.

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: A grilled cheese sandwich, also known as a cheese toastie in the UK or a jaffle in Australia, is a simple hot sandwich typically made with cheese between slices of bread, cooked with butter or other fat until the cheese melts and the bread is toasted. While the name suggests grilling, it's more commonly prepared in a frying pan, griddle, or sandwich toaster. It's considered a comfort food, known for its ease of preparation and warm, gooey interior.

name: Cheese Grill Sandwich
description: A grilled cheese sandwich is a simple hot sandwich made by grilling or pan-frying cheese between slices of bread. Typically, cheddar or American cheese is used, and the bread is often buttered or Mayo'd on the outside for browning and flavor. The sandwich is cooked until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted and gooey.

name: Cheese Corn Sandwich
description: A cheese corn sandwich typically features a filling of sweet corn kernels mixed with cheese, often cheddar or mozzarella, and various spices and seasonings. The filling is usually sandwiched between two slices of bread, which can be toasted or grilled. Some variations also include mayonnaise, vegetables like onions or bell peppers, and even herbs like coriander.

name: Double Dal Tadka
description: Double Tadka Mixed Dal is the combination of two lentils, toor and split masoor that are cooked until soft, and then tempered twice: once with a tomato onion masala and then again with a chili cumin tempering.

name: Paneer Grill Sandwich
description: A paneer grill sandwich is a vegetarian sandwich featuring Indian cottage cheese (paneer) as the main filling, often spiced and grilled between slices of bread. The sandwich can be customized with various additions like chutneys, vegetables, cheese, and sauces. It's a popular dish in India, found in cafes, street stalls, and homes, offering a quick and tasty alternative to traditional Indian breakfasts.

name: Dal Makhanwala
description: Veg Makhanwala is a creamy, buttery curry made with a mix of vegetables simmered in a rich tomato and cashew gravy. It's a decadent and flavorful dish, perfect for indulgent meals.

name: Cheese Toast
description: A cheese toast sandwich, also known as a grilled cheese sandwich, is a simple and popular hot sandwich consisting of cheese between slices of bread, cooked until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted. It's a quick and easy dish, often enjoyed as a snack or light meal.

name: Aloo Tikki Wrap
description: Aloo Tikki wraps, while not a standard dish with a Wikipedia page dedicated to them, are essentially aloo tikki (spiced potato patties) served in a wrap format, often with various toppings and sauces. They combine the popular Indian street food aloo tikki with the convenience of a wrap, offering a customizable and handheld meal.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala, also known as Butter Paneer or Paneer Makhani, is a popular North Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cottage cheese) in a rich, creamy, and mildly spiced tomato-based gravy.

name: Crispy Wrap
description: A crispy wrap, also known as a crispy chicken wrap, is a type of wrap sandwich featuring a crispy-fried chicken strip or patty as its main filling, often accompanied by lettuce, cheese, and sauce, all encased in a soft flour tortilla. McDonald's popularized this type of wrap with their Snack Wrap and Buttermilk Crispy Tenders, which were variations of this concept.

name: Paneer kadahi jalandhari
description: Kadai Paneer (or known as Kadhai Paneer) is an Indian dish made by cooking paneer and bell peppers in a fragrant, freshly ground spice powder. It is usually served with buttered naan, paratha, roti, jeera rice, or steamed basmati rice.

name: Paneer Lababdar
description: Paneer Lababdar is a rich and authentic Punjabi curry that can be found on many North Indian restaurant menus. Soft and succulent paneer dunked in this creamy tomato and cashew-based gravy makes this paneer curry worth indulging in. If you love Indian Vegetarian Food Recipes then do try this one as well!

name: Mushroom Masala
description: Mushroom Masala is a flavorful Indian dish featuring mushrooms cooked in a rich, spiced gravy, typically onion and tomato-based.

name: Mushroom  Do Pyaza
description: Mushroom Curry (Mushroom Masala) This Mushroom Curry is rich, delicious and easy to make. It's not too spicy or hot but is packed with robust Indian flavors. It is creamy without the use of cream and has aromas similar to a restaurant curry.

name: Mix Vegetable
description: Mixed Vegetable is a vibrant medley of seasonal vegetables cooked in a rich, spiced gravy. It's a nutritious and flavorful dish that brings together the best of Indian home-cooking.

name: Chana Masala
description: Chana Masala is a popular Indian dish featuring chickpeas simmered in a spiced tomato-onion gravy.

name: Cheese $ Saucy Wrap
description: A cheese and sauce wrap typically consists of a soft flatbread, like a tortilla, lavash, or pita, filled with cheese, a sauce, and other desired ingredients like meat, vegetables, or seasonings. The specific cheese and sauce used can vary widely, with popular options including cheddar, processed cheese sauces, or even combinations of different cheeses.

name: Paneer Wrap
description: A Paneer Wrap, also known as a Paneer Kathi Roll, is a popular Indian street food featuring marinated and grilled paneer (Indian cheese) wrapped in a paratha (Indian flatbread) with vegetables and chutneys. It's a delicious and satisfying vegetarian option, often compared to a burrito or a frankie.

name: Tandoori Paneer Wrap
description: A Tandoori Paneer Wrap, also known as a Paneer Kathi Roll, is a popular Indian street food consisting of marinated and grilled paneer (Indian cottage cheese) wrapped in a flatbread, often a paratha or roti. It's a delicious and satisfying vegetarian option, featuring spiced paneer tikka, flavorful chutneys, and sometimes vegetables, all encased in a soft, flaky flatbread.

name: Roll Wrap
description: A "roll wrap" is a general term for a food item consisting of a filling wrapped in a flatbread, often cylindrical in shape. The term is sometimes used interchangeably with "wrap," but rolls often imply a more structured dough and a distinct cylindrical shape. Examples include kati rolls, where a skewer-roasted kebab is wrapped in paratha, and other wraps with various fillings enclosed in flatbreads.

name: Mix Wrap
description: A mix wrap, as the name suggests, is a type of food where various ingredients are rolled up inside a flatbread, typically a tortilla, lavash, or similar type of bread. The "mix" part refers to the diverse combination of fillings, which can include meats, vegetables, cheeses, sauces, and other flavorful additions.

name: Mango Shake
description: A mango shake, also known as a mango milkshake, is a cool and refreshing beverage made by blending ripe mango pieces, milk, and often sugar. It's a popular drink, especially in regions where mangoes are abundant. The basic recipe involves combining these ingredients in a blender until smooth.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate shake, or milkshake, is a cold and sweet beverage made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate syrup or other sweeteners. It is typically thick, creamy, and served chilled, often with toppings like whipped cream or chocolate shavings. Milkshakes originated in the United States around the turn of the 20th century and became a popular treat, especially among young people.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla milkshake, according to online recipes, is a blended drink typically made with milk, vanilla ice cream, and vanilla extract. It's known for its creamy texture and sweet, vanilla flavor. The drink is often served chilled, sometimes with whipped cream and/or a cherry on top.

name: Allo Tikki Burger
description: An aloo tikki burger is a vegetarian burger variation popular in India, featuring a mashed potato and vegetable patty (aloo tikki) served in a bun with various toppings, including sauce, vegetables, and sometimes cheese. The aloo tikki, the core of the burger, is a potato patty seasoned with spices and herbs, often served with chutneys and yogurt.

name: Classic Burger
description: , is a sandwich featuring a cooked patty of ground meat, usually beef, placed between two halves of a bun. It often includes toppings like lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles, along with condiments such as ketchup, mustard, and mayonnaise. A cheeseburger, a common variation, adds cheese to the classic burger.

name: Veg Burger
description: A veggie burger, also known as a meatless burger or veggie patty, is a burger patty made without meat. It typically consists of plant-based ingredients like beans (soybeans and tofu), nuts, grains, seeds, or fungi such as mushrooms or mycoprotein.

name: Cheese Burger
description: Cheeseburgers can include variations in structure, ingredients and composition. As with other hamburgers, a cheeseburger may include various condiments and other toppings such as lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, bacon, avocado, mushrooms, mayonnaise, ketchup, and mustard.

name: Corn Burger
description: A corn burger typically refers to a hamburger, or burger, where the patty is made of corn or includes corn as a significant ingredient, often in a vegetarian or plant-based context.

name: Corn Cheese Burger
description: Great Taste

name: Tandoori Burger
description: A Tandoori burger is a fusion dish that combines the flavors of Indian Tandoori cooking with the familiar format of a burger. It typically features a patty marinated in a Tandoori spice blend, cooked in a tandoor oven or similar cooking method, and then served in a bun with various toppings like onions, lettuce, and a sauce.

name: Achari Burger
description: An "achari burger" is a burger that incorporates the flavors of achaar, a South Asian spiced pickle. It typically features a patty, often paneer (Indian cheese) or another protein like chicken, marinated in achari spices. These spices often include mustard seeds, fenugreek, nigella seeds, and chili powder. The marinated patty is then placed between a bun, and may be topped with additional condiments or sauces.

name: Tandoori Cheese Burger
description: A Tandoori Cheese Burger combines elements of both Indian Tandoori cuisine and the classic American cheeseburger. It features a tandoor-cooked (or grilled) meat patty, often chicken or lamb, seasoned with tandoori spices, layered with cheese (like cheddar or mozzarella), and served in a bun with optional toppings.

name: Crunch Burger
description: A "crunch burger" isn't a standard, widely recognized term for a specific type of burger in the context of Wikipedia or food descriptions. However, the term likely refers to a burger that is characterized by a crispy or crunchy texture, which can be achieved in various ways.

name: Crunch Cheese Burger
description: A crunch cheese burger is a type of cheeseburger with a focus on a crispy, textural experience. It's not a standardized item, but it often involves adding a crunch element, such as crispy fried cheese, or a crisp topping like potato chips, to the cheeseburger.

name: Hot Spice Creamy
description: A "hot, spicy, creamy burger" description likely refers to a burger with a spicy, creamy sauce and potentially a spicy meat or topping. It's a common flavor profile that combines the heat of spice with the richness of creaminess.

name: Maharaja Burger
description: a double-decker burger with two corn and cheese patties, topped with jalapenos, onions, lettuce, cheese, and cocktail sauce, all nestled within a signature Mac bun. The burger is a vegetarian version of the classic Maharaja Mac, and it's known for its spicy, zesty flavors.

name: Maharaja Cheese
description: a vegetarian version of the popular Maharaja Mac, is offering featuring two double patties of corn and cheese, served with jalapenos, onion, lettuce, and a special cocktail sauce

name: Paneer Patty
description: A paneer patty burger is a vegetarian burger variation using a patty made from paneer (Indian cottage cheese). It's typically served on a bun with various toppings, like lettuce, tomato, and onion. Paneer, a soft cheese, is often spiced and fried to create a crispy, flavorful patty for the burger.

name: Paneer Crunch
description: A "paneer crunch burger" is a vegetarian burger featuring a crispy paneer (Indian cheese) patty. It's typically served on a bun with various toppings like lettuce, tomato, onions, and a sauce, often inspired by Indian flavors. Paneer is marinated, often with spices, before being grilled or fried to achieve a crispy texture.

name: Tandoori Paneer
description: Paneer Tikki Burgers - Dish by RishA tandoori paneer burger, as described on Poptos, features a paneer patty coated with a crispy batter, often topped with spicy mayonnaise, lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles. Some variations also include mashed potato patties infused with spices, creamy butter chicken, or cheese.

name: Paneer Delight
description: A Paneer Delight Burger is a vegetarian burger variation commonly found in India, featuring a patty made from paneer (Indian cheese). It often includes various vegetables and spices, and may be served with additional toppings like sauces, lettuce, and tomato. While specific descriptions and ingredients can vary between different restaurants, the core element is a paneer-based patty.

name: American Jumbo
description: An "American jumbo burger" generally refers to a hamburger that is significantly larger than a standard burger, often containing multiple patties, extra toppings, and a larger bun. The term "jumbo" highlights its size and may also indicate a larger portion size, potentially more filling and a higher caloric content.

name: Grilled Sandwich
description: A grilled sandwich, also known as a panini, toastie, or grilled cheese, is a type of sandwich where the bread is cooked, usually on a grill, until it's golden brown and the fillings, such as cheese and other ingredients, are melted. This cooking method gives the sandwich a warm, crispy texture and a melty, gooey interior.

name: Corn Sandwich
description: Corn Sandwich Recipe (With Cheddar Cheese)A corn sandwich is a type of sandwich that features corn as a main ingredient. It can be made with various fillings, such as cheese, vegetables, and spices, and can be prepared in different ways, including grilled, toasted, or pan-fried. A common variation is the corn mayo sandwich, which utilizes a filling of boiled sweet corn, onions, bell peppers, and seasonings, often with a touch of mayonnaise

name: Corn Cheese
description: A corn cheese sandwich is a simple and flavorful sandwich that combines sweet corn kernels with cheese, often with other vegetables and spices, and typically served on bread. The filling is usually spread between two slices of bread and may be toasted or grilled to melt the cheese and enhance the flavor.

name: Cheese Onion
description: A cheese and onion sandwich, also known as a cheese toastie or grilled cheese in some regions, is a sandwich made with cheese and onions, typically between two slices of bread. The cheese is often melted and can be Cheddar or other varieties, while the onions may be raw or grilled with the cheese.

name: Tandoori Sandwich
description: A tandoori sandwich is a grilled sandwich inspired by the flavors of tandoori cuisine. It typically involves a combination of tandoori-marinated ingredients, such as paneer (Indian cheese) or chicken, along with other components like onions, peppers, and a tandoori-flavored sauce or mayonnaise, all grilled between slices of bread.

name: Tandoori Cheese Sandwich
description: A tandoori cheese sandwich combines elements of Indian tandoori cuisine with a classic cheese sandwich. It typically involves a tandoori-seasoned paneer (Indian cottage cheese) filling, along with other vegetables like onions and capsicums, and mozzarella or other cheese, all baked or grilled between two slices of bread.

name: Achaari Sandwich
description: An achaari sandwich is a type of sandwich that typically features a filling of South Asian style pickles, often including mango, and other pickled vegetables, or a combination of both, between slices of bread. The "achaari" part refers to the use of pickles in the filling, a common ingredient in South Asian cuisine.

name: Paneer Sandwich
description: A paneer sandwich is a popular Indian street food and snack, featuring a filling of spiced paneer (Indian cottage cheese) between slices of bread. It's a versatile dish, with numerous variations in terms of spice levels, fillings, and preparation methods.

name: Mexican Sandwich
description: Mexican sandwiches, often called "tortas" or "cemitas", are a popular dish featuring various fillings within a bread roll or bread slice. The bread is typically a telera (flat, soft roll) or bolillo (similar to a baguette), and fillings can include meats like carnitas, milanesa, or ham, along with ingredients like avocado, cheese, and pickled jalapeños.

name: Tandoori Paneer
description: This Tandoori Paneer Sandwich has a spicy paneer filling with cilantro chutney, sriracha mayonnaise & cheese! It’s spicy, cheesy and has a infused smoky flavor through charcoal. It makes the perfect brunch for the weekend.

name: Mint Lover Sandwich
description: A mint sandwich, also sometimes referred to as a mint chutney sandwich or a mint-based sandwich, is a type of sandwich that incorporates the refreshing flavor of mint. It can be made with various ingredients, often featuring a base of bread with a mint-based filling or topping.

name: Mozz. Classic Corn
description: A Mozz Classic Corn Sandwich, often referred to as a Corn Cheese Sandwich or simply Corn Sandwich, is a popular dish featuring sweet corn kernels, cheese (usually mozzarella), and sometimes other ingredients like mayonnaise, sugar, and vegetables, served in a sandwich or toasted format. The classic version typically involves sautéing sweet corn with butter, adding mayonnaise and sugar, and then topping with shredded mozzarella cheese before baking or grilling until the cheese is melted and browned.

name: Mozz. Cheese Onion Olive
description: A sandwich containing mozzarella cheese, onion, and olives could be a variation of a cheese sandwich, a submarine sandwich, or even a custom-made creation. It would typically feature mozzarella cheese, sliced onions, and either black or green olives, all sandwiched between slices of bread.

name: Club Sandwich
description: A club sandwich or clubhouse sandwich, is a three-layer sandwich consisting of three slices of bread (traditionally toasted), sliced cooked poultry, fried bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise.[1][2] It is often cut diagonally into quarters or halves and held together by cocktail sticks.

name: Imported Monster Can
description: The Monster Energy drink can is typically a black, 16-ounce (473ml) can with a distinctive green claw-like logo and the word "Monster" in bold, stylized lettering. The can design also features a prominent "M" logo, often associated with the Monster Energy brand. The specific design and color scheme may vary slightly depending on the particular flavor or variation of the Monster Energy drink.

name: Red Bull
description: Red Bull is an Austrian brand of energy drinks owned by Red Bull GmbH. It is known for its distinctive blue and silver can and the slogan "Red Bull gives you wings". The drink is based on the Thai energy drink Krating Daeng, which translates to "Red Bull". Red Bull is the most popular energy drink in the world,

name: Imported Orange Juice
description: Imported orange juice" typically refers to orange juice made from oranges grown in one country and then shipped to another for processing or sale. The specific characteristics of imported orange juice can vary widely depending on the origin of the oranges, the processing methods used, and any added ingredients.

name: Prime Water
description: Prime is a brand of hydration drinks, energy drinks, and drink mixes created by Prime Hydration, LLC, and promoted by internet personalities Logan Paul and KSI. The "Prime Hydration" drinks are marketed as "hydration drinks" and are made with coconut water, electrolytes, B vitamins, and BCAAs, with no added sugar and around 20 calories per bottle. They are sweetened with acesulfame potassium and sucralose. The Prime brand has gained popularity due to the social media presence of its founders and through mainstream sports sponsorships.

name: Rani Juice
description: Rani is a brand of fruit-based juice drinks, primarily sold in the Middle East, and manufactured by Aujan Coca-Cola Beverages Company (ACCBC). It's known for its unique blend of smooth juice and real fruit pieces, often called "chunks". The brand was introduced in 1982 with the Rani Orange Float, inspired by a mandarin drink from Japan,

name: Nescafe Cold Coffee
description: Nescafé offers a range of ready-to-drink (RTD) cold coffees, available in various flavors like Intense Cafe, Chilled Latte, and Hazelnut. These are designed to be enjoyed chilled and offer a convenient way to consume Nescafé's coffee in a ready-to-drink format. You can also make cold coffee at home using Nescafé Classic instant coffee, by mixing it with cold milk and sugar in a blender or shaker, and pouring it over ice.

name: Water Bottle
description: Great Taste

name: Coke Can Imported
description: A Coke can, typically a 12-ounce (350 ml) aluminum can, is a standard container for Coca-Cola, a carbonated, sweetened soft drink. The Coca-Cola Company produces concentrate which is then mixed with water and sweeteners by licensed bottlers and packaged in cans and bottles. A standard can contains 38 grams (1.3 oz) of sugar, usually in the form of high-fructose corn syrup in North America.

name: Pepsi Can
description: A standard Pepsi can contains a carbonated cola drink with a blend of carbonated water, high fructose corn syrup, caramel color, sugar, phosphoric acid, caffeine, citric acid, and natural flavors. A 12-ounce can of Pepsi typically contains 41 grams of carbohydrates (all from sugars), 30 mg of sodium, 0 grams of fat, 0 grams of protein, 38 mg of caffeine, and 150 calories. Pepsi also has many different variations and flavors, such as Diet Pepsi, Pepsi Max, and Pepsi Wild Cherry.

name: Fruit beer
description: Fruit beer is a type of beer made with fruit added as an ingredient or flavoring. It can be made with a variety of fruits, such as strawberries, raspberries, cherries, or plums. Fruit beers are often produced with an alcohol percentage around 4-8% and are best served cold. Initially popular in Belgium, fruit beers are now available worldwide.

name: Heineken Beer
description: Heineken is a Dutch pale lager, known for its distinctive green bottle with a red star, and has been brewed by Heineken N.V. since 1873. It's the flagship product of the company, with an alcohol by volume (ABV) of 5%. The beer is made with water, barley malt, hops, and Heineken A-yeast, which was developed in 1886 and is still used in the brewing process,

name: Nutella Chocolate
description: Nutella is a brand of sweetened hazelnut cocoa spread manufactured by the Italian company Ferrero. It was first introduced in 1964 and is known for its sweet, chocolatey, and nutty flavor. The spread is primarily composed of sugar and palm oil, with hazelnuts, cocoa powder, skimmed milk powder, whey powder, soy lecithin, and vanillin as additional ingredients.

name: Pringles
description: Pringles are a brand of stackable potato-based chips known for their unique saddle shape and distinctive can packaging. They are technically considered an extruded snack because of their manufacturing process, which involves mixing dried potatoes with corn and wheat. Pringles were originally developed by Procter & Gamble (P&G) in 1967 and later sold to Kellogg's in 2012.

name: Butterscotch shake
description: butterscotch milkshake is a blended drink made with milk, vanilla ice cream, and butterscotch syrup, sometimes with additional ingredients like brown sugar or butterscotch chips for extra flavor and sweetness. It's known for its rich, creamy texture and the distinct butterscotch flavor, which is a combination of sweet and slightly salty notes reminiscent of caramel.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry shake, also known as a strawberry milkshake, is a cold beverage made by blending strawberries, milk, and ice cream. It's known for its sweet and creamy taste, offering a refreshing and satisfying treat. Milkshakes, in general, are a popular dessert or drink, with strawberry milkshakes being a classic and well-loved flavor.

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo shake, also known as an Oreo milkshake, is a blended beverage made with vanilla ice cream, milk, and Oreo cookies. It's a popular dessert drink known for its creamy texture and the distinct chocolate cookie flavor. Recipes often include additional ingredients like chocolate sauce for an extra layer of richness.

name: Black Crurent
description: A black currant shake is a refreshing beverage made with black currants, milk, and usually sugar or other sweeteners. It's a popular drink, especially in regions where black currants are readily available, and can be enjoyed for its tart and sweet flavor, as well as its potential health benefits. Black currants are known for being a good source of vitamin C.

name: Kiwi Crush
description: A "Kiwi Crush" shake, often a milkshake or smoothie, typically features the sweetness and tartness of kiwi fruit, often enhanced with other ingredients like milk, ice cream, or yogurt. It can also refer to a specific product, like Kiwi Crush from Shree Guruji, which is a concentrated fruit crush used in various applications like milkshakes, desserts, and beverages.

name: Virgin Mojito
description: A Virgin Mojito is a non-alcoholic version of the classic Cuban cocktail, the Mojito. It typically replaces the rum with soda water, sparkling water, or ginger ale, while keeping the core ingredients of mint, lime juice, and sugar. It's a refreshing and popular choice for those seeking a non-alcoholic alternative to the traditional Mojito.

name: Spicy Mango Mojito
description: A Spicy Mango Mojito is a tropical twist on the classic mojito, incorporating the sweetness of mango and a touch of heat from chili or jalapeño. It typically features white rum, lime juice, mint, mango puree or chunks, and a spicy element, often finished with soda water.

name: Blue Crush
description: A Blue Crush Mojito, also sometimes called a Blue Mojito, is a vibrant twist on the classic mojito cocktail, typically incorporating Blue Curaçao for its signature blue hue and citrusy flavor alongside the traditional mojito ingredients. It combines the refreshing mint, lime, and rum base of a mojito with the addition of Blue Curaçao, creating a visually striking and flavorful drink.

name: Lime Soda Sweet
description: A sweet lime soda, also known as limeade, is a refreshing, often carbonated, beverage made with lime juice and sweetened with sugar or other sweeteners. It's a popular drink, especially in warmer climates, and variations exist worldwide.

name: Lime Soda Salt
description: a combination of lime juice, soda water, and salt, rather than a single chemical compound. This mixture is commonly used to create a refreshing beverage, similar to a salty limeade. It's a simple combination of ingredients, with the salt enhancing the sourness of the lime and the soda water providing effervescence.

name: Tikki With Curd
description: Aloo tikki with curd, also known as Aloo Tikki Chaat, is a popular Indian street food made with spiced potato patties (aloo tikki) served with yogurt (dahi), chutneys, and other toppings. The dish is known for its crispy exterior, soft interior, and a mix of sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors.

name: Dahi Bhalla
description: Dahi Bhalla, also known as Dahi Vada, is a popular North Indian and Pakistani snack consisting of lentil fritters (bhallas/vadas) soaked in thick yogurt (dahi) and garnished with various chutneys and spices. It's a type of chaat, a category of savory snacks, and is enjoyed throughout the Indian subcontinent. The dish is known for its contrasting textures and flavors, with the soft, soaked bhallas providing a cool contrast to the tangy yogurt and spicy toppings.

name: Pan Shake
description: A paan shake, also known as paan milkshake or paan shots, is a refreshing Indian beverage made by blending betel leaves with milk, gulkand (rose petal jam), and other ingredients like fennel seeds and nuts. It's a popular drink, especially in India, and is known for its unique flavor and cooling properties.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla shake, also known as a vanilla milkshake, is a beverage typically made by blending vanilla ice cream, milk, and sometimes vanilla extract or syrup to create a creamy, sweet, and cold drink. It's a popular dessert and refreshment, often enjoyed on its own or as an accompaniment to meals.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate shake is a cold, sweet beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate flavoring (like chocolate syrup or cocoa powder). It's often served in a tall glass with a straw. Variations include adding other ingredients like fruit, candy, or nuts.

name: Butterscotch shake
description: A butterscotch milkshake is a sweet, creamy beverage made by blending milk, vanilla ice cream, and butterscotch syrup, often with optional additions like butterscotch chips or brown sugar

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo shake, also known as a cookies and cream shake, is a blended beverage featuring vanilla ice cream, milk, and crushed Oreo cookies. It's a popular dessert or refreshing drink, often enjoyed at restaurants, soda fountains, and at home. The addition of Oreo cookies provides a chocolatey, crunchy element to the creamy, sweet shake.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry shake, also known as a strawberry milkshake, is a cold beverage made by blending milk, ice cream, and strawberries, typically with added sugar or other sweeteners. It's a popular dessert drink known for its creamy texture and sweet, fruity flavor.

name: Kitkat Shake
description: A Kit Kat shake is a milkshake that incorporates Kit Kat chocolate bars. It typically involves blending milk, ice cream, and pieces of Kit Kat bars, often with additional chocolate flavoring like syrup or sauce, to create a sweet, cold, and creamy beverage with a distinctive chocolate and wafer crunch.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a beverage made by brewing ground roasted coffee beans with hot water. It's a popular drink worldwide, often enjoyed for its stimulating effects and diverse flavor profiles. Brewing methods vary, including drip, French press, and espresso.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee encompasses various chilled coffee beverages, with two main categories: iced coffee and cold brew. Iced coffee is made by pouring hot-brewed coffee over ice, often requiring a stronger brew to compensate for dilution. Cold brew coffee, on the other hand, is made by steeping coffee grounds in cool or cold water for an extended period, resulting in a concentrate that can be diluted with water or milk.

name: Hot Chocolate
description: Hot chocolate, also known as hot cocoa or drinking chocolate, is a warm beverage made by mixing chocolate or cocoa powder with heated milk or water and often sweetened with sugar. It's a popular drink, especially during colder months, and is often enjoyed with whipped cream or marshmallows. Some versions, made with melted chocolate, are thicker and less sweet, sometimes referred to as drinking chocolate.

name: Morning Soul
description: "Morning Soul" is not a universally recognized or documented drink with a specific Wikipedia page. However, it could be a descriptive term for a variety of beverages, particularly those enjoyed in the morning for their perceived health benefits or refreshing qualities. These could include fruit juices (like orange or grapefruit), infused water with fruits and herbs, or even a simple glass of water with lemon.

name: French Velvet
description: "French Velvet" likely refers to the texture of a coffee drink, specifically a velvety smooth, rich mouthfeel, rather than a specific type of coffee bean or roast. This texture is often achieved by using steamed milk with a specific micro-foam, creating a luxurious, creamy consistency in drinks like lattes or flat whites. While "French Roast" refers to a dark roast coffee with a bold, smoky flavor, it doesn't directly describe the velvety texture of "French Velvet".

name: Ontario Melt
description: There's no widely recognized coffee beverage called "Ontario Melt Coffee" with a specific definition or description on Wikipedia or in general coffee culture. It's possible this is a local term, a menu item in a specific cafe, or a newly coined phrase. To understand what "Ontario Melt Coffee" might refer to, you'd likely need to find the specific cafe or context where this name is used.

name: Oreo Greek
description: There's no such thing as "Oreo Greek Coffee" in the sense of a standard or widely recognized beverage. Oreo is a brand of chocolate sandwich cookies, and Greek coffee is a specific type of coffee preparation. It's possible this term is being used to describe a homemade or unique beverage that combines the two, perhaps an iced coffee with Oreo cookie pieces or a coffee-flavored dessert with Oreos.

name: Vanilla
description: Vanilla ice cream, a classic and popular frozen dessert, is made by freezing a mixture of cream, sugar, and vanilla flavoring. It's a versatile flavor, often used as a base for other desserts like sundaes and milkshakes, and is a common topping for pies. The vanilla flavor can come from natural vanilla extract, artificial vanillin, or a combination of both.

name: Strawberry
description: Strawberry ice cream is a flavor of ice cream made with strawberries or strawberry flavoring. It's created by blending fresh strawberries or a strawberry flavoring with the standard ice cream base of eggs, cream, vanilla, and sugar. Most strawberry ice cream has a pink or light red color.

name: Chocolate
description: Chocolate ice cream is a frozen dessert made with cocoa powder, and the typical ingredients of vanilla ice cream: eggs, cream, vanilla, and sugar. Sometimes, chocolate liquor is also used for flavor. The cocoa powder gives it the characteristic brown color, and it's generally not necessary to add artificial coloring. To meet standards, the Codex Alimentarius requires a minimum percentage of nonfat cocoa solids in the mix.

name: Butterscotch
description: Butterscotch ice cream typically features a rich, creamy base infused with the distinctive flavor of butterscotch. This flavor is achieved by combining butter, brown sugar, and sometimes a touch of molasses or corn syrup, which are cooked to a "soft crack" stage, resulting in a caramelized, buttery, and slightly salty taste.

name: Tuity Fruity
description: Tutti frutti ice cream is a flavor characterized by the inclusion of small pieces of candied or fresh fruits. The name "tutti frutti" is Italian for "all fruits" and signifies the combination of various fruits in the ice cream. This flavor has a long history, dating back to the 19th century, and is known for its colorful and fruity profile.

name: The Chillnut
description: "The Chillnut" is not a recognized or established ice cream flavor or brand according to general knowledge sources like Wikipedia or common ice cream brand lists. It's likely a made-up name, a local product, or a misremembered or misspelled term for a known flavor or brand. Ice cream typically involves a combination of dairy (milk, cream, etc.), sweeteners, flavorings, and stabilizers.

name: Hav'N Melt

name: Fresh Lime
description: A fresh lime drink, often called fresh lime juice or limeade, is a beverage made from freshly squeezed lime juice, typically sweetened with sugar or a sweetener, and diluted with water. It can be served with or without carbonation, and is known for its tangy, refreshing, and slightly sweet flavor.

name: Mint Mojito
description: A Mojito is a classic Cuban highball cocktail known for its refreshing combination of flavors: sweetness from sugar, tartness from lime juice, and herbaceous notes from mint, all complemented by the kick of white rum and the effervescence of soda water. It's traditionally served over ice in a Collins or highball glass, and often garnished with a sprig of mint.

name: Cola Mojito
description: A Cola Mojito is a cocktail that combines the classic Cuban Mojito with the addition of cola. The traditional Mojito includes white rum, lime juice, sugar, mint, and soda water. Replacing the soda water with cola adds a distinct caramel flavor and sweetness, creating a unique twist on the popular drink. The combination of rum, lime, mint, and cola results in a refreshing and slightly more complex taste profile compared to a traditional Mojito.

name: Cheese Corn Burger + Coke+Fries (Kids Special)
description: A cheese corn burger typically refers to Corn Cheese, a Korean-inspired dish, not a burger in the traditional sense.
