name: Salted Fries
description: Salted fries, also known as French fries, are a popular dish consisting of deep-fried potato batons, typically served hot and crispy. They are commonly seasoned with salt and enjoyed as a side dish or snack, often paired with various sauces like ketchup, mayonnaise, or vinegar.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri-peri fries are a spicy variation of French fries, seasoned with peri-peri (also spelled piri-piri) seasoning, which is a blend of chili peppers, garlic, lemon juice, and other spices. The fries are typically deep-fried and then coated or sprinkled with the peri-peri spice blend, offering a flavorful and often spicy kick

name: Masala Fries
description: Masala fries are a popular Indian-inspired dish that elevates classic french fries with a blend of aromatic spices and seasonings. They typically involve deep-fried or oven-baked potato strips that are then tossed in a mixture of spices like chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, and sometimes ginger and garlic powder. The result is a flavorful and slightly spicy snack or side dish.

name: Cheesy Fries
description: Cheese fries, also known as cheesy chips, are a popular dish consisting of French fries topped with cheese. The dish is commonly found in fast-food restaurants, diners, and grills, particularly in English-speaking countries.

name: Cheesy Nuggets
description: Cheesy nuggets are bite-sized pieces of food, typically made with cheese, that are coated in breading and fried. They offer a crispy exterior and a creamy, cheesy interior. These nuggets can be served as a snack or appetizer and are often paired with dipping sauces like ketchup, ranch, or sweet and sour sauce.

name: Bullets
description: "Bullet" in the context of food typically refers to Vegetable Bullets, which are appetizers or snacks made from mashed potatoes, grated carrots, and other vegetables, shaped into small, round forms, and often breaded and fried

name: Spring Roll
description: Spring rolls are a type of rolled appetizer or dim sum, popular in Chinese, Vietnamese, and Southeast Asian cuisines. They are characterized by a thin wrapper, often made of rice paper or a crêpe-like pastry, filled with a variety of ingredients, and either fried or served fresh. The specific fillings, wrappers, and cooking methods vary by region and culture.

name: Cheesy Dip
description: A cheesy dip is a type of dip made primarily with cheese or processed cheese, often combined with other ingredients to create a flavorful and dippable sauce. It's a popular appetizer, snack, or party food, commonly served with chips, crackers, vegetables, or other dippers.

name: Spicy Dip
description: A spicy dip is a condiment, often with a thick and creamy consistency, that adds a flavorful kick to foods through the use of chili peppers or other spicy ingredients. These dips can be enjoyed with a variety of foods, including vegetables, crackers, chips, and more. They are distinct from sauces, which are typically thinner and can be poured over food, while dips are meant to be scooped or dipped into.

name: Cheesy Spicy Wrap
description: A cheesy spicy wrap typically consists of a flour tortilla filled with various ingredients, including cheese and spicy elements, then wrapped and often grilled or heated. The specific ingredients and preparation methods can vary, but the core concept is a handheld meal combining melted cheese and a touch of heat within a convenient wrap format.

name: Hav'N Special Wrap
description: A "HAVN special wrap" likely refers to a wrap sandwich, a type of food made by wrapping fillings in a flatbread. The term "HAVN" is not a standard culinary term, so the specific ingredients and preparation would depend on the establishment or recipe using that name. Generally, wraps consist of a soft flatbread (like a tortilla, lavash, or pita) filled with various ingredients such as meats, cheeses, vegetables, and sauces.

name: Veg Tacco
description: A veggie taco, as the name suggests, is a taco filled with vegetables instead of meat. It typically includes a tortilla (corn or flour) filled with various vegetables, often seasoned and cooked. Common ingredients include beans, rice, corn, and a variety of sauteed or roasted vegetables like bell peppers, onions, and zucchini.

name: Mexican Tacco
description: A Mexican taco is a traditional dish featuring a small, hand-held tortilla, typically made of corn or wheat, filled with a variety of ingredients. These fillings can include beef, pork, chicken, seafood, beans, vegetables, and cheese, and are often topped with condiments like salsa, guacamole, or sour cream, and vegetables such as lettuce, coriander, onion, tomatoes, and chiles. Tacos are a popular form of antojitos, or Mexican street food, and are enjoyed worldwide.

name: Onion Pizza
description: Onion pizza, as described on Wikipedia, is a type of pizza that features onions as a primary topping. It can be found in various forms, often as a variation of existing pizza styles or as a distinct dish altogether. Some notable examples include Argentine Fugazza, French Pissaladière, and Sicilian pizza, all of which incorporate onions in different ways.

name: Corn Pizza
description: Corn on pizza is a topping consisting of kernels of sweet corn. It's a relatively common topping, particularly in the UK, though it's less common in other pizza traditions. The sweetness of the corn provides a nice contrast to the savory flavors of cheese and tomato sauce, and the texture can be a nice addition as well, with the lightly crisp kernels offering a pleasant bite.

name: Capsicum Pizza
description: Capsicum pizza is a pizza variety where capsicum (bell pepper) is a prominent topping, often alongside other ingredients like onions, tomatoes, and cheese. It's a popular dish, particularly in Indian-style pizzas, and can be enjoyed as a starter or a main course. The capsicum can be used raw, roasted, or sauteed to enhance its flavor.

name: Jalpeno Pizza
description: Jalapeno pizza is a popular pizza variety that features jalapeno peppers as a key topping. The specific ingredients and preparation can vary, but the defining characteristic is the inclusion of jalapenos, which contribute a spicy flavor to the pizza. Some variations include jalapeno popper pizza, which combines jalapenos with cream cheese and other ingredients to mimic the flavors of jalapeno poppers. Other combinations include chicken, pesto, and various cheeses with jalapenos.

name: Stick Kulfi
description: Kulfi is a traditional Indian frozen dessert, often described as a denser, creamier version of ice cream, and is typically served on a stick. It's made by simmering milk until it thickens, then flavoring it with ingredients like cardamom, pistachio, or saffron. Unlike ice cream, kulfi is not whipped during freezing, resulting in a denser, icier texture. It's a popular street food, often sold by vendors with portable freezers.

name: Garlic Bread
description: Garlic bread is a type of toasted bread, often a baguette, sourdough, or ciabatta, that is topped with garlic and olive oil or butter, and sometimes other herbs. It is then either grilled or baked until toasted.

name: Stuffed Garlic Bread
description: Stuffed garlic bread is a variation of the classic garlic bread, featuring a bread base, typically a baguette or similar, that is hollowed out and filled with a variety of ingredients, then baked or grilled. Common fillings include cheeses, vegetables, meats, and various sauces, often including garlic and herbs. It can be served as a side dish or a main course, offering a customizable and flavorful experience.

name: Hav'N Garlic Bread
description: Stuffed garlic bread is a variation of the classic garlic bread, featuring a bread base, typically a baguette or similar, that is hollowed out and filled with a variety of ingredients, then baked or grilled. Common fillings include cheeses, vegetables, meats, and various sauces, often including garlic and herbs. It can be served as a side dish or a main course, offering a customizable and flavorful experience.

name: Salad
description: A "gym salad" is not a standard culinary term. However, it likely refers to a salad that is designed to be healthy and suitable for consumption after a workout, emphasizing ingredients that are beneficial for fitness and muscle recovery. These salads often include lean protein sources, vegetables, and healthy fats, and may be lower in calories and carbohydrates compared to other types of salads.

name: Hot Salad
description: A "hot salad" is a warm or hot dish consisting of mixed ingredients, often including vegetables, that is served warm rather than chilled or at room temperature. These salads can feature roasted vegetables, grilled ingredients, or warm dressings.

name: Ginger Shot
description: A ginger shot is a concentrated beverage, typically a small (1-2 ounce) serving, made from freshly squeezed ginger juice, sometimes with other ingredients like lemon or turmeric. It's known for its potent, spicy flavor and potential health benefits, such as aiding digestion and boosting the immune system. Ginger shots are often consumed to kickstart the day or as a quick pick-me-up.

name: Turmeric Shot
description: A turmeric shot is a small, concentrated drink typically made from fresh or powdered turmeric root, often combined with other ingredients like ginger, lemon juice, and black pepper. These shots are known for their potential health benefits, particularly their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, and are often consumed for immune boosting and digestive support.

name: French Fries
description: French fries, also known as fries or chips (especially in Commonwealth countries), are deep-fried potato strips. They are typically made by cutting potatoes into even strips, drying them, and then frying them, often in a deep fryer. French fries are a popular side dish or snack, commonly served hot with salt and various sauces like ketchup, mayonnaise, or vinegar.

name: Masala Fries
description: Masala fries are a popular Indian-inspired snack or side dish consisting of French-fried potatoes seasoned with a blend of aromatic spices. These spices typically include chili powder, turmeric, garam masala, ginger, and garlic powder, creating a flavorful and slightly spicy profile. The fries are often served as an appetizer, snack, or side, and can be customized with various toppings and chutneys.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri-peri fries are a flavorful and spicy variation of French fries, seasoned with a peri-peri spice blend. They typically feature crispy, golden-brown fries with a zesty, spicy kick from the peri-peri seasoning. The seasoning is derived from the peri-peri chili pepper, also known as the African bird's eye chili, and often includes other ingredients like garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, and various spices. These fries are a popular side dish or snack, offering a bold and exciting taste experience.

name: Cheese Fries
description: Cheese fries are a dish consisting of French fries covered in cheese, often with additional toppings. They are a popular fast-food item, particularly in English-speaking countries, and can be found in diners and grills as well. Cheese fries are similar to poutine (a Canadian dish with cheese curds and gravy) and can be considered a variation of loaded fries.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Loaded fries are a dish consisting of French fries topped with various ingredients, including cheese, meats, sauces, and vegetables. They are a popular and versatile dish, often served as an appetizer or side dish.

name: Veg Nuggets (6 Pcs )
description: Veggie nuggets are meatless nuggets made primarily from vegetables, grains, and other plant-based ingredients, coated in a breadcrumb or batter and typically deep-fried or baked. They are a popular vegetarian and vegan alternative to traditional chicken nuggets.

name: Veg Nuggets (12 Pcs)
description: Veggie nuggets are meatless nuggets made primarily from vegetables, grains, and other plant-based ingredients, coated in a breadcrumb or batter and typically deep-fried or baked. They are a popular vegetarian and vegan alternative to traditional chicken nuggets.

name: Cheese Pops (10 Pcs)
description: Cheese Pops, also known as cheese puffs, cheese curls, or cheese balls, are a type of puffed corn snack, typically coated in a cheese or cheese-flavored powder. They are made by extruding heated corn dough through a die, forming the desired shape, and then coated with a cheesy seasoning.

name: Garlic Bread
description: Garlic bread is a type of toasted bread, typically made from baguette, sourdough, or ciabatta, topped with garlic and butter or olive oil. It may also include additional herbs like oregano or chives. The bread is then toasted, either grilled or baked, until it becomes crispy and fragrant.

name: Stuffed Garlic Bread
description: Stuffed garlic bread generally refers to bread, often baguette or similar, that is sliced or opened and filled with a mixture containing garlic and often other ingredients like cheese, herbs, or butter, before being baked or grilled until golden and fragrant. It's a popular appetizer or side dish, sometimes enjoyed as a meal, and can be found in various regional and cultural variations.

name: Spring Roll
description: Spring rolls are a variety of filled, rolled appetizers or dim sum, common in East Asian, Southeast Asian, and South Asian cuisines. The name "spring roll" is a direct translation of the Chinese term "chūn juǎn" (春卷), which literally means "spring roll". These rolls consist of various fillings wrapped in a thin pastry, which can be cooked in different ways, including frying or steaming.

name: Creamy Spring Roll
description: A "creamy spring roll" generally refers to a type of spring roll, typically of the fresh or non-fried variety, featuring a creamy filling or a creamy dipping sauce. These rolls often incorporate ingredients like cream cheese, avocado

name: Maggi
description: It was founded by Julius Maggi in the late 19th century with the goal of providing convenient and nutritious food options for busy families. Maggi is particularly popular in Australia, India, South Africa, and several Southeast Asian countries.

name: Sweet Corn Cup
description: A "sweet corn cup" typically refers to esquites, a Mexican street food consisting of boiled corn kernels served in a cup, often with various toppings. It's a popular and readily available snack, especially in Mexico, where it's known as "corn in a cup". The corn is typically boiled until tender and then combined with ingredients like lime juice, chili powder, cheese, mayonnaise, and other seasonings.

name: Mojito
description: A Mojito is a classic Cuban highball cocktail known for its refreshing combination of flavors: white rum, sugar (traditionally cane sugar), lime juice, soda water, and mint. The traditional recipe involves muddling mint leaves with sugar and lime juice, then adding rum and topping with soda water and ice, often garnished with a sprig of mint. The combination of sweet, sour, and herbaceous notes makes it a popular choice, particularly during warmer months.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla shake, also known as a vanilla milkshake, is a sweet beverage made primarily from vanilla ice cream, milk, and often vanilla extract or other flavorings. It's a classic and popular choice, typically enjoyed as a dessert or refreshing drink.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry shake, also known as a strawberry milkshake, is a sweet beverage made with milk, ice cream, and strawberries, often with additional sweeteners like sugar or honey. It is a popular and refreshing treat, enjoyed for its creamy texture and fruity flavor.

name: Mango Shake
description: A mango shake, also known as mango milkshake, is a popular beverage made by blending fresh or frozen mangoes with milk and sometimes ice cream, sugar, or other flavorings. It's a refreshing and creamy drink, especially enjoyed during hot weather. The basic recipe involves combining mango pieces with milk and blending until smooth.

name: Caramel Shake
description: A caramel shake, also known as a caramel milkshake, is a cold beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and caramel flavoring or syrup. It's a variation of the classic milkshake, featuring the rich, sweet taste of caramel. The ice cream provides a creamy base, while the caramel adds a distinct flavor and sweetness.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: A butterscotch milkshake is a sweet, cold beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and butterscotch flavoring or syrup. It's known for its rich, creamy texture and the distinctive flavor of butterscotch, which combines sweet and slightly salty notes. The base of the shake is often vanilla ice cream, and it may be garnished with butterscotch chips or sauce.

name: Black Crurent Shake
description: A black currant shake, often called a blackcurrant milkshake, is a refreshing beverage made with black currant flavor, milk, and usually vanilla ice cream. The black currant provides a distinctive sweet and tart taste, while the ice cream adds creaminess. It is a popular drink, particularly in the UK and other European countries, and can be enjoyed as a refreshing treat or even a breakfast beverage.

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo shake, often called an Oreo milkshake, is a blended beverage consisting of milk, ice cream (usually vanilla), and crushed Oreo cookies. The result is a creamy, thick, and chilled drink with the distinctive chocolatey flavor of Oreo cookies. Sometimes, additional ingredients like chocolate syrup or whipped cream are added for extra richness and flavor.

name: Kitkat Shake
description: A Kit Kat shake is a type of milkshake, which is a sweet, cold beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream, and flavorings. In the case of a Kit Kat shake, the distinct flavor comes from blending in Kit Kat chocolate bars or pieces. The resulting drink is a creamy, chocolatey milkshake with the added crunch of the Kit Kat wafer pieces.

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate milkshake, often simply called a "chocolate shake," is a sweet, cold beverage typically made by blending milk, ice cream (often chocolate flavor), and chocolate syrup or other chocolate flavoring. It's known for its creamy, smooth texture and rich chocolate taste.

name: Chocolate Oreo Shake
description: A chocolate Oreo shake is a blended drink typically made with milk, ice cream (often chocolate or vanilla), Oreo cookies, and chocolate syrup. It can also be made with other milk alternatives like almond milk, coconut milk, or soy milk, and can be topped with whipped cream and additional Oreo pieces. The thickness can be adjusted by varying the amount of milk and ice cream.

name: Classic Veg Burger
description: A classic vegetarian (or "veg") burger, also known as a veggie burger or meatless burger, features a patty made from plant-based ingredients instead of meat. Common ingredients include beans (like soybeans or tofu), nuts, grains, seeds, or fungi like mushrooms or mycoprotein. These ingredients are combined and formed into a patty, which is then typically served on a bun with traditional burger toppings like lettuce, tomato, and condiments.

name: Spicy Burger
description: A spicy burger can refer to various types of burgers that incorporate spicy elements in their preparation. One example is the Irish Spice Burger, a breaded meat patty with a specific spice blend developed in the 1950s. Another example is the McSpicy, a McDonald's burger featuring a spicy fried-chicken cutlet. Additionally, a chili burger combines a hamburger patty with chili con carne, often with toppings like cheese and onions.

name: Crispy Veg Burger
description: A crispy vegetarian burger typically features a battered and breaded patty made from a blend of vegetables like peas, corn, carrots, green beans, onions, potatoes, rice, and spices. These ingredients are combined, shaped into a patty, and then fried to achieve a crispy exterior. It's served in a bun, often with lettuce and other toppings like eggless mayonnaise.

name: Crunchy Chips Burger
description: A crunchy chips burger typically refers to a burger that includes potato chips as a key ingredient, often inside the burger itself or as a side. This could mean adding chips to a standard burger patty, or it could refer to a "chip butty," which is a sandwich consisting primarily of chips between two slices of bread.

name: Tandoori Burger
description: A tandoori burger typically features a chicken or other meat patty infused with tandoori spices, resulting in a flavorful and often spicy burger experience. The patties are commonly made with a blend of yogurt and tandoori masala, a mix of Indian spices, and cooked in a tandoor oven or on a grill. The burger is then typically served on a bun with various toppings like mint chutney mayo, pickled onions, and lettuce.

name: Corn Burger
description: A corn burger, also known as a corn patty burger, typically features a patty made primarily of corn, often combined with other ingredients like mashed potatoes, spices, and sometimes vegetables or breadcrumbs. It's a vegetarian or vegan option that can be found in various cuisines and is sometimes served as a quick, easy, and delicious meal, particularly for picnics or casual gatherings.

name: Cheese Burger
description: A cheeseburger is a hamburger with one or more slices of cheese on top of the meat patty, typically added near the end of the cooking process. The cheese is usually melted by the heat of the patty. Cheeseburgers can be found at various restaurants, including fast food chains, and can have different variations in structure, ingredients, and composition.

name: Paneer Stuff Burger
description: A paneer stuffed burger typically features a patty made from paneer (Indian cheese) and mashed potatoes, sometimes with other ingredients like spices and herbs, placed between burger buns. The paneer patty is often seasoned with Indian spices and herbs like cumin, coriander, and chili flakes. It can be served with various toppings and sauces, offering a vegetarian alternative to traditional meat burgers.

name: Double Tikki Burger
description: A double tikki burger typically refers to a burger containing two aloo tikkis (potato patties) as the central filling, usually nestled between burger buns with various toppings and condiments. It's a popular vegetarian option, especially in India, where the aloo tikki is a common snack.

name: Veg Sandwich
description: A vegetarian sandwich, or "veg sandwich", is a sandwich where the filling primarily consists of vegetables, without meat or fish. It can be made with various vegetables, either raw or cooked, and can be served toasted or untoasted. Vegetable sandwiches are popular globally and are particularly common as street food in India

name: Corn Sandwich
description: A corn sandwich is a simple and versatile dish, featuring sweet corn kernels as a primary ingredient, often combined with vegetables, cheese, and spices, and served between slices of bread. It can be enjoyed as a quick snack, breakfast, or lunch and is easily customizable to individual preferences.

name: Cheese Sandwich
description: A cheese sandwich, a simple yet popular food item, consists of cheese placed between slices of bread. Typically, semi-hard cheeses like Cheddar are used, but other varieties can be employed. Variations include grilled cheese, where the sandwich is cooked with butter or oil, and cheese dream, an open-faced version.

name: Paneer Stuff Sandwich
description: A paneer stuffed sandwich typically features Indian cottage cheese (paneer) as the main filling. The paneer is often spiced and sometimes combined with vegetables like onions, tomatoes, and cilantro, then sandwiched between slices of bread, which may be buttered on the outside. The sandwich can be grilled, toasted, or served as is.

name: Fully Loaded Sandwich
description: A fully loaded sandwich, often called a Dagwood sandwich, is a multi-layered sandwich characterized by a generous amount of fillings, including various meats, cheeses, and condiments, piled high between slices of bread. The term "Dagwood" specifically refers to this type of towering sandwich, inspired by the comic strip character Dagwood Bumstead, who frequently creates such extravagant sandwiches.

name: Red Sauce Pasta
description: Red sauce pasta is a dish featuring pasta tossed in a tomato-based sauce, often with added ingredients like garlic, onions, herbs, and spices. The "red" comes from the color of the tomato sauce. It's a versatile dish with numerous variations, commonly found in Italian and Italian-American cuisine.

name: White Sauce Pasta
description: White sauce pasta, also known as béchamel pasta, is a dish featuring pasta coated in a creamy white sauce, typically made with milk, butter, and flour. It's a versatile dish, often incorporating vegetables, cheese, herbs, and spices, and is a popular way to enjoy pasta. The foundation of the dish is the white sauce, which is a classic "mother sauce" in French and Italian cuisine, also known as béchamel.

name: Mix Sauce Pasta
description: Mixed sauce pasta typically refers to a pasta dish where two or more distinct sauces are combined to create a unique flavor profile. This could involve blending a tomato-based sauce with a cream-based sauce, or mixing a pesto sauce with a cheese sauce. The possibilities are endless, allowing for creative combinations of flavors and textures.

name: Tandoori Pasta
description: Tandoori pasta is an Indian-inspired pasta dish that combines the flavors of tandoori spices with pasta. It's a fusion dish that typically features pasta cooked al dente and then tossed in a creamy tandoori sauce. The sauce is often made with a blend of yogurt, tomato paste, and tandoori spices like garam masala, ginger, garlic, and chili powder.

name: Veg Wrap
description: A veg wrap, in its simplest form, is a vegetarian filling encased in a flatbread, similar to a burrito or a kati roll, but with a focus on vegetables and often featuring a variety of textures and flavors. It can range from a simple combination of vegetables and a sauce to more complex creations with various ingredients.

name: Corn Wrap
description: A "corn wrap" typically refers to a wrap made with a corn tortilla as its base, often used as a container for various fillings. Corn tortillas are thin, unleavened flatbreads made from nixtamalized corn. These wraps are a staple in Mexican cuisine and are used for dishes like tacos and burritos.

name: Allo Tikki Wrap
description: An aloo tikki wrap, also known as aloo frankie, is a popular Indian street food featuring a crispy aloo tikki (potato patty) nestled inside a soft flatbread or tortilla, layered with fresh vegetables and flavorful chutneys. The aloo tikki is typically made from mashed potatoes seasoned with spices like cumin, coriander, and chili powder, then shallow-fried to a golden crisp.

name: Cheesy Wrap
description: A "cheesy wrap" can refer to various dishes, but generally involves cheese wrapped in a tortilla or similar flatbread. Quesadillas, a Mexican dish, are a prime example, featuring cheese (often with other fillings) inside a tortilla. Kaassoufflés, popular in the Netherlands and Belgium, are another, consisting of cheese encased in a breaded and fried dough wrapper. Tacos, while not always cheesy, can be, and are often wrapped in a tortilla.

name: Paneer Wrap
description: A Paneer Wrap, also known as a Paneer Kathi Roll, is a popular Indian street food featuring marinated paneer (Indian cheese) grilled or cooked and wrapped in a soft, flaky Indian flatbread like paratha or roti. It often includes chutneys, vegetables, and sometimes pickled onions, creating a flavorful and handheld delight.

name: Fully Loaded Wrap
description: A "fully loaded wrap" is a wrap (a type of sandwich) that contains a variety of ingredients, typically including meats, cheeses, vegetables, and sauces, all enclosed in a flatbread. The specific contents can vary widely depending on the type of wrap and personal preference, but the term "fully loaded" suggests a generous portion and a wide array of flavors.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee, as a beverage, refers to coffee that is served at a high temperature. It is typically prepared by brewing roasted coffee beans with hot water, and can be enjoyed in various ways, often with additions like milk, sugar, or cream. The term "hot coffee" can also refer to the documentary film "Hot Coffee", which explores the complexities of tort reform in the US legal system.

name: Dalgona Coffee
description: Dalgona coffee is a whipped, frothy coffee beverage made by hand-beating equal parts instant coffee, sugar, and hot water until it becomes creamy and then topping it with milk, either hot or cold. It is named after a South Korean honeycomb candy called dalgona, due to the similarity in appearance and taste of the whipped coffee to the candy.

name: Cold Coffee With Ice Cream
description: Cold coffee with ice cream is a refreshing, chilled beverage typically made by blending cold coffee with ice cream, sometimes with additional ingredients like chocolate syrup or whipped cream. It's a popular drink, especially in Asian countries, where it's enjoyed as a cooling summer treat.

name: Aloo Tikki Salad
description: Aloo tikki salad, while not a standard, universally recognized dish, would likely be a combination of the popular Indian aloo tikki (potato patties) with a fresh salad component. Aloo tikki, made with boiled and mashed potatoes, spices, and sometimes peas, is a popular snack or street food in India. Adding a salad would introduce fresh vegetables and a contrasting texture and flavor profile to the crispy, often spicy, aloo tikki.

name: Smart Soya Fusion Salad
description: A "Smart Soya Fusion Salad" likely refers to a salad featuring soya (soy) and other ingredients, often with a focus on healthy and flavorful combinations. It's not a standardized dish with a Wikipedia page, but rather a descriptive term for a salad that incorporates soya. The "fusion" aspect suggests a blend of different culinary influences or ingredients.

name: Paneer & Bean burst
description: Bean salad is a common salad composed of various cooked beans—typically green, wax, kidney, and/or lima beans—tossed in a sweet-sour vinaigrette.

name: Power Pulse Salad
description: A "power pulse salad" is not a formally defined or commonly recognized dish. However, the term likely refers to a salad featuring pulses, which are the edible seeds of legume plants like lentils, chickpeas, and beans, known for their nutritional value and potential health benefits. These ingredients are often incorporated into salads for added protein, fiber, and other nutrients.

name: Fish Finger ( 8 Pcs)
description: Fish fingers, or fish sticks, are a processed food made from whitefish, typically cod, haddock, or pollock, that has been battered or breaded and formed into a rectangular shape. They are a popular frozen food item, commonly found in the frozen food section of supermarkets, and can be baked, grilled, shallow fried, or deep-fried.

name: Amritsari Fish ( Chef Style)
description: Amritsari fish, also known as Amritsari macchi, is a popular Indian street food and restaurant-style appetizer originating from Amritsar, Punjab. It's a lightly battered and deep-fried fish, known for its crispy exterior and flavorful interior according to food blogs. The fish is typically marinated in a mixture of spices, ginger-garlic paste, and gram flour before being fried to a golden-brown perfection. It's often served with green chutney or imli (tamarind) chutney.

name: Chilli Fish
description: Chili fish, also known as chilli fish or fish with chili, is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried fish pieces cooked in a spicy chili sauce. The dish is characterized by its vibrant flavor, combining the heat of chilies with the savory notes of soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and other spices. It's commonly served as an appetizer or side dish and can be enjoyed with rice or noodles.

name: Lemon Butter Garlic Fish
description: Chili fish, also known as chilli fish or fish with chili, is a popular Indo-Chinese dish featuring fried fish pieces cooked in a spicy chili sauce. The dish is characterized by its vibrant flavor, combining the heat of chilies with the savory notes of soy sauce, ginger, garlic, and other spices. It's commonly served as an appetizer or side dish and can be enjoyed with rice or noodles.

name: Chicken Chilli Garlic Fried Rice
description: Chicken Chilli Garlic Fried Rice is a stir-fried rice dish, popular in Indo-Chinese cuisine, that combines cooked rice with chicken, garlic, chili peppers, and other flavorful ingredients. It's a variation of fried rice that emphasizes the pungent flavors of garlic and chili, often with a touch of soy sauce for seasoning.

name: Egg Chicken Fried Rice
description: Egg fried rice is a dish of cooked rice stir-fried with eggs and other ingredients like vegetables, meat, or seafood. It's a versatile dish with variations found across many Asian cuisines and is known for its simple yet satisfying flavors. The dish often includes soy sauce and scallions, and the specific ingredients and cooking methods can vary significantly.

name: Egg Chicken Noodles
description: Egg chicken noodles is a popular dish featuring egg noodles stir-fried with chicken, vegetables, and a savory sauce.

name: Chilli Chicken Garlic Noodles
description: Chilli chicken garlic noodles is a fusion dish, primarily Indo-Chinese, that combines the spicy flavors of chilli chicken with the aromatic notes of garlic noodles. The dish typically features stir-fried noodles, coated in a savory sauce with pieces of chicken, garlic, and chili peppers. It's a popular dish in many restaurants, blending the best of both Chinese and Indian culinary traditions.

name: Veg Platter
description: A vegetable platter, or veg platter, is a selection of various vegetables, often raw and cut into pieces, served together on a plate or platter. It can be a simple arrangement of a few vegetables or a more elaborate display with a variety of colorful and flavorful options.

name: Non Veg Platter
description: A non-vegetarian platter, often featuring a selection of various meats and sometimes seafood, is a popular way to enjoy a diverse range of non-vegetarian dishes. These platters are common in various cuisines, particularly in India and other regions with rich culinary traditions.

name: Peanut butter smoothie
description: Peanut butter is a food paste or spread made from ground, dry-roasted peanuts. It commonly contains additional ingredients that modify the taste or texture, such as salt, sweeteners, or emulsifiers.

name: Black Current Smoothie
description: A smoothie is a beverage made by puréeing ingredients in a blender.

name: Strawberry smoothie
description: This strawberry smoothie recipe blends strawberries with milk, yogurt, sugar, and vanilla for an icy-cold treat.

name: Banana smoothie
description: A banana smoothie is a blended beverage typically made with bananas and a liquid base like milk or yogurt, often including other ingredients for added flavor and nutrients.

name: Coke
description: Great Taste

name: Kadahi Paneer
description: Kadai Paneer is a popular Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) and bell peppers cooked in a flavorful, tomato-based gravy with a special blend of spices, often made in a traditional Indian wok called a kadai. It's known for its rich, aromatic flavor derived from the freshly ground spice mix, and can be prepared in both gravy and dry versions.

name: Shahi Paneer
description: Shahi Paneer is a rich, creamy Indian curry made with paneer (Indian cheese) in a gravy of tomatoes, onions, cashew nuts, and cream, often flavored with aromatic spices. It's a popular vegetarian dish with Mughal origins, known for its royal, decadent taste and smooth texture.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer butter masala, also known as paneer makhani, is a popular Indian dish featuring paneer (Indian cheese) in a creamy, tomato-based gravy. The gravy is typically rich and buttery, incorporating butter, tomatoes, and cashews, along with various spices like red chili powder and garam masala. It's a vegetarian dish, often served with roti, naan, or rice.

name: Dal Makhni
description: Dal Makhani is a popular North Indian dish originating from the Punjab region. It's a rich, creamy lentil stew made primarily with black lentils (urad dal), kidney beans (rajma), butter, and cream. The dish is known for its slow-cooked, velvety texture and its aromatic blend of spices like ginger, garlic, coriander, cumin, and garam masala

name: Dal Tadka
description: Dal Tadka is a popular Indian dish made with lentils (dal) and a "tadka," which is a tempering of spices fried in ghee or oil. The tadka enhances the flavor and aroma of the lentils, creating a rich and aromatic experience. It's a staple in many Indian homes and restaurants, often served with rice or roti.

name: Amritsari Special Chicken
description: Amritsari Special Chicken, originating from Amritsar, Punjab, is a flavorful, dry chicken dish known for its rich, spicy, and tangy taste. It's typically made with boneless chicken pieces marinated in a mixture of ginger-garlic paste, yogurt, and a blend of spices, then deep-fried until crispy. The dish is often finished with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of fresh coriander.

name: Jeera Rice
description: Jeera rice, also known as cumin rice, is a popular Indian and Pakistani dish made with basmati rice and cumin seeds. It is a simple, aromatic, and flavorful rice dish often served as an accompaniment to curries, dals, and other Indian dishes. The dish is known for its fragrant aroma and the earthy flavor imparted by the cumin.

name: Plain Steamed Rice
description: Plain steamed rice is rice cooked by steaming until tender. It is a simple, versatile dish that can be a staple in many cuisines. It's made by boiling rice in water, typically with a 1:1.5 or 2:3 ratio of rice to water, and then allowing it to steam until cooked. The cooking process can be done on a stovetop or in an electric rice cooker.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Biryani is a mixed rice dish popular in the Indian subcontinent, known for its aromatic spices, rice, and meat (or vegetables). It is believed to have originated in Persia and was introduced to India by travelers and merchants. The dish is typically made with basmati rice and various spices like saffron, cardamom, and cinnamon, along with meat (often chicken, mutton, or beef) or vegetables.

name: Plain Roti
description: Plain roti, also known as chapati, is a type of unleavened flatbread originating from the Indian subcontinent. It's a staple food in many South Asian countries and is also popular in the Caribbean and other regions. Roti is made from a dough of whole wheat flour (atta) and water, sometimes with added salt or oil, and is cooked on a hot griddle. It's typically eaten with curries, dals, or other accompaniments, and can also be used as a utensil to scoop up food.

name: Butter Roti
description: Butter roti, also known as paratha or tandoori roti, is a type of Indian flatbread enriched with butter, typically ghee (clarified butter). It's made with whole wheat flour, water, and salt, kneaded into a dough, rolled into thin circles, and cooked on a hot griddle or tawa. Once cooked, it's often brushed with melted butter and served hot, commonly with curries or other dishes.

name: Onion Roti
description: Onion roti, also known as roti bawang, is a flatbread made with flour, chopped onions, and spices, cooked on a hot pan with oil or ghee. It's a popular dish, especially in South Asian cuisine, often enjoyed with curries or chutneys. The dough is typically made from wheat flour, but other flours like rice flour can also be used. Onion roti can be a simple and flavorful way to enjoy a flatbread, and variations exist in different regions and cultures.

name: Butter Naan
description: Naan bread often looks like a tear drop. It is often covered in herbs and spices such as garlic to change the taste. Naan bread is made from basic bread ingredients like wheat flour, a leavening agent (either yeast, yogurt, baking powder, or all), salt, and butter or ghee.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Garlic naan is a type of naan, a leavened, oven-baked flatbread, that is flavored with garlic. It's commonly found in cuisines of the Indian subcontinent, Central Asia, and the Caribbean. The dough is typically made with flour, a leavening agent (like yeast or yogurt), and enriched with dairy and eggs, giving it a light, fluffy texture. Garlic is incorporated into the dough, often with garlic-infused butter brushed on top before or after cooking.

name: Mix Raita
description: This tempering is then mixed with minced, raw vegetables or fruits (such as cucumber, onion, carrot, beetroot, tomato, pineapple, and pomegranate) and yogurt. Raw ginger and garlic paste, green chili paste, and sometimes mustard paste are used to enrich flavour. Raita is usually served chilled

name: Plain Curd
description: Plain curd, also known as dahi in many parts of the Indian subcontinent, is a dairy product made by curdling milk with lactic acid bacteria. It is a semi-solid food, typically made from cow's milk but can also be made from buffalo or goat's milk. The curdling process involves the fermentation of lactose (milk sugar) into lactic acid, which gives curd its characteristic sour taste and thick consistency.

name: Green Salad
description: A green salad, also known as a garden salad or green leaf salad, is primarily composed of leafy green vegetables like lettuce, spinach, or arugula. It can also include other vegetables, but if non-greens make up a large portion, it might be classified as a vegetable salad. The greens are often chopped or torn into smaller pieces and mixed with a dressing.

name: Simple Kulcha
description: Kulcha is a type of leavened, flatbread, traditionally made with maida (all-purpose flour) and cooked in a tandoor (clay oven). It is a popular dish in India and Pakistan, often eaten with a spicy chickpea curry called chole. Kulcha can also be stuffed with various fillings like potatoes or paneer.

name: Simple Burger
description: A simple burger, often called a hamburger, typically consists of a cooked patty of ground meat (usually beef) placed inside a sliced bun or bread roll. It's a popular fast-food item and can be customized with various toppings like lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, cheese, and condiments such as ketchup, mustard, or mayonnaise.

name: Chips Burger
description: A "CHIPS" burger, also known as a chip butty or chip sandwich, is a simple sandwich consisting of French fries (chips) as the primary filling, often placed between slices of bread or a bun, sometimes with butter or other condiments. It's a popular and inexpensive dish, particularly in working-class communities in Britain and Ireland.

name: Cheese Burger
description: A cheeseburger is a hamburger, typically consisting of a cooked ground beef patty placed inside a sliced bun, with one or more slices of melted cheese added on top. The cheese is usually added towards the end of the cooking process to allow it to melt. Cheeseburgers are a popular menu item at fast food restaurants and are commonly found in many other food establishments.

name: Kulcha Pizza
description: Kulcha pizza is a fusion dish that combines Indian kulcha bread with the flavors of Italian pizza. It typically involves using kulcha, a leavened flatbread from Punjab, as the base instead of traditional pizza dough. The kulcha is then topped with pizza sauce, cheese, and various toppings like vegetables, meat, or paneer, and baked or grilled.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: Margherita pizza, also known as Pizza Margherita, is a classic Neapolitan pizza characterized by its simple toppings of tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fresh basil, with olive oil and salt. It is widely believed to have been created in 1889 by Raffaele Esposito, a Neapolitan pizzaiolo (pizza maker), for Queen Margherita of Savoy. The pizza's toppings were chosen to represent the colors of the Italian flag: red (tomatoes), white (mozzarella), and green (basil).

name: Paneer Tikki Burger
description: A Paneer Tikka Burger is a fusion dish combining the Indian flavors of paneer tikka with the popular format of a burger. It features marinated and grilled paneer (Indian cheese) as the patty, often accompanied by vegetables, creamy sauces, and a soft burger bun. The dish is known for its balance of spicy, smoky, and tangy flavors, making it a popular vegetarian option.

name: Veg Tikki Burger
description: A veg tikki burger, also known as an Aloo Tikki burger, is a vegetarian burger popular in India, featuring a patty made primarily of mashed potatoes (aloo) and spices. The patty, called "aloo tikki," is typically deep-fried or shallow-fried and served in a bun with various toppings and sauces. It's a popular street food and a common offering in restaurants, with a distinctive Indian flavor profile.

name: Mr.Sanders Burger
description: A veg tikki burger, also known as an Aloo Tikki burger, is a vegetarian burger popular in India, featuring a patty made primarily of mashed potatoes (aloo) and spices. The patty, called "aloo tikki," is typically deep-fried or shallow-fried and served in a bun with various toppings and sauces. It's a popular street food and a common offering in restaurants, with a distinctive Indian flavor profile.

name: Allo Tikki Burger
description: An aloo tikki burger is a vegetarian burger consisting of a spiced potato patty (aloo tikki) placed between burger buns, often with additional toppings like onions, tomatoes, and sauces. The aloo tikki itself is a popular Indian snack made from mashed potatoes, peas, and various spices.

name: Chilli Cheese Burger
description: A chilli cheese burger, also known as a chili burger or chili size, is a type of hamburger with chili con carne as a topping, often with cheese, onions, and sometimes tomatoes. It can be served open-faced, with the chili either on top of the patty or on the side. The chili itself may be served plain or with various toppings.

name: Super Island Burger
description: The term "Super Island Burger" isn't a widely recognized or standardized name for a specific type of burger. It's likely a descriptive term used in a specific context, perhaps referring to a burger with tropical-inspired flavors or ingredients, or simply a large, hearty burger. Without more context, it's difficult to pinpoint a specific description.

name: Veg Popular Tikki Burger
description: A popular vegetarian burger in India, the McAloo Tikki, features a crispy potato and pea patty infused with aromatic spices, served with sliced tomatoes, shredded red onion, and tangy tomato mayonnaise,

name: Crunchy Chips Burger
description: A "crunchy chips burger" generally refers to a burger, likely a hamburger or veggie burger, that includes potato chips as a key ingredient or topping to add a crunchy texture. This could mean the chips are integrated into the patty itself, or they are used as a topping on the burger. It's a variation on the traditional burger, often incorporating the satisfying crunch of chips into the overall eating experience.

name: Masala Fries
description: Masala fries are a popular Indian-inspired dish of French fries tossed in a flavorful, spicy, and tangy sauce, often topped with garnishes like red onions and cilantro. They can be enjoyed as a snack, appetizer, or side dish. The "masala" refers to the spice blend that gives the fries their distinctive flavor.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri Peri fries are a spicy twist on traditional french fries, featuring a coating of peri peri sauce, which is made from African bird's eye chili peppers. The sauce typically includes ingredients like garlic, lemon juice, vinegar, and various spices. These fries are often seasoned with additional spices or herbs like cilantro or parsley. They can be found as a standalone snack or as a side dish, often paired with burgers, sandwiches, or drinks.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Loaded fries are a dish consisting of French fries topped with a variety of ingredients, often including cheese, sauces, meats (like bacon), and vegetables. They are a popular and customizable dish, with variations including toppings from Tex-Mex, Indian, and other cuisines.

name: Veg Wrap
description: A vegetable wrap, or veggie wrap, is a food item consisting of a soft, flatbread (like a tortilla or pita) wrapped around various fillings, primarily vegetables. These wraps offer a convenient and customizable meal or snack option, often incorporating fresh vegetables, spreads, and dressings.

name: Fries Wrap
description: A fries wrap, often called a "frites wrap" or "chip wrap," is a type of fast food where french fries (or chips) are wrapped in a paper cone, often with sauce, and sometimes with other additions like meat or cheese. It's a popular street food item, particularly in European countries like Belgium and the Netherlands.

name: Cheese Wrap
description: A "cheese wrap" can refer to several different types of food, often involving cheese enclosed or combined with another food item. Examples include quesadillas, cheese rolls, kaassoufflés, or even processed cheese slices used in various dishes. The specific type of cheese wrap depends on the region and preparation method.

name: Paneer Wrap
description: A Paneer Wrap, also known as a Paneer Kathi Roll, is a popular Indian street food that features marinated and grilled paneer (Indian cheese) wrapped in a flatbread like paratha or roti. It's a versatile dish, with variations in the marinade, fillings, and sauces used. The wrap is often enhanced with chutneys, vegetables, and spices, creating a flavorful and satisfying handheld meal.

name: Cold Sandwich
description: A cold sandwich, as defined by the British Sandwich Association, is any form of bread with a filling, typically assembled cold. This encompasses a wide variety of sandwiches, from simple ham and cheese to more elaborate creations like club sandwiches or Reubens. Many cold sandwiches are popular for packed lunches due to their ease of preparation and portability.

name: Corn Cabbage Sandwich
description: A corn and cabbage vegetable sandwich typically consists of bread filled with a mixture of corn kernels, shredded cabbage, and other vegetables, often combined with a spread or sauce. It's a versatile sandwich that can be enjoyed as a snack, breakfast, or light meal.

name: Onion Capsicum Sandwich
description: An Onion Capsicum Sandwich is a simple, quick vegetarian sandwich, typically made with bread, onions, capsicum (bell peppers), and other optional ingredients like cheese, coriander, salt, and pepper. It's a popular snack or breakfast option, especially in India, and can be prepared using a sandwich griller, bread toaster, or even a tawa (flat griddle).

name: Cabbage Tomato Sandwich
description: A tomato and cabbage sandwich is a simple sandwich featuring sliced tomatoes and cabbage, often with a condiment like mayonnaise. It's a basic sandwich, and the specific ingredients and preparations can vary. Some may use other vegetables or condiments. It is not a widely recognized or named sandwich like a BLT or a grilled cheese.

name: Cheese Corn Sandwich
description: A cheese corn sandwich typically consists of cheese and corn kernels, often combined with mayonnaise, sandwiched between slices of bread. It can be a simple, quick meal or snack, sometimes grilled or toasted for a warm, melted cheese and corn filling. The sandwich is popular for its kid-friendly appeal and can be customized with various additions like spices, other vegetables, or different types of cheese.

name: Potato Onion Sandwich
description: A potato onion sandwich, often called an Aloo Sandwich in India, is a popular vegetarian sandwich featuring a spiced potato filling. The filling typically includes mashed potatoes, onions, and various spices, and is often complemented by a creamy white sauce, green chutney, or tomato ketchup. The sandwich is commonly made with Western-style bread and can be grilled or toasted for added flavor and texture.

name: Garlic Cabbage Sandwich
description: However, there are dishes involving garlic and cabbage that are often served as part of a meal or in different forms, such as cabbage rolls, which are often found in various cuisines. Cabbage, when combined with garlic and other ingredients, can be part of a filling for sandwiches or served as a side dish.

name: Paneer Sandwich
description: A paneer sandwich is a vegetarian sandwich popular in Indian cuisine, featuring paneer (Indian cottage cheese) as the main filling. It typically involves placing slices or crumbled paneer, often marinated or spiced, between bread slices, sometimes with additional vegetables, sauces, and spices. The sandwich can be served cold or toasted, making it a versatile snack or meal option

name: Extra Cheese Sandwich
description: A cheese sandwich, in its simplest form, is bread with cheese placed between the slices. An "extra cheese sandwich" likely refers to a variation where more cheese than usual is added between the bread slices, creating a richer, cheesier experience

name: Mr. Sanders Sandwich
description: A cheese sandwich, in its simplest form, is bread with cheese placed between the slices. An "extra cheese sandwich" likely refers to a variation where more cheese than usual is added between the bread slices, creating a richer, cheesier experience

name: Garlic Bread
description: Garlic bread is a type of toasted bread, typically made with baguette, sourdough, or ciabatta, topped with garlic and butter or olive oil, and often herbs. It is then either grilled or baked until toasted.

name: Stuffed Garlic Bread
description: Stuffed garlic bread, as the name suggests, is a variation of garlic bread where the bread is filled with a savory or cheesy mixture before baking or toasting. It's essentially a step up from classic garlic bread, offering a more substantial and flavorful experience.

name: Kullhad Pizza
description: Kulhad pizza is a creative street-food dish that involves serving pizza in a traditional Indian earthen pot called a kulhad. It's essentially a pizza, often made with a bread base and various toppings like paneer, onions, capsicum, corn, and olives, all layered and baked or heated in the kulhad. The kulhad imparts a unique earthy flavor to the pizza.

name: Vanilla Shake
description: A vanilla shake, often called a vanilla milkshake, is a cold beverage typically made with milk, vanilla ice cream, and vanilla flavoring. It's a popular and refreshing drink, known for its creamy texture and sweet, vanilla taste.

name: Strawberry Shake
description: A strawberry shake, also known as a strawberry milkshake, is a blended drink made with milk, ice cream, and strawberries, often enhanced with vanilla extract or strawberry syrup. It can be topped with whipped cream and more strawberries, making it a versatile dessert or beverage.

name: Butter Scotch Shake
description: A butterscotch shake is a sweet, cold beverage made by blending milk, ice cream, and butterscotch flavoring. It's essentially a milkshake with butterscotch as the primary flavor component. The butterscotch adds a rich, buttery sweetness that complements the creaminess of the milk and ice cream.

name: Oreo Shake
description: An Oreo milkshake typically combines vanilla ice cream, milk, and Oreo cookies, often blended until smooth and creamy, with a garnish of extra Oreo pieces. Some recipes also include chocolate syrup for added flavor. It's a popular dessert, particularly for Oreo lovers, due to its rich, sweet, and crunchy texture.

name: Banana Shake
description: A banana shake, also known as a banana milkshake, is a cold beverage typically made by blending ripe bananas with milk, and often includes ice cream or other sweeteners for added flavor and richness. It can also incorporate ingredients like yogurt, honey

name: Chocolate Shake
description: A chocolate shake, also known as a chocolate milkshake, is a sweet, cold beverage made by blending milk, ice cream, and chocolate flavoring (usually chocolate syrup) until smooth and creamy. It is often topped with whipped cream, chocolate shavings, or a cherry. The drink is typically served in a tall glass or cup and enjoyed with a straw.

name: Kitkat Shake
description: A Kit Kat shake is a milkshake made with Kit Kat chocolate bars, typically blended with milk and ice cream. It's a popular treat known for its creamy texture and chocolatey, crunchy Kit Kat flavor. Variations include adding peanut butter, mint, or using vegan ingredients.

name: Mint Mojito
description: A mojito is a classic Cuban highball cocktail, known for its refreshing combination of white rum, lime juice, sugar, soda water, and mint. The drink is characterized by a balance of sweetness, citrus, and minty flavor, designed to complement the rum. Traditionally, fresh mint leaves are muddled with sugar and lime juice, then mixed with rum, and topped with soda water and ice. Garnishes like mint sprigs or lime wedges are often added.

name: Mojito Watermalon
description: A watermelon mojito is a refreshing variation of the classic mojito cocktail, incorporating the sweet, hydrating flavor of watermelon. It typically features muddled watermelon, lime juice, mint, sugar, and white rum, topped with soda water. The addition of watermelon juice or muddled fresh watermelon provides a juicy, fruity twist on the traditional mojito.

name: Red Valvet Shake
description: A red velvet shake typically combines the flavors and colors of red velvet cake into a blended drink. It usually includes vanilla ice cream, milk, and red velvet cake or cake mix as a base, resulting in a creamy, slightly chocolatey, and vibrantly red beverage. Some recipes also incorporate cream cheese frosting, a common topping for red velvet cake, to enhance the flavor and sweetness.

name: Coke
description: Coca-Cola, often called Coke, is a carbonated, sweetened soft drink produced by The Coca-Cola Company. It's known for its distinctive taste and is the world's best-selling soda. The original Coca-Cola recipe is a closely guarded trade secret.

name: Masala Coke
description: Masala Coke, also known as Spiced Coca-Cola, is a popular Indian beverage that combines the classic taste of Coca-Cola with a blend of Indian spices, primarily chaat masala and black salt. It's a refreshing twist on the traditional soda, often enjoyed during summer in India. The drink is made by adding a mixture of spices and lemon juice to chilled Coca-Cola, creating a unique sweet, salty, and spicy flavor profile.

name: Water Bottle
description: A water bottle is a portable container designed to hold water or other beverages for drinking purposes. They are typically made of plastic, glass, or metal and can be either disposable or reusable. Reusable water bottles are often favored for their environmental benefits, helping to reduce plastic waste.

name: Hot Coffee
description: Hot coffee is a beverage made by brewing ground roasted coffee beans with hot water, resulting in a dark, bitter, and slightly acidic drink that is known for its stimulating effect. It is a globally popular beverage with a long history, traditionally brewed using various methods like boiling, drip, or espresso. Coffee can be enjoyed black or with additions like milk, cream, sugar, or sweeteners.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold coffee refers to coffee served chilled, encompassing various preparations like iced coffee and cold brew. Iced coffee is brewed hot and then cooled, while cold brew is steeped in cold water for an extended period to create a concentrate.

name: Red Sauce  Pasta
description: Red sauce pasta is a popular pasta dish featuring pasta tossed in a tomato-based sauce, often with seasonings and spices. The vibrant red color comes from the tomatoes used in the sauce. It can be made with various vegetables or just onions and garlic.

name: White Sauce  Pasta
description: White pasta, often simply called "pasta," is a type of pasta traditionally made from durum wheat flour. It is characterized by its pale yellow color, derived from the durum wheat, and its ability to be shaped into various forms like spaghetti, penne, or farfalle. While white pasta is commonly associated with refined flour, it can also be made with whole wheat flour for a different nutritional profile.

name: Mushroom Red
description: Mushroom pasta, in its simplest form, is any pasta dish where mushrooms are a prominent ingredient, often featuring in a sauce. It can range from simple preparations like Spaghetti Aglio, Olio e Funghi (with garlic, olive oil, and mushrooms) to more elaborate dishes like creamy mushroom pasta with various additions like cream, herbs, and cheese. Mushroom sauces themselves can be made with different types of mushrooms, and can be served with pasta or other dishes like chicken or veal.

name: Mushroom White
description: Mushroom white pasta is a dish where al dente pasta is tossed in a creamy, white sauce featuring sauteed mushrooms. The sauce is typically made with a base of butter, flour, and milk (sometimes with cheese or cream). The mushrooms are often sauteed with garlic, onions, and sometimes bell peppers before being added to the sauce. This dish can be enjoyed on its own or baked with cheese for an extra layer of richness.

name: Mr.Sanders Pasta
description: Pasta is a staple food in Italian cuisine, made from an unleavened dough, traditionally of durum wheat flour, mixed with water or eggs, and formed into various shapes, then cooked. It can also be made with other grains, like rice flour, or legumes for gluten-free options. Pasta is broadly categorized into dried (secca) and fresh (fresca) types.

name: Veg Salad
description: A vegetable salad is a dish consisting of mixed, usually uncooked, vegetables, often including leafy greens, and sometimes fruits or other ingredients, dressed with a sauce or vinaigrette. It can range from simple green salads to more complex compositions with various vegetables, fruits, and toppings.

name: Tikki Salad
description: A tikka salad generally refers to a salad that incorporates tikka-marinated ingredients, typically meat or paneer, alongside other salad components. Tikka, in Punjabi, means "small pieces," and masala means "mixture," often referring to a spice mixture.

name: Paneer Salad
description: Paneer salad is a healthy and nutritious Indian dish, typically featuring cubes of paneer (Indian cheese) combined with fresh vegetables and herbs. It is a popular vegetarian option, known for its protein content and versatility in incorporating various vegetables and seasonings.

name: Ice Cream

name: Green Apple Mojito
description: A green apple is a type of fruit known for its tart, crisp flavor, and is rich in vitamins, fiber, and antioxidants. It offers various health benefits, including improved digestion, boosted immunity, and potential help with weight management

name: Cold Coffee
description: including classic blended iced coffee, cold brew, and coffee made with ready-to-drink concentrates. Below are details on these different methods, products you can use, and cold coffee recipes.

name: Hot coffee
description: Hot coffee is a popular, warm beverage made from roasted and ground coffee beans steeped in hot water. It is enjoyed worldwide for its stimulating caffeine content, rich aroma, and flavor, which can be adjusted with additions like milk, cream, or sugar.

name: Gujrat special Dabeli
description: The most well-known special dabeli from Gujarat is Kutchi Dabeli, a popular street food that originated in the Kutch region. It is known for its perfect balance of sweet, spicy, and tangy flavors. The word "dabeli" literally means "pressed" in Gujarati, referring to how the bun is pressed with the filling inside

name: Chatpati Fries
description: Chatpati fries, or "French fries chaat," is a popular Indian street food that transforms crispy French fries into a tangy, spicy, and savory snack.

name: Salty Fries
description: Crispy, salty fries are a beloved snack or side dish, and there are many ways to prepare them. Here are a few popular options, from simple homemade versions to more gourmet twists

name: Kashmiri Pulao
description: Kashmiri pulao is a fragrant, mild, and subtly sweet rice dish from the Kashmir Valley, distinguished by its colorful array of dried fruits, nuts, and fresh fruits. The dish gets its signature flavor from aromatic spices like saffron and fennel, often cooked with basmati rice in a milk and water base.

name: Shahi Pulao
description: Shahi  pulao is a fragrant, mild, and subtly sweet rice dish from the Kashmir Valley, distinguished by its colorful array of dried fruits, nuts, and fresh fruits. The dish gets its signature flavor from aromatic spices like saffron and fennel, often cooked with basmati rice in a milk and water base.

name: Hydrabad Biryani Veg
description: Hyderabadi biryani is a style of biryani originating from Hyderabad, India made with basmati rice . Originating in the kitchens of the Nizam of Hyderabad, it combines elements of Hyderabadi and Mughlai cuisines.

name: Mushroom Biryani
description: Mushroom biryani is a flavorful and aromatic one-pot vegetarian dish featuring mushrooms, basmati rice, herbs, and spices. It can be prepared in various ways, such as a traditional layered "dum" style or a quicker pressure cooker version.

name: Veg Fried Rice
description: A quick and easy veg fried rice is a delicious meal packed with vibrant vegetables and savory sauces. For the best results, use day-old rice, as chilled rice fries up best and won't get mushy.

name: Bhalla Papdi Chaat
description: Papdi chaat is a popular Indian street food that combines crunchy wafers (papdi) with potatoes, chickpeas, yogurt, and a variety of sweet and tangy chutneys. It is a beloved snack known for its vibrant flavors and mix of textures.

name: Papdi Chaat
description: Papdi chaat is a popular Indian street food that combines crunchy wafers (papdi) with potatoes, chickpeas, yogurt, and a variety of sweet and tangy chutneys. It is a beloved snack known for its vibrant flavors and mix of textures.

name: Palak Ke Patte Ki Chaat
description: made with perfection

name: Paan ke Patte Ki Chaat
description: पान के पत्ते की चाट एक अनोखी और स्वादिष्ट चाट है, जिसमें कुरकुरे तले हुए पान के पत्तों के ऊपर चटपटी और मीठी चटनी, दही और मसाले डाले जाते हैं। यह एक पारंपरिक उत्तर भारतीय व्यंजन है, जो अपनी ताजगी और सुगंधित स्वाद के लिए जाना जाता है। इसे घर पर आसानी से बनाया जा सकता है।

name: Dhokle Ki Chaat
description: ढोकले की चाट एक स्वादिष्ट और झटपट बनने वाली चाट है, जिसमें गुजरात के मशहूर ढोकले को चटपटे चाट के फ्लेवर के साथ मिलाया जाता है। यह बची हुई ढोकले का उपयोग करने का एक बेहतरीन तरीका है और इसे पार्टी स्नैक के रूप में भी परोसा जा सकता है।

name: Chaina Bhalla Chaat
description: Chaina Bhalla Chaat is a variation of the popular North Indian street food known as Dahi Bhalla Chaat. It is a delightful, tangy, and savory snack that combines soft lentil dumplings (bhallas) with chickpeas (chana), sweet and spicy chutneys, yogurt, and aromatic spices. The name "Chaina" is an alternative spelling of "chana," which is the Hindi word for chickpeas.

name: Matar Khasta Chaat
description: Matar khasta chaat is a popular street food from North India, particularly in Uttar Pradesh and Delhi. This tangy, spicy, and crunchy snack features a spiced white pea curry (matar) served over crisp, fried pastry discs (khasta or kachori) and topped with a variety of fresh ingredients and chutneys.

name: Lachha Tokri Chaat
description: लच्छा टोकरी चाट एक लोकप्रिय भारतीय स्ट्रीट फूड है, जिसे कुरकुरी आलू की टोकरियों में विभिन्न प्रकार के चटपटे और स्वादिष्ट मिश्रण भरकर बनाया जाता है। टोकरी को बारीक कद्दूकस किए हुए आलू को तलकर बनाया जाता है, जिसे फिर दही, हरी और इमली की चटनी, मसाले और कई तरह की टॉपिंग के साथ परोसा जाता है।

name: Bombaiya Pav Bhaaji
description: Bombay pav bhaji is a flavorful street food dish from Mumbai, India, consisting of a spiced vegetable mash (bhaji) served with buttered and toasted bread rolls (pav). The dish is rich, hearty, and often topped with chopped onions, a squeeze of lemon juice, and a generous knob of butter.

name: Delhi Matra Kulcha
description: दिल्ली का मटर कुलचा एक मशहूर और स्वादिष्ट स्ट्रीट फूड है। इसमें मसालेदार और चटपटी सूखी सफेद मटर (या छोले) की करी को नरम और फूले हुए कुलचे के साथ परोसा जाता है। इस व्यंजन में खट्टे, तीखे और चटपटे स्वाद का बेहतरीन मिश्रण होता है, जो इसे खास बनाता है।

name: Amritsari  Nutri Kulcha
description: Amritsari Nutri Kulcha is a popular street food from Amritsar, where soft kulchas (flatbreads) are served with a spicy and tangy curry made from soya chunks (nutri). The curry is slow-cooked with a distinct blend of spices, onions, and tomatoes, resulting in a thick, flavorful gravy.

name: Agra Ka Special Chilla
description: आगरा का स्पेशल चिल्ला पक्का बाबा का पनीर चिल्ला है, जो बेलनगंज में पक्का बाबा चाट भंडार पर मिलता है

name: Hydrabad ka Special Chilla
description: हैदराबाद का कोई खास या पारंपरिक चिल्ला नहीं है। लेकिन, अगर आप हैदराबाद में स्वादिष्ट चिल्ला/पैनकेक खाना चाहते हैं

name: Lachha Aloo Tikki
description: Made with boiled & mashed potatoes, spices and herbs, these Indian style potato patties are shallow fried or pan fried to perfection until crisp

name: Hardiwaar Ki tikki(1Pcs)
description: The main ingredients for aloo tikki are boiled potatoes, along with a binding agent like cornstarch or rice flour, and spices such as cumin powder, red chili powder, and garam masala. You will also need salt, and often include finely chopped onions, ginger, garlic, and fresh cilantro and/or mint leaves to flavor the patties

name: Kofte ki tikkki
description: कोफ्ते की टिक्की एक स्वादिष्ट नाश्ता है, जिसे आमतौर पर आलू के कोफ्ते से बनाया जाता है, लेकिन इसे अन्य सब्जियों के कोफ्ते से भी बनाया जा सकता है। यह एक स्वादिष्ट और आसानी से बनने वाली डिश है।

name: Dehradun Ki Bunn  Tikki
description: देहरादून की बन टिक्की एक मशहूर स्ट्रीट फूड है, जिसे लोग बहुत पसंद करते हैं। यह एक तरह का आलू टिक्की बर्गर है जिसमें करारी आलू टिक्की को नरम बन के बीच में रखकर, कई तरह की चटनी और प्याज के साथ परोसा जाता है।

name: Bombay Bhelpuri
description: Bombay bhelpuri is a popular Mumbai street food, also known as Mumbai bhel puri. This savory and tangy snack is a type of chaat, characterized by its mix of flavors and contrasting textures. It is particularly associated with Mumbai's beaches, like Chowpatty and Juhu.

name: Indore ki Sev Puri
description: इंदौर की सेव पुरी अपने चटपटे और अनूठे स्वाद के लिए मशहूर है, जिसमें मुख्य रूप से इंदौर की ख़ास 'जीरो नंबर सेव' का इस्तेमाल होता है। यह सेव बहुत ही बारीक, कुरकुरी और हल्की होती है, जो चाट का स्वाद और भी बढ़ा देती है

name: Mineral Water
description: Mineral water is bottled water from a geologically and physically protected underground source that is naturally enriched with minerals. The specific mineral content varies depending on the brand and source

name: Schewan Fried Rice
description: Schezwan fried rice is a popular and spicy Indo-Chinese dish made by stir-frying cooked rice with a bold Schezwan sauce, mixed vegetables, and aromatics. It is known for its fiery kick and tangy flavor, adapted from traditional Chinese cooking methods to suit Indian palates

name: Mushroom Fried Rice
description: Mushroom fried rice is a versatile dish made by stir-frying cooked rice with mushrooms and other ingredients, typically in a wok. The key to great fried rice is using cold, day-old rice, which prevents it from getting mushy when stir-fried.

name: Paneer  Fried  Rice
description: Paneer fried rice is a versatile dish made by stir-frying cooked rice with Paneer and other ingredients, typically in a wok. The key to great fried rice is using cold, day-old rice, which prevents it from getting mushy when stir-fried.

name: Onion Salad
description: Onion salad is a versatile and flavorful dish that varies widely across cuisines, but a popular and simple version is the classic Indian laccha pyaaz. This easy, uncooked salad features crunchy raw onion rings tossed in a tangy and spicy dressing of lemon juice, herbs, and spices.

name: Cucumber  Salad
description: Cucumber salad can refer to a variety of fresh, crunchy, and tangy dishes, from a simple Indian laccha pyaaz with spices and lime juice to creamy cucumber and onion salads. The simplest version involves thinly sliced onions soaked in cold water to remove their pungency, then mixed with a light dressing

name: Kachumber salad i
description: Kachumber salad is an Indian salad with cucumbers, onions, tomatoes, and fresh herbs, dressed with lemon juice and salt, and is oil-free.

name: Cream Kachamber Salad
description: Kachumber salad is an Indian salad with cucumbers, onions, tomatoes, and fresh herbs, dressed with lemon juice and salt, and is oil-free.

name: Paneer Tikka Salad
description: paneer tikka salad, featuring spiced, grilled Indian cheese over a bed of fresh greens with a tangy yogurt dressing

name: Fruit Salad
description: A fruit tikka salad is an Indian-style fruit salad that combines the juicy sweetness of fresh fruit with a tangy, spicy tikka marinade. Instead of the typical creamy fruit salad, this dish is a refreshing mix of flavors, featuring the bright zing of chaat masala and lemon juice. It can be served chilled as a fresh chaat or skewered and lightly grilled for a smoky finish.

name: Onion Pakoda
description: An onion pakoda  is a type of fritter originating in the Indian subcontinent. It is made from spicy hot vegetables, commonly onion, and has several variants. It is a popular snack food in India and is also very popular in Pakistan. It can be found for sale in street-side stalls, especially in tapris and dhabas.

description: A virgin mojito is a refreshing non-alcoholic version of the classic Mojito cocktail. It captures the original's zesty, minty flavor profile by combining fresh mint leaves, lime, and a sweetener, topped with club soda or sparkling water

name: Spicy Mango Mojito
description: spicy mango mojito, with the vibrant flavors of mango and the classic mojito, plus a kick of heat from fresh jalapeño. The drink is built right in the glass for a quick and easy preparation.

name: Blue Crush
description: A blue crush mojito is a visually striking twist on the classic mojito, with the addition of blue curaçao providing a brilliant blue color and a subtle orange flavor. Some variations use a "blueberry crush" base instead of blue curaçao, or a mix of both.

name: Fruit Beer
description: Fruit beer is a beer brewed with fruit or fruit flavorings to impart flavor and aroma. Typically sweeter and less bitter than traditional beer, it is available in a range of flavors, from sweet cherry to tart passion fruit. Some popular types include sour ales, wheat beers, and Belgian-style fruit beers.

The entire bun is then dipped in a rich garlic-herb butter custard and baked until crispy on the outside and gooey inside
